name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Did you vote for me or an activist judge to run the country?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
Unelected radicals are trying to obliterate my agenda!
| | | | **[CASE 15-DJT-94713](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)**
_Did you vote for activist judges to lead the country, Friend?_
**Or did you vote for**** DONALD J. TRUMP?**

Thank you for your attention to this matter,

name: StateDemocrats.com
subject: Please tell us: Do you listen to NPR?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Millions of Americans listen to the news every day on their local NPR station. Do you?
#

**Do you listen to NPR?** | [YES, I LISTEN TO NPR](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93421?t=1&akid=9248%2E614464%2E_VLrbE) [NO, I DON’T LISTEN TO NPR](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93421?t=2&akid=9248%2E614464%2E_VLrbE)
---
Here’s what happened, Peter:
**FIRST —** Donald Trump + MAGA Republicans in Congress announced their effort to cut more than a BILLION DOLLARS from PBS + NPR.
**THEN —** They actually did it. They officially cut $1.1 BILLION in federal funding for public broadcasters on radio + TV across the country.
**NOW — These cuts mean that PBS + NPR stations, especially in rural areas, are at risk of shuttering.**
Millions of Americans listen to the news every day on their local NPR station. **So today, we’re asking you to confirm with us:**
**Do you listen to NPR?**
[YES, I LISTEN TO NPR](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93421?t=3&akid=9248%2E614464%2E_VLrbE) [NO, I DON’T LISTEN TO NPR](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93421?t=4&akid=9248%2E614464%2E_VLrbE)

If you've ever felt like you're doing _all the right things,_ but life still isn't lining up the way you want...
I want to personally invite you to something that could shift everything.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/68f7de56-a96d-49f2-a2f9-8f672ce01300?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I'm speaking at the upcoming _**Rise Up Women!**_ **Master Your Mind and Mouth: Step Into Your Destiny** Summit, and it's designed to help you gain one key awareness:
**Your thoughts and your words are dictating your future.**
During this [free online event](https://substack.com/redirect/68f7de56-a96d-49f2-a2f9-8f672ce01300?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), you'll learn how to step into your God-given destiny, starting with what you think and say every single day. You'll hear from a world-class, powerful lineup of speakers (myself included) on how to shift your mindset, upgrade your self-talk, and step into genuine transformation. 🩷
**It 's happening live from August 11th to August 15th at 8AM PT, and you can reserve your spot right here:**
[CLICK HERE TO REGISTER](https://substack.com/redirect/68f7de56-a96d-49f2-a2f9-8f672ce01300?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This could be the breakthrough you've been waiting for.
Excited to see you there!

name: (1) Donald J. Trump
subject: Hide your screen when opening!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc
body:
Friend, only Real American Citizens can view and answer. Should we remove Illegals from our Census?
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
**You wouldn’t let a total stranger crash your dinner and demand a seat at the table.** ****
So I’m announcing that people who are in our Country illegally WILL NOT BE COUNTED IN THE CENSUS.
The Left wants to inflate their numbers, grab more power, and funnel your money into sanctuary cities and liberal strongholds.
Not on my watch!
**__In my new TRUMP CENSUS, only American Citizens will be counted!__** **____**
**_DO YOU APPROVE?_**
[RESPOND NOW](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
This means less taxpayer money going to border hoppers and more power for REAL Americans like you!

It’s simple: **Count citizens. Leave the ILLEGALS out.**

**[DO YOU SUPPORT A NEW CITIZENS ONLY CENSUS?](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)** **Survey ID: 0719-498369** **Response: MISSING**
[RESPOND TO TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
I'm grateful for your participation!
\- President Trump

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Uncover the Fascinating History of Christianity
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z32rkq3oebalokb9c8s1t8gsfupb53tirl2dev50_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c3h60p72c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgo2kvnilqi7th41ec0fa52802r6nvgrbsfilo90_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c3h60p72c5h2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z57rup8eaesfppfn53nb21imqod69bltegkl7vio_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c3h60p72c5h2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z88ricjo2scr3cer397mfcqrtc3tf09hkk9rpf0g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c3h60p72c5h2bs)**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlia8uq29dq4nvfcd2kh1qmikde7bltubk9mt06o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c3h60p72c5h2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---

# Sunday, August 10, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1846, [the Smithsonian Institution](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzztuhDAQANDTmG7RMNh8Chdp6DZtSsu7Hi8TGYzMsIjbR8kVcoEnva-7u3tOvL4-_UJWYnYrnXsiESpOyrFskhci2Q7hVagUjhevDgHNDYZbAy54TpfTVbCRCKmtyDa90QNCC6aaLWJooYu-70jHBgzEEcGMTadHbWh4Vmx_NRgaaAAM6Dq23fjsgocHhNiHoDRQYMml_s68ykwxXflNpX7mpUp2Ftl21X4onBRO53nWO9cUDoWTf-RDFE4z75LLVRUbtpNT4r3rlYbX4jn9KfKv-tviTwAAAP__7jBtuQ) was created by an act of Congress signed by President James K. Polk, following a bequest from English scientist James Smithson, who left his estate to establish an institution for the "increase and diffusion of knowledge." Today, _The Flyover_ launches a new _Whatever Happened To_ Sunday feature, exploring the current state of a popular person, product, or trend from the past. The new section was a suggestion from a reader, and we’d love to hear from you on topics you think would be worthwhile to explore in the future. Just reply to this email with your suggestions. We're sponsored today by [Oricle Hearing Aids](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD-r3DAQxD-N3J3RP8t2oeLBYUjxkiaQUsjW6m6DbBlp_cx9-3BOlzbdb3eGYZhfn-7TY8Lt8d2vYClmt8FZExBBcVSOdae8AtB-EG4EpWB84eYkl92NDzfBXfCYXk43wUYACaoBK_pOD5Ir3jVPq71U_RzGQYP2UYjZgB_m2Qz9AgLi0qB9p_FBcMF5x3UblRkXEzyfeYh9CExzCEi5tL8zbvSEmF75C0q75LVJ9km0V6Y-mJyYnM7zbB9AueCS4O1gcqqUC9RbPArmo94gMjU5iI6K36pfCPPmMDB1Z9LkC4QYmTTHxaPu__n7GK9LKsWkqccsmLr_nH4waT6mb_e_SlNs2E9MCavpmeaP1WO6KtN_7fxl5Z8AAAD__0MUjuM), the most affordable rechargeable hearing aids on the market.

## Trump, Putin to Meet in Alaska
President Trump and Russian President Vladimir Putin [will meet in Alaska next Friday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2uozAQBeCngc5oMOYnhYtt0mXbLZGxx2E2xkb2JCRvf0Ve4bYz0tH5zr_bfDMUKN7_mg01-zRHPEpAZswz5-e2c9oQeX8yRcacyX8ozhJkL2ASLczOUPjMqnbaI0rsatTt2KtJQgd9veoFu2XCwffqYpfBgnUKDbpRyeWC7Whr0mcaTC20AD2oxnfDxQ7OwALOj85VCtARp9z8TxR5RR8-6YW5sWmrg16Z91J1fyp5reT1OI7Gp_epOP_nJeXgKnn9asQXItYUnPCUCwuKYsdcUhSnk-JdFIoWxfORDUUUFF-mUIoi4pvFgfgQJpjyMHXWbj8oBCrDWCm4b4bCtxP_asiXlj8BAAD__6HRjX4), Aug. 15, for their first in-person meeting since Moscow launched its 2022 invasion of Ukraine. Putin [reportedly presented the administration with a ceasefire proposal](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DtuwzAMxvHTSJsDSpYfGjR08ZauHQ3VomO2ehgykyC3L5wrdCb4B37f13W-eoqUb58-oeO1zBmfR0RmrDPXe9q5JETe70yZsVZaX5RnDbprYGwUzMFTfM1GBrciamwlOjV0ZtTQQic3h2FBC8F2frBtPy4BgzVqWHBUyo_aSnJnDUYFCqADc1nb3i598PANYR1CEAYwEJd6-SmUecM1vsoD62UpSUa3Me-HaD-EnoSeeMONYjxvQk9bSXiChJ58SJTp4OqZShZ66oxprTLNW9m8gc2OfsGGffw9X2R1YX9SjHT0gzBwS57eZcn_murh9F8AAAD__9nQfzg) that involved Ukraine making territorial concessions. Trump suggested that a peace deal would include some _swapping_ of territories with Russia, but [Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ8GOqPF2EAKF39Dl7-9Ejl4STYxNrKXIO7pT0T3BtfOjEbzzdd1vFryFO7_7YKG5zgG3LNHZkwjp21ZOS6IvG5MgTElmg8KowSpBfSihtFZ8seoSmdmRIlNiabutOolNKDLh5GyB1Btc2uwQau7SSkA3ddd21207qeSzNkGfQ01gAZVzU17mVpn4QZu7pwrFKAjjql6Rgr8wNkf8Y2pmuJSevNgXnPR_CvkUMhh3_cq3KaT4vRPJSbvCjlsr2QpYCGHb_QY8us4RMInTpzFhzSLNcU1ZuvFb1bk3a7ig80xEWaRtpzJijQFK6UCKctk3LqT95TbrlBwXyz5zzL-051vI38CAAD__2aNjSA) declared Saturday that his countrymen _will not give their land to occupiers._ A senior White House official said planning for [Friday's summit is still fluid](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0M2OrCAQBeCnwR2mRPzpBYu7cdd3O0uDUHQzg2CgbOPbT_QVZldJJefkO1_P-al98PH1X6-oyKU54lECEmGeKe_rRmlFpG0nHwlz9u70cRYgOg4jb2C22odzlpVVDlFgW6Fqhk6OAlroqreyQz-IQS-iGY0Z0Y6L7N1DQmeX1mjhKq-uNBgbaAA6kLVr-4fprYYFrBusZRLQekq5_k4-0htdONMHc23SWgX1JtoKa_8xMTExHcdRm6VciuvPxHSdTEw3huto-W3hJu3B8svGfeQ66PKjeUl7Nlh40ScTU5WV3Q4fgi_9wCS8Vu3D3Up_muqjxG8AAAD__3g6gHs), and it is possible that Zelenskyy could participate.
## Officer Killed, Gunman Dead Near CDC
A gunman [shot and killed a police officer](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHO3CAQhJ8Gd5zWgDmuoIgUufvTRFFKi4P13UbYWLD2yW8fOa-QdkYazff9_pq-AmVaXz_Cgp7nMq34aRmZsU5c92XjsiDytjOtjLXSfNI6KVCDBCd7mFKgfE6mS35GVKg79P19ME6BhqF7ewOPiNFaN6B2T6uTdcnC3UXonzjYviN_rYHroQcYwNxmbR_RpgBPSPM9JWEAE3Gptz-FVn7jnM9yYL3FsnTZv5m3JvQ3oUahxvCMF8HtVa5aqPHXzyuNTAfK9i6FscqKW6mMSeJS6in3lQ6sjfhsMnAOKwcZw7LtTaixcamn0CMlob_3ypjH8LCuqz5tH8qZmr0LA68lUP53iP_L4uHV3wAAAP__Q4OIPA) when he opened fire near the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention headquarters and the Emory University campus in Atlanta on Friday afternoon. [Officer David Rose](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb8GOkeDsTEpXGyT7m27JbI9YzIrg5GZvCh_v2J_4ZVXV7q65_z5Wr4CF97X32EjL7kuO73PQiLUFmmv7ZC6EcnxEt6FWuP84X3RoK2CWQ2wYODyWUyPPhNpGnvyg7Nm1jCC7Z-eYgx3jMHNIRpyxgyZxhAy2AjoXOrZX2swDzAAWDC3PE73NGGACJgdYmeAkKW229_Kuzwpl0_9pnZLdeuLf4ocZzf-6vSj049wXABXdYUmnAp1-pEwqfN1HpREMdIunJlQrVTbykHVnDlRU0gBlc4zxaAd2LvTeiA94mjNMBm0GBPkvnk83lwKn5PrDKxb4PL_jPzI4LfX_wIAAP__7TuGhw) of the DeKalb County Police Department was killed by 30-year-old Patrick Joseph White of Kennesaw, Georgia. The gunman was found dead of a gunshot wound on the second floor of a CVS Pharmacy building across the street from the CDC campus. Atlanta Police Chief Darin Schierbaum said the shooter [sprayed multiple rounds at law enforcement](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGuozAQBdCvMd1Egw0kKSi2oXvbbokce_yYF4Mtewji71fsL2wzzUhH994_X_OX5cjb92-70ighzRsdNZIIlVnKvmZJK5HkXXgTKoXDydusUfeAD2hx9pbjOXeNHwORJtPQ2N777qHRYN8s4-uJ6PQQ9PAySC_XBvO06I3pQ2s8tg2Pl4aPFlvEHrtbMMPTDd7iC324e686JM-Syu0n8SYLhXimD5WbS2sTx0UkV2V-KT0pPW1nTlWul9LTBSs94eM6T6WnvcLVT-kpWyns3vCTKuUFjoWFgL0HW8F5B3VJSajAsSR4c4zkwaUMaQNaUzlh3_hDpbKc4Oya98tsyujzwTFyHe6qw-_VcvyXUv5r2s-o_wYAAP__2F-PVw) and the health agency, but no one else was reported injured.
## Montana Bar Shooting Suspect Captured
The man suspected in a shooting at a Montana bar that left four people dead [was captured Friday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLvOozAQhZ8GOqLB-AKFi23SZdstkbHHYVa-IDNJlLdfsa_wl0dHOjrf9-exPhwlKs_fLqPlWNeCnzMhM7aV2ysfXDMiHy-mwtgaxS-VVYBQA8zDCGtwlL6r7IONiAKnHu1olJwFTKD63ZrgtQQpjHLSKOk3I_y26biIRRs1-57stQbzCCOAAnmLk168Dg42CNGE0EnAQFzb7W-lwjvG9K1vbDdfc5_sznyc3fSrE_dO3N1xAVzVFRqTT9iJe66FXXHDudfKVJ5DJr87TMPhXmnYWv2UQY1GTE6NcgQtZg0boJ6iDxO6EOSy9c2G40Mp0alNJ-GZHaX_J_hH5t5W_AsAAP__LBaCYw) just a few miles from where the shooting happened. Michael Paul Brown, 45, was taken into custody around 2 p.m. near where authorities had focused their search in the days following the Aug. 1 shooting at The Owl Bar in Anaconda, about 100 miles east of Missoula. A law enforcement presence of 130 personnel stationed on a hill helped [locate the suspect](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMHOnCAUhZ8Gd5grIDoLFk0ad9NN03RpUC5KR8HAdSa-feP_Cv_6nJyc7_v7HJ82bCEuv-yOhnwaI37KhkSYR8rnflDaEek4KUTCnIO_QhwFiJZDzxsYnQ3bNarKGY8oUFZomq5VvQAJbbUaFL59QDf1SjZaNI--m1VnQWmlpfYaq2DuNegbaABaULWX-jFrZ2EC5zvnmAJ0gVKu_6UQaUW_XemNuZ7TXm1mJToKkz-YGJgY7DTfBPWS7piJ4c9vJoY9RbLR8slmXtaUKMSFl7McOBOfz0LJXfyD-OLWE2b-CtsthYmhUMoXk0NwTP5shFLQC62rbNzxuUtFd0zBstuwff2hb0l8G_E_AAD__85ghsI), who was armed. Brown’s niece said her uncle has [struggled with mental illness](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OrDAQhE9jMlDT_M0EDl5CNi_dEDV2M3hlbGQ3g7j9ir3CZiWVVKXv-3pNL3Lehfd_2ljLEqfAZ_YswmmSdGy7xI1Z9kNcEE7JLZcLEwJ2JTzKGiZLzl9TW1i9MCM3Bet66NoHQgNdseputs-5RzJtT8DESEOPDRFZMxAOUDh9r8Gjhhqgg7Zamv5pekswg10Ga1ULbJ3EVH1HF2TlxV_xw6kycSu8XkX2rJp_CkeF43melZnzTXH3Csc7Khy3GIQClXmNUVx4l_nIOxspDe1yJLYKxyJpu5_Oe5f7QbXw3sj53xv5k5uPxp8AAAD__4A4e6E) for years, and she and other family members repeatedly sought help for him.

**Whatever happened to Segways?** The Segway was unveiled in 2001, hailed as a breakthrough in urban transportation that “will be to the car what the car was to the horse and buggy.” [It never became the mobility revolution it promised](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unTAQhJ8GOqO1MX-FizR0N21K5IPXsImxkb0cxNtH5-YRUs1oNBqNvl9fy5elQHH7aQ807NMS8S4BmTEvnK_j5HQg8nkxRcacyT8UFwWqEzAKCYuzFJ5F1854RIVtjUYOnR4VtNDVuxn1a9BT5yZcByenESdA1ctBjlZPA641mc8ajBIkQAe68W0_rb2z8ALnB-cqDeiIU25-J4q8ow9PemNu1nTUwezMZ6naH5WaKzVbn2m1zesqFLEUioXcv2qlZsZ1_8iOIlNBYaMT3oYgkhefsOB22-fbJs_iSOsfdEKJe0cMmAXvlsVtiyjXeaaCTnCq1Hxuj8zvo87GnTeFQKUfKg3bYSl8n-T_Ivs26m8AAAD___0tkRs). Only 23,000 were sold by 2006, hampered by its $5,000 price tag, urban regulations on sidewalk and roadway use, and its weight—it was very awkward to carry upstairs or into buildings. Bad publicity hit the product after President George W. Bush took a spill off his Segway in Kennebunkport, Maine. A bigger blow came in 2010 when owner Jimi Heselden was killed after riding his Segway over a cliff. The original consumer Segway was discontinued in 2020.

Today, Segways are still valuable for specific uses, including law enforcement, sightseeing tours, and factory work—but not to replace the car. _Did you ever own or ride a Segway? Tell us about it by replying to this email._

Putin that involved Ukraine making territorial concessions. Trump suggested that a peace deal would include some swapping of territories with Russia, but declared Saturday that his countrymen will not give their land to occupiers. A senior White House official said planning for , and it is possible that Zelenskyy could participate. Officer Killed, Gunman Dead Near CDC A gunman when he opened fire near the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention headquarters and the Emory University campus in Atlanta on Friday afternoon. of the DeKalb County Police Department was killed by 30-year-old Patrick Joseph White of Kennesaw, Georgia. The gunman was found dead of a gunshot wound on the second floor of a CVS Pharmacy building across the street from the CDC campus. Atlanta Police Chief Darin Schierbaum said the shooter and the health agency, but no one else was reported injured. Montana Bar Shooting Suspect Captured The man suspected in a shooting at a Montana bar that left four people dead just a few miles from where the shooting happened. Michael Paul Brown, 45, was taken into custody around 2 p.m. near where authorities had focused their search in the days following the Aug. 1 shooting at The Owl Bar in Anaconda, about 100 miles east of Missoula. A law enforcement presence of 130 personnel stationed on a hill helped , who was armed. Brown’s niece said her uncle has for years, and she and other family members repeatedly sought help for him. Over 187,000 people have tried it - before it’s gone, you need to see this. | Whatever happened to Segways? The Segway was unveiled in 2001, hailed as a breakthrough in urban transportation that “will be to the car what the car was to the horse and buggy.” . Only 23,000 were sold by 2006, hampered by its $5,000 price tag, urban regulations on sidewalk and roadway use, and its weight—it was very awkward to carry upstairs or into buildings. Bad publicity hit the product after President George W. Bush took a spill off his Segway in Kennebunkport, Maine. A bigger blow came in 2010 when owner Jimi Heselden was killed after riding his Segway over a cliff. The original consumer Segway was discontinued in 2020. Today, Segways are still valuable for specific uses, including law enforcement, sightseeing tours, and factory work—but not to replace the car. Did you ever own or ride a Segway? ## Texas Judge Blocks Beto's 'Nonprofit' Scheme
A Tarrant County judge ruled against the nonprofit Powered by People on Friday, [siding with Attorney General Ken Paxton](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOszAMB_CngQ3kmISGIcO3sPVbb0QhMZBrIFVwS_v2J3qPcJslS_b_9_-6DlcbYtjm_3Ylw68pDRsdeyRmysP3w880xuRu-0iccnI34n1JcUBAVYGuBAzehvgeZOnNCL4TJRlxUVJj03aiXMxIE0kkBx0qqdsJSIIdpXIKEZsOymDOY6AFCAECde3IagmudeCsbPBSSCAfOOWaF2J62X2K7_SkXLu0ltEszPe9aP4V2BfYH8dRv-2S0rktsD85BfY2c3CRzvGjqn5Z1emqUk6PfKNqemw-bHMFQqlGS2jrhddYZuPvR4gx7O0ZZl5tiJ_f_LfGngZ_AgAA__96_oBz), who alleged the group was illegally aiding Democratic lawmakers fleeing to block GOP redistricting legislation. Judge Megan Fahey issued a temporary restraining order against the nonprofit founded by former Congressman and presidential candidate Beto O’Rourke, citing “unlawful fundraising practices” and violations of Texas law. Fahey's order prevents O'Rourke or his group from continuing to fundraise or provide financial support to the fleeing Texas Democrats. You can read the full order [here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGypCAQQE-jGRYgOhgQbGI2m25oATbKiuJCO87cfou5wk-7q1-913-e01P74I_lt95B4dvF6YA7B0CENP295gVMiHbLBjCmaDfAvMYwcco7QiVhdJq1D59J1LMydB5YDYo9OiF52w-sXtXgnOTaPRgzvRVG0MG4Tnai7SQ1xrLaqwKjklHGKOOysaCloLa31GrR8kclKMweY2pwBYS3zi584gtSY-NeB7Uinrlqf1V8rPh433ezvfVRlhUfS03Fx-8ZOWPw6G0ZfNPImeAFB2ZS8siS4nUSl-JOruyPhbjrmDPBSPJ1njEh-XfFdO3EJNAbpMKpk5rP24fgc19Ml1378BXDn73zpfj_AAAA__8jl42U).
## Tax-Free Weekend Continues Until Midnight Sunday
Texans are expected to save around [$130 million](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2y4yAQhE8jZbiYQQYUEGyi7G26oQrDYLEPGRfM88_tt-QrbNzVXd_Xf77WL59Lvl1_-50cv1Jdb_TshZiprX9_4pUupYbvfiGurYZv4r7VsqLEs5BWgFyjz-W9TmN0FxlnGMmBOU8WlZ5h3JwyqC3oOanZWKWMAilRkoE0aUAdxuyOMWlBAkhAewrk7SSDDjL4SaEZJkkxc20n3ojp5Xsq7_qgdgp1H4vbmO99UL8GXAZcPjicd-pHPOBy-Ay4fIoi-T2XTF3Q606BKQquovsHCVBqF_Gn5dtVsH-J1IjEVkuO_j3g4hvnUGidk9TpbK2gGaOYkgVxiR5EJBMTGG8k-tPGexmbi_dnLiV3fShcd5_Lh5j_7-eHw38BAAD__30tkPU) this weekend as most items under $100 are exempt from local and state sales tax until midnight Sunday. The holiday, a Texas tradition since 1999, allows Texans to purchase a wide range of items tax-free, including most clothing, footwear, diapers, school supplies, and backpacks priced at less than $100. Consumers can also use layaway to benefit from the holiday, as items purchased with the method are tax-free so long as they are under $100. If a retailer mistakenly charges sales tax, Texans can request a refund via the comptroller's [website](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OwyAQhJ_G7mIBdjAuKK5xl2uvRMCubS7rEMHm7-1PyStcNVOMvpG-n5M7-UTpsn77HS0_l-wu-KiEzFjc7w1WDJTjuQbkXHI8I9ctk1NCHQ_CHKRw4BO93NCCDQIm2aKV43EwqteTbDe7wAQYQGodhhGWoCcDIxqPsZcjILbJvmHCSCGlkMp0Eb0ZRNRRRD_0amwGgZA4l443ZHz6utAr37F0Me8t2Y35Wpv-q1Fzo-aY9yuXTISl-4y7Nd8bNbN_Ym3UXD19suByu8C7tcXC9ZGIUtXvs3X3iT5s_p-Ru1V_AQAA__-6wXdF). The holiday will continue until Sunday at midnight. You can find a full list of eligible items [here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OgzAQBOCnMV2QvRBjChfX0OXaK5GxF_BliZG9-Xv7E3mFK0cazSfNz2W8uEjxtny7DS2_5jTe8FkImTGPv_ew4ETJX8uEnHLyV-SyJhpBwvkkzUnJMbhI77Gtgp1k6FWFVnXn1kCje1WtNpwbN3kH_dx3nZMzgp61NjNoANOBrKI9xqRRUimpwNQenWml11561zbQiVZiiJxyzSsyvlyZ6Z0emGuftorsyrwX0XwJGAQMPm0750SEuf6U6yU9BAzsXlgEDPt9ougdx3Q7Ym9ObS8FDFW2YX9Golj0QS6bi_QR-H-_PCz8BQAA___1EXch).
## Several Texas Lakes Named in Bassmaster Top 100 List
Several Texas lakes earned spots in both national and Central Division rankings on the annual [Top 100 Bass Lakes of America](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGyozAMRb8GOmdk4xgoKLahe9tuyQhbBG8EZmyR9_L3O-QXtlOhe-aeuX--pi-MHPfHb9xokJ8lTTt9FyYRytPfMzxo5uSfZSZJOfknSVkTTwbMXUGnNEwBI78nW4dhhtDrmgbd3m1nGtfreh1m67ALjcF721jvQt-DcRb9soAOre_rOFww6DRoDdp0N0_YWfDOg0fbmLayQCFKyjdZSegHy8Lv9KJ882mreVhFjlI1vyozVmbkc3nG_VPqMrl-KjOWI2UplRnTKSGlfJ2SDvU496IKvSgjqw9bMT6pqB03CiruCvf9RFYzlrJhEcrqymkAxbFIZUbMEj3T1FkHSG2joEFS965f1OwIlJuRWoseiZrbKhvXeQjHd2SOxV1yjw0jf1zk_xZ4DeZfAAAA___dBpzM) list, which highlights top reservoirs nationwide and by region. Over 500 lakes were evaluated based on a combination of tournament data, fishery reports from state wildlife agencies, and feedback from thousands of anglers across the country. The Longhorn State landed nine total lakes on the list, including two ranked in the top 10 nationally: Lakes O.H. Ivie and Fork, at Nos. 2 and 3, respectively. Outside the top 10, Texas had seven of the top 25 Central Division lakes. Sam Rayburn was ranked No. 4, followed by Toledo Bend at No. 6, J.B. Thomas at No.9, Lake O’ the Pines at No. 16, Bois d’ Arc at No. 18, Caddo at No. 19, and Conroe at No. 22. You can see the full list [here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFygzAMhp8GNnOyAQODhy5s6dqRE7YIbkycs9WQvH2P9K5D167SL933_R-n6YQ--Ov5HTcy_FjidKU9B2KmNH1-uTPNIdpLnoljivZCnNcYJgWqFdALCZNDH55TUzozgxtkSUZ2bdOrWg-yXE3XzhrbRS9OtnpoBuprWYPWLTSDhaUrvTmeQS9BSpCqryxh34DVFiw2teqKBsh5jqnilZgemJfwjHdKlY1bGczKfMtF_VaosVDjvu_VjDlvmPknUqhxpszimIqAF8qFGg_LY_GbFInuhCELXkm89CSA-HMo_FXgRslbLNRYJuNuuw_BZ31Qnjf04QXF_6vybtR3AAAA___tTIjG).

On this day in 1935, the was established by the Texas Legislature. Newly elected Governor James Allred had campaigned on a platform of providing stronger law enforcement in the state. Lizzie McGuire, aka Hilary Duff, was spotted at Austin's acclaimed La Barbecue this week this week. See photos , and read more about it in Et Cetera. Learn about these 11 weird little hacks Costco shoppers should know from today's sponsor, . Abilene 🌤️ 101/78° | Amarillo 🌩️ 92/70° | Austin 🌤️ 97/75° | Brownsville 🌤️ 95/76° | Corpus Christi 🌤️ 94/77° | DFW 🌤️ 97/78° | El Paso 🌩️ 102/78° | Houston ⛅ 93/77° | Laredo ⛅ 102/78° | Lubbock ☁️ 99/76° | Midland ⛅ 101/76° | San Antonio 🌤️ 98/76° | Tyler 🌦️ 94/74° | Waco 🌦️ 96/75° Don’t feel like reading the national edition of The Flyover? Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | - | Texas Judge Blocks Beto's 'Nonprofit' Scheme A Tarrant County judge ruled against the nonprofit Powered by People on Friday, , who alleged the group was illegally aiding Democratic lawmakers fleeing to block GOP redistricting legislation. Judge Megan Fahey issued a temporary restraining order against the nonprofit founded by former Congressman and presidential candidate Beto O’Rourke, citing “unlawful fundraising practices” and violations of Texas law. Fahey's order prevents O'Rourke or his group from continuing to fundraise or provide financial support to the fleeing Texas Democrats. You can read the full order . Tax-Free Weekend Continues Until Midnight Sunday Texans are expected to save around this weekend as most items under $100 are exempt from local and state sales tax until midnight Sunday. The holiday, a Texas tradition since 1999, allows Texans to purchase a wide range of items tax-free, including most clothing, footwear, diapers, school supplies, and backpacks priced at less than $100. Consumers can also use layaway to benefit from the holiday, as items purchased with the method are tax-free so long as they are under $100. If a retailer mistakenly charges sales tax, Texans can request a refund via the comptroller's . The holiday will continue until Sunday at midnight. You can find a full list of eligible items . Several Texas Lakes Named in Bassmaster Top 100 List Several Texas lakes earned spots in both national and Central Division rankings on the annual list, which highlights top reservoirs nationwide and by region. Over 500 lakes were evaluated based on a combination of tournament data, fishery reports from state wildlife agencies, and feedback from thousands of anglers across the country. The Longhorn State landed nine total lakes on the list, including two ranked in the top 10 nationally: Lakes O.H. Ivie and Fork, at Nos. 2 and 3, respectively. Outside the top 10, Texas had seven of the top 25 Central Division lakes. Sam Rayburn was ranked No. 4, followed by Toledo Bend at No. 6, J.B. Thomas at No.9, Lake O’ the Pines at No. 16, Bois d’ Arc at No. 18, Caddo at No. 19, and Conroe at No. 22. You can see the full list . | Flying together with our sponsor Do you shop at Costco? Check out these additional ways to save money while shopping from today's sponsor, If you spot an asterisk on a price tag, grab it—those items won’t be restocked. Skip the coupon clipping: the Costco Savings Booklet automatically applies discounts at checkout. And learn the secret of price endings — .79, .49, or .89 often mean manufacturer deals, while .88 or .00 could be manager markdowns or clearance items. body:

President Trump is back, and under his leadership, the border wall construction is restarting in the Rio Grande Valley.

_And this is only the beginning._
**Thanks to the $46 BILLION secured through President Trump’s “One Big Beautiful Bill,” the Wall is going up faster, bigger, and stronger than ever before.**

name: Jared Hudson
subject: The verse that has guided my life of service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hudson for Alabama
body:
[https://secure.winred.com/hudson-for-alabama/james-218-endorsement-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250806_James218_jm&utm_term=lrm-active]

Friend,

There’s a verse that has shaped my life more than most:

[https://secure.winred.com/hudson-for-alabama/james-218-endorsement-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250806_James218_jm&utm_term=lrm-active]

It reminds us that true faith in Jesus Christ is not silent or passive
- it moves, it serves, and most importantly, it _acts_.

I gave my life to Christ at 6 years old, and have done my best to live
out a faith where my actions match my words.

That’s why I became a Navy SEAL, why I’ve led rescue missions
against child trafficking, and that’s why I’m stepping forward now
to run for the U.S. Senate. CAN I COUNT ON YOUR SUPPORT TODAY TO HELP
BRING ACTION POWERED BY FAITH TO WASHINGTON?
[https://secure.winred.com/hudson-for-alabama/james-218-endorsement-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250806_James218_jm&utm_term=lrm-active]

Here in Alabama, everyone is a Christian during the political season.
But too many – especially in Washington – are Christians in word
only.

When it comes time to act, we see those words for what they are:_
symbolism without substance._

I’m not interested in being another say-anything, do-nothing
politician. I’m running to live out my faith by what I do.

AS A SENATOR, I WILL FIGHT FOR OUR VALUES, PROTECT FAMILIES, DEFEND
OUR GOD-GIVEN RIGHTS, AND BRING ACCOUNTABILITY BACK TO A GOVERNMENT
THAT’S LOST ITS WAY.

James 2:18 isn’t just a verse, it’s a guiding principle for how to
live my life. And when elected, it’ll be my guide in the Senate.

IF YOU’RE READY TO JOIN MY MISSION TO FIGHT FOR OUR VALUES, PLEASE
HELP POWER MY CAMPAIGN BY GIVING YOUR OFFICIAL ENDORSEMENT AND
DONATING TODAY.
[https://secure.winred.com/hudson-for-alabama/james-218-endorsement-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250806_James218_jm&utm_term=lrm-active]

POWER MY MISSION
[https://secure.winred.com/hudson-for-alabama/james-218-endorsement-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250806_James218_jm&utm_term=lrm-active]

I believe this campaign is part of God’s calling on my life, a
mission to serve and fight for what’s right. And I’m inviting you
to be part of it.

In Christ,

Jared Hudson

Candidate for U.S. Senate

A MESSAGE FROM JARED HUDSON:

[https://secure.winred.com/hudson-for-alabama/james-218-endorsement-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250806_James218_jm&utm_term=lrm-active]

It’s Jared Hudson.

I’m running for U.S. Senate in Alabama, and I wanted to take a
moment to introduce myself.

I HOPE THAT BY THE TIME YOU FINISH READING THIS MESSAGE, YOU’LL
CONSIDER STANDING WITH ME IN THIS FIGHT BY MAKING A DONATION OF ANY
AMOUNT.
[https://secure.winred.com/hudson-for-alabama/james-218-endorsement-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250806_James218_jm&utm_term=lrm-active]

I’m a former Navy SEAL Sniper, law enforcement officer, business
owner, husband, father, and follower of Christ.

I’ve deployed in support of the Global War on Terror, and I’ve led
the charge in combatting human trafficking.

I’ve been to some of the darkest corners of the world, looked evil
in the eye, and seen how faith, courage, and conviction can overcome
anything.

Now, I’m entering a new battlefield: I’M RUNNING FOR U.S. SENATE
TO STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP AND TO BE THE TIP OF THE SPEAR THAT’LL
DEFEND OUR CHRISTIAN VALUES, PROTECT THE PRINCIPLES WE HOLD DEAR, AND
END THE WOKE AGENDA.

If you believe in God, country, the Constitution, and standing with
President Trump, I need your support on this mission.

WILL YOU JOIN ME IN THIS FIGHT FOR OUR COUNTRY’S FUTURE BY PITCHING
IN A DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT TODAY?
[https://secure.winred.com/hudson-for-alabama/james-218-endorsement-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250806_James218_jm&utm_term=lrm-active]

I’m not a politician, I’m a warrior. And with your help, I’ll
fight every day in Washington to put America - _and you_ - first.

Thank you,

Jared Hudson

Paid for by Hudson for Alabama

Hudson for Alabama – PO Box 100 Gardendale, AL 35071

_Jared Hudson is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job
titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the
Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense._

AS A SENATOR, I WILL FIGHT FOR OUR VALUES, PROTECT FAMILIES, DEFEND OUR GOD-GIVEN RIGHTS, AND BRING ACCOUNTABILITY BACK TO A GOVERNMENT THAT’S LOST ITS WAY. James 2:18 isn’t just a verse, it’s a guiding principle for how to live my life. And when elected, it’ll be my guide in the Senate. IF YOU’RE READY TO JOIN MY MISSION TO FIGHT FOR OUR VALUES, PLEASE HELP POWER MY CAMPAIGN BY GIVING YOUR OFFICIAL ENDORSEMENT AND DONATING TODAY. [] POWER MY MISSION [] I believe this campaign is part of God’s calling on my life, a mission to serve and fight for what’s right. And I’m inviting you to be part of it. In Christ, Jared Hudson Candidate for U.S. Senate A MESSAGE FROM JARED HUDSON: [] It’s Jared Hudson. I’m running for U.S. Senate in Alabama, and I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself. I HOPE THAT BY THE TIME YOU FINISH READING THIS MESSAGE, YOU’LL CONSIDER STANDING WITH ME IN THIS FIGHT BY MAKING A DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT. [] I’m a former Navy SEAL Sniper, law enforcement officer, business owner, husband, father, and follower of Christ. I’ve deployed in support of the Global War on Terror, and I’ve led the charge in combatting human trafficking. I’ve been to some of the darkest corners of the world, looked evil in the eye, and seen how faith, courage, and conviction can overcome anything. Now, I’m entering a new battlefield: I’M RUNNING FOR U.S. SENATE TO STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP AND TO BE THE TIP OF THE SPEAR THAT’LL DEFEND OUR CHRISTIAN VALUES, PROTECT THE PRINCIPLES WE HOLD DEAR, AND END THE WOKE AGENDA. If you believe in God, country, the Constitution, and standing with President Trump, I need your support on this mission. WILL YOU JOIN ME IN THIS FIGHT FOR OUR COUNTRY’S FUTURE BY PITCHING IN A DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT TODAY? [] I’m not a politician, I’m a warrior. And with your help, I’ll fight every day in Washington to put America - and you - first. Thank you, Jared Hudson Paid for by Hudson for Alabama Hudson for Alabama – PO Box 100 Gardendale, AL 35071 Jared Hudson is a former Navy SEAL. body:
I’m no easy target.
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbc560684-6cf2-4c4f-9454-fbcb892c8b4f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, this is Mallory McMorrow. Mike Rogers, the leading Michigan Republican candidate for Senate, is already attacking me by name. He said, _“McMorrow is an easy target.”**Really?**_ Am I an easy target because I flipped a red district blue? Am I an easy target because I’m building a broad coalition across the state in support of a better vision for Michigan? Am I an easy target because I represent a new generation of leadership that people are desperately craving? Because I’m not the same old politician that Rogers is used to? **Listen, I don’t care about what Mike Rogers says about me. I hope it helped him sleep well last night. I hope he brought in a few dollars. He’s just another talking head for the Trump agenda.** [If you care about fighting Trump’s extreme agenda and sending a new kind of leader to the Senate, will you split a donation between Blue Amp Action and my campaign right now? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2aef7b52-9113-4d60-be21-b0624a014bf6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This isn’t my first rodeo as a punching bag for the GOP. In my first campaign in 2018, they sent out a mailer with a picture of me drinking a margarita by a pool, with a curling iron plastered across the width of it that said, “Vote No On Mallory McMorrow.” You know what we did in response? We won. This is just the beginning of the Republican attacks against me. The GOP clearly views me as a threat — and it’s not surprising to see why. Every time they’ve attacked me, they’ve only raised my profile — and we’ve responded by organizing, fighting back, and winning. Every. Single. Time. But clearly they still think this works. Let’s show ‘em they’re wrong. Again. [Will you stand with me by splitting a contribution between my campaign for Senate and Blue Amp Action today? To beat the GOP, we’ll need a strong grassroots team to withstand the attacks. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdb8990e1-cce1-465c-bfd1-482ab6c42af5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te7b1eef2-a270-4461-8647-5fc128d86ffe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Shapiro sides with the wrong team
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6ff8afacfc&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[How Shapiro’s dangerous legal battle could end his political career](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=92e8a9d962&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Beth Ann Rosica_
Looking back on a failed political career, it is often difficult to pinpoint the exact instant when everything fell apart. But the moment Josh Shapiro joined a[ lawsuit](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f382525a4d&e=b7b3eddce2) to reinstate sex change procedures for children may be judged by history as his final swan dive. Last week, the Governor of Pennsylvania, in his official capacity, aligned with fifteen Democratic or Democratic-leaning states and the District of Columbia in an attempt to block the Trump administration’s order to end gender-affirming medical interventions for minors. He is the only Governor to sign on to the suit — the other states are represented by their Attorneys General. The lawsuit alleges that “the Trump administration has sought to deny their [transgender] very existence, banish transgender residents from the public square, and refuse them medically necessary healthcare through unlawful Executive Orders (EOs) and a raft of federal agency actions implementing those EOs.” **Why It Matters.** Shapiro likes to pretend he’s a moderate, but make no mistake: he is a hard-core progressive — and joining this lawsuit proves it. For example, the vast[ majority](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a503332c50&e=b7b3eddce2) of Americans believe that men should not be allowed to compete in women’s sports. On this issue, Shapiro has waffled. He recently described supporters of Pennsylvania[ Senate Bill 9](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=aa69d1e15d&e=b7b3eddce2), aimed at protecting girls’ and women’s sports, as “[extremists](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2398f529f0&e=b7b3eddce2),” but then declined to comment on whether he would sign the bill if it reached his desk. He made the unfathomable statement that he had not specifically read the bill. While Shapiro may have successfully dodged the issue of boys in girls’ sports for the time being, his stance on sex transition interventions for children is now well-documented.
**[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=52ba2bf32e&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[$164K for a Chief Experience Officer? Chester County finds new ways to spend your money](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=159f4f4edc&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Guy Ciarrocchi_
Chester County government just hired a newly created CXO — “Chief Experience Officer.” Just like they have at Disney, or Penn Medicine, or Amazon. Because, after all, shouldn’t our county government spend our tax dollars to create yet another C-suite executive; just like multi-billion dollar corporations? Didn’t everyone in Chester County wake up this week and think to themselves: “The one thing that’s missing from County government is a chief experience officer?!”

The local newspaper — usually very sympathetic to Democrats — noted that it’s “a position rarely seen in government.” Jealous, Montco?

**Why It Matters**. So far, 2025 has been the “breakout year” for Chesco’s Democrat Commissioners. First, they raised property taxes by 13.4 percent — for “large ticket items,” we were told. Well, this is apparently one of those “large ticket items.” (Again, Roe was a “no” vote. Not wanting to raise taxes after years of citizens battling inflation; even in “affluent” Chesco, many homeowners can’t keep up.)

But raising taxes and creating new C-suite positions isn’t all that they’ve been doing at the courthouse. They increased spending by $70 million — that’s a 41 percent increase in the discretionary part of the county budget. They’re spending new property taxes, borrowing $10 million from county savings; plus $17 million in “unused” Covid money. (It’s 2025. If the County hasn’t spent Covid money by now, maybe refund it to us, the taxpayers?)

Making government bigger. Adding to the bureaucracy. Raising taxes. And borrowing money. Suburban Democrats: “It’s what they do.”
[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9aee8b8fb6&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Restoring economic freedom requires a new Fed strategy](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ab7eb32498&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[More than drugs — the other tragedy playing out in Kensington](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4efe8c5fb0&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Houlahan’s funding freeze alarm doesn’t add up](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7dff1ddab8&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[The case for keeping Pennsylvania’s mail ballot date requirement](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9c1f64b968&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Grace Kelly and the Irish connection](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a58278cfd2&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[From cosmopolitans to cringe — how wokeness poisoned Sex and the City](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a0bb79c3c8&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Actual fascism, oligarchy, and the threat to democracy](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7b006e6790&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **4\. What we're reading**
Pennsylvania’s state budget was due on June 30. If you’re wondering why it’s late again this year, well, you’re not the only one. But as our friends at the [_Pittsburgh Post-Gazette_ noted last week](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1c3abfa836&e=b7b3eddce2), it’s not the first time the Commonwealth has had this problem. "No state is as late as often and as predictably as the Keystone State, with our state politicians unable or unwilling to meet their constitutional obligation.”

The continual inability — or unwillingness — of our governor and legislature to do their jobs is a clear signal that our state government is dysfunctional and in need of reform. The PPG editors suggest a move to biennial budgeting — a solid idea. But they also note that other reforms are necessary. “Pennsylvania’s budgeting shenanigans are an annual embarrassment and, for some people and organizations, an annual crisis.”

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox. | | 1. By Beth Ann Rosica Looking back on a failed political career, it is often difficult to pinpoint the exact instant when everything fell apart. But the moment Josh Shapiro joined a to reinstate sex change procedures for children may be judged by history as his final swan dive. Last week, the Governor of Pennsylvania, in his official capacity, aligned with fifteen Democratic or Democratic-leaning states and the District of Columbia in an attempt to block the Trump administration’s order to end gender-affirming medical interventions for minors. He is the only Governor to sign on to the suit — the other states are represented by their Attorneys General. The lawsuit alleges that “the Trump administration has sought to deny their [transgender] very existence, banish transgender residents from the public square, and refuse them medically necessary healthcare through unlawful Executive Orders (EOs) and a raft of federal agency actions implementing those EOs.” Why It Matters. Shapiro likes to pretend he’s a moderate, but make no mistake: he is a hard-core progressive — and joining this lawsuit proves it. For example, the vast of Americans believe that men should not be allowed to compete in women’s sports. On this issue, Shapiro has waffled. He recently described supporters of Pennsylvania, aimed at protecting girls’ and women’s sports, as “,” but then declined to comment on whether he would sign the bill if it reached his desk. He made the unfathomable statement that he had not specifically read the bill. The _**Rise Up Women!**_ **Master Your Mind and Mouth: Step Into Your Destiny** Summit goes live tomorrow, and I don't want you to miss it!
I'll be speaking alongside an incredible group of leaders to show you how your inner dialogue and daily words are shaping your reality, and how to shift them for good. 🩷
Whether you're stuck in fear, overwhelm, or just ready for more, this free 5-day summit will help you step into your next level.
**We start on August 11th at 8AM PT. Grab your seat now:

[ CLICK HERE TO REGISTER](https://substack.com/redirect/64f86f33-be83-4c51-8731-dc2d01ba05b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I didn’t plan on this
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
All I wanted to do was keep serving my country, the same way I have since I was sworn in to the U.S. Navy.
#

Team, when Gabby and I first agreed that I would run for Senate back in 2019, we knew things would change. We know more than most how public service can change your life.
But I’ve got to tell you, I never intended for things to end up like this. All I wanted to do was keep serving my country, the same way I have since I was sworn in to the U.S. Navy.
I know that service comes with risk, sure. But I didn’t set out to be called a traitor by the richest guy in the world, or to have one of Trump’s advisors calling for my execution.
Now, I don’t want you to worry about me. And after everything I’ve been through, things like this don’t intimidate me all that much.
I do worry that they will intimidate others, though — people just beginning to get involved. People thinking about joining a peaceful demonstration, or speaking out at a local town hall. I worry that Trump and his cronies are trying to scare people out of resisting him, and that it might be working.
But then I look back at this team. You’ve been with me a long time, and you haven’t backed down. Your support means the world to me, but it also gives me a lot of hope that enough people will stand up, push back, and make sure these guys don’t stay in power.
I’m ready to fight like hell to save our democracy. If you’re with me, please:
[**Make a donation so we'll have the resources we need to defeat MAGA Republicans up and down the ballot next year.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-aug25.yz3v7m&refcode=em250810-1-f&t=1&akid=6145%2E6688874%2ExxIbe9)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1396?c0=mek-em-aug25.jogkAL&refcode=em250810-1-f&t=20&akid=6145%2E6688874%2ExxIbe9)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1397?c0=mek-em-aug25.SM4oFe&refcode=em250810-1-f&t=21&akid=6145%2E6688874%2ExxIbe9)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1390?c0=mek-em-aug25.jVfsWD&refcode=em250810-1-f&t=22&akid=6145%2E6688874%2ExxIbe9)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1391?c0=mek-em-aug25.Ryh6RB&refcode=em250810-1-f&t=23&akid=6145%2E6688874%2ExxIbe9)**
---

| | **[Donate $250](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1392?c0=mek-em-aug25.BjYQbc&refcode=em250810-1-f&t=24&akid=6145%2E6688874%2ExxIbe9)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1395?c0=mek-em-aug25.uVY-_q&refcode=em250810-1-f&t=25&akid=6145%2E6688874%2ExxIbe9)**

****
Thanks so much,
Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=26&akid=6145%2E6688874%2ExxIbe9).

name: Office of the RNC Chairman
subject: This is getting sad!

**_Trump’s emotional warning left us on the verge of tears._** [**Will you take two minutes to read?**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1821447/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS8xNzc2LXByb2plY3QtcGFjL3RydW1wZW1vdGlvbmFsYmlnbmFtZXMtZW1vdGlvbmFsc3RhdGVtZW50ZW0tZW0tb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTA/LbmNsZXpCU3k2MQ/qP3JlY3VycmluZz10cnVlJmFtdHBvc2l0aW9uPTEmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjExOTJfd3Ix/gaJieJA/scq3cf5ff26) President Trump: “Our public schools have been taken over by the Radical Left maniacs!... We have an education system that teaches our children to be ashamed of themselves — in many cases, to hate our country An education system flushed with cash which leaves our young and beautiful students deprived of all knowledge." And, Patriot,**** we know who's behind the **EXTREME** radical leftist takeover of our schools. His name is **GEORGE SOROS!** The TOTAL leftist infiltration of our schools was a calculated **ATTACK** to destroy America from within! Soros and others like him infiltrated our schools from the bottom up by flooding dark money cash into the campaigns of **RADICAL** leftist school board members. _**And now, they have TOTAL control..**_ **> > Soros destroyed our education standards, to turn an entire generation of students into “useful idiots...” ** **> > Then came the indoctrination... The Soros regime pushed RADICAL leftist insanity on students: Critical Race Theory & Transgender Insanity & and Anti-American hatred.** **> > FAKE RINO Republicans have sided with Democrats and IGNORED the crisis unfolding in front of them, refusing to lift a finger.** But we have the **OFFICIAL** plan to strike back. [**If you still support President Trump, the least you could do is spare a moment to learn how we can SAVE OUR SCHOOLS!**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1821447/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS8xNzc2LXByb2plY3QtcGFjL3RydW1wZW1vdGlvbmFsYmlnbmFtZXMtZW1vdGlvbmFsc3RhdGVtZW50ZW0tZW0tb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTA/LbmNsZXpCU3k2MQ/qP3JlY3VycmluZz10cnVlJmFtdHBvc2l0aW9uPTEmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjExOTJfd3Ix/gaJieJA/scq3cf5ff26)

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Completing the voter verification process
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
I’m making a personal request...
| **__A Personal Request from the House GOP Leadership Chair, Rep. Elise Stefanik_ _**
---
Peter,
---
President Trump has expanded our Party’s electoral coalition like never before.
---
**We now have far more voters than the Democrats – but that total includes _MILLIONS_ of “less engaged” voters who don’t always turn out when President Trump isn’t on the ballot.**
---
Our path to victory in the midterms is simple: If every “likely” Republican voter shows up to cast a ballot, we’ll win in a landslide.
---
_But if we get complacent and our turnout dips, we’ll _LOSE_ our House Majority to radical, Far Left Democrats!_
---
**Given the new dynamics of our electoral coalition, the GOP’s official 2025 Voter Verification project has never been more critical.**
---
We need to know exactly who we can count on to show up and cast their ballot for Republicans in the midterms.
---
You see, every Republican voter we confirm as “VERIFIED” for the midterms is one less voter we need to spend time and money targeting between now and Election Day.
---
_That way, we can prioritize spending our limited financial resources to target the millions of less engaged “likely” Republican voters and focus on getting them to the polls._
---
**As House GOP Leadership Chair, it’s my duty to ensure our existing GOP voter file is _100% VERIFIED_ before the end of the year. **
---
And when I say “100% verified,” any old response isn’t enough...
---
I need to make sure that __every_ _single__ Republican voter we have on file has submitted a complete, up-to-date Voter Verification survey measuring their voter intensity and confirming their intention to vote for Republicans in the midterms.
---
That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter...
---
[**Please complete our survey to ensure that YOUR voter profile is fully verified and confirm that you’re one of the most engaged Republicans voters who we can count on to show up and vote in the midterms.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4d268bd5e55e48738914b62374558236&_e=aOrjB8StAOEkeeJHtd_xA6GsnmY1DLrsd7vo1ISiJSu_vgMLeT90tj1BK00HAJ2vaPlPwC06g75B5-oO09O_0hS0VyEAUDgGUSpU3V_nJ_V7UEBAhoGvI8mnsc0L_L6IHWRssBLIVSpm0cIbNH31fT21N3M8kY1jlSgeCGohoIGcp7jwvTjk4O2Kvc0bN7GfLS9WpTq4mbyPpSJ3SeJrEFI7rfoNFuHsLwo3BXvCQju2NVztJXlWvQM3-MWTFv3JTbQyCPmTqr8wus-5rVG7e7rmQEOsAgKCWJ4gEDBx1lGjszFxBd3yphI-09_621in-XARYFvv9WZvlL5vbw6TYceJ1PLWNkZ2PFLWJHFEBqyIJ_M61TeFT7jIkszsrgOAw77i-lr_1iAU9lCRaa6WrAEt3H5Hwp1pfP6aKdprrjQ8fzhOhRvDXwjPYIUmR2_ws4ScD5kOIZUV5ezg_V-a1Td2PASxQHzG4mVIAaEZZk8R4OQl2xc08RgkR0s3RinT3_1fi_pqWPpedhAFls4uIygNBUCYk7hJRiKmafDKhN9kdLncRY-vaqjxuIsfC2Tgnbz6IRmNxn4rVwc05r6xQHSTcToRjfbgqXZlSromEsh-wht01x34x9XJgF-ioTro)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Zohran Mamdani
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Voters are telling us that they’re ready for a party that fights for working families boldly and unapologetically.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2615%2E4032634%2Ech9kDI)
---
I want to talk a bit about Zohran Mamdani’s inspiring 12-point victory, and why he’s got the billionaire class running scared. How did Zohran pull off his win? Simple: He campaigned relentlessly on lowering costs for families. He built a grassroots movement so strong that millions of dollars in attack ads couldn’t touch him. On primary election night, Andrew Cuomo conceded. The people picked Mamdani, but it turns out there are some billionaires and Wall Street CEOs who can’t stand the idea of a mayor who wants them to pay their fair share to create a city that everyone can afford. So the billionaires are dumping millions and millions of dollars into the race, backing either of two deeply flawed candidates: Cuomo and incumbent Mayor Eric Adams. **Maybe we should be asking ourselves why these Wall Street executives are pouring in millions of dollars to stop Mamdani, the affordability candidate.** Cuomo and Adams are tripping over themselves to haul in millions of campaign dollars from billionaire donors. Adams raised $1 million in a single night from donors with ties to big law firms, commercial brokerages, and big real estate developers who could lose their iron-fisted grip on New York in a Mamdani administration. Hedge fund manager Bill Ackman held private auditions for his support, inviting Adams and Cuomo to back-to-back meetings to tap dance for the “hundreds of millions of dollars” he has said he will spend to keep Mamdani out of office. Let’s be clear: In a democracy, billionaires should not be able to buy our elections and control our politicians. It was corruption when Elon Musk poured millions into Donald Trump’s campaign, and it’s bad for our democracy that Cuomo and Adams are bending the knee to billionaires now. Elected officials should work for their constituents, not use their government offices to hand out favors to a well-connected few. **New York voters spoke clearly in the primary election. They’re telling us they’re ready for a party that fights boldly and unapologetically for working families. It’s not just the right thing to do, it’s also a winning strategy. And Democrats must be ready to deliver.** You don’t have to look very hard to see just how out of touch Adams and Cuomo have become with working people. Adams withdrew from the primary early on, and Cuomo felt so entitled to the nomination that he barely bothered to campaign. But they’ve both gotten the memo from their wealthy backers to step it up: Adams is attacking Mamdani nonstop, and Cuomo is trying — and failing — to carbon copy Mamdani’s authentic videos. Meanwhile, Mamdani has charged ahead with plans to make New York more affordable, and he’s showing how to pay for it by taxing the ultra-rich and giant corporations. That may not make Mamdani popular with the richest New Yorkers, but he’s laser-focused on fighting to make New York work for working people. And more Democrats would do well to take notice. **Through our policies and our message, we have got to make it clear that Democrats are the party of working families. That’s what Zohran Mamdani is doing — and I’m proud to endorse him. At a time when people have grown cynical about Democratic promises, showing our willingness to tax billionaires and giant corporations to pay for vital programs — like Mamdani is calling for — strengthens our credibility.** [**I’ll keep working relentlessly to elect more fighters for the working class like Zohran Mamdani. If you support our grassroots efforts to make America work for everyday people, not just the billionaires, and to build a Democratic Party that fights for us — then chip in whatever you can to support our movement.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3088?t=8&akid=2615%2E4032634%2Ech9kDI) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

---

---

name: President Trump
subject: Social Security: Here’s what happened
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc
body:
These changes might definitely affect you, so I want you to be the first to hear about what I just signed into law!
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
## _**_MESSAGE FROM THE PRESIDENT ON SOCIAL SECURITY!_**_

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Friend, These changes might definitely affect you!
Here’s what happened to Social Security:
I just signed into LAW something I’m very proud of: **NO TAXES ON SOCIAL SECURITY!**
**_But don’t thank me yet._**
_Democrats and Radical Judges are trying to shut down all the progress we’ve made TOGETHER. They hate that I’m putting the American people first. They’d rather keep wasting your money on their radical agendas._
It’s going to be hard, but in order to make this plan a reality, I’m going to need your help TODAY, not tomorrow. Tomorrow will be too late.
All I’m asking is for you to respond to me, IMMEDIATELY:
**[DO YOU STAND WITH TRUMP ENDING TAXES ON SOCIAL SECURITY?](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)**

[YES](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[NO](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Thank you,
Donald J. Trump
President of the United States

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[RESPOND HERE](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

body:
Can I count on you to contribute to Abigail Spanberger's campaign for Governor of Virginia?
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113070749/562547008/1954103470?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5583-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDk5NTViNC1mMzc1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wMuJT3HIcc1kN6Df9DWhgE7gCAoWsfLpltyXKe0nfHQ=)
Team, I've seen a lot of tough races in my time, so let me tell you:
_This one is as important as it gets._
The Virginia Governor's race is a bellwether for the entire country. This will be the first major election of Trump's second term, and it will set the stage for Democrats in 2026. _If we don't win big here, we'll be facing a rough road ahead._
**[So, before I continue, can I count on you to make a split contribution to Abigail Spanberger's campaign for Governor of Virginia and Jacky Rosen? With fewer than 100 days to go until Election Day, we can't win this thing without your help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113070750/562547009/1954103470?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5583-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDk5NTViNC1mMzc1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wMuJT3HIcc1kN6Df9DWhgE7gCAoWsfLpltyXKe0nfHQ=)**

Here's what's got me terrified, and I won't mince my words: Republicans are going to flood the state with MILLIONS of dollars through their super PACs, trying to keep the Governor's seat red. This election is for all the marbles – and we need to match their energy, their money, and their commitment.
Remember, we only have one opportunity to flip a Governor's office from red to blue in 2025 and it's in Virginia.
And right now, we're seeing that Democratic Governors are our first line of defense against the reckless policies coming out of the Trump Administration.
_Abigail Spanberger is the leader Virginia needs at this moment._
That's why I'm asking you to step up today. The money that's coming from the other side is going to be massive, and we need to be able to push back.

friend, hey — it’s Isaiah Martin.
If you missed Trump’s latest meltdown on Truth Social , here’s the short version:
He’s now warning America that if the courts strike down his illegal tariffs, we’ll have another Great Depression.
This is fearmongering to protect a disastrous trade policy that economists agree is nothing more than a shadow tax on the American people.
Trump’s tariffs have:
* Raised costs on everyday goods
* Slowed economic growth
* Made the U.S. less competitive
* Hurt working families far more than they’ve helped
And now, instead of admitting his failure, he’s threatening economic collapse if he doesn’t get his way. That’s not leadership. That’s hostage-taking.
We can’t let Trump keep playing games with our economy to serve his ego. The courts are doing their job. Now it’s our job to make sure we send leaders to Congress who will fight for real solutions and not fake crises.
Chip in now to help us stop Trump’s economic sabotage [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin]

Let’s get to work.
In the fight,
Isaiah Martin

body:
We won’t let MAGA Republicans dismantle what generations of Americans have earned through a lifetime of hard work.
After years of empty promises to the American people, Donald Trump is pushing a dangerous plan to privatize Social Security. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113071445/562548066/1751013046?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.08.10_Social-Security_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWEwZTMxZS1mNTc1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=boCXeSnV2js18w-SXld1MqeXZiYR90C9XQYt_qFtlWM=&emci=6d07ee9d-8074-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=fea0e31e-f575-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7659029) This isn’t new. Republicans have tried for decades to gut Social Security and gamble away the benefits Americans earned through a lifetime of hard work. **Senator Kirsten Gillibrand is taking a different path. She’s leading legislation to:**
→ Expand Social Security by $2,400 a year for recipients
→ Fully fund the program for the next 70+ years
→ Stop Republican attempts to slash benefits or gamble them away Social Security is one of the most successful social programs in American history. It’s not a bargaining chip. It’s a promise — and Kirsten is fighting to keep it. [**_Will you add your name to stand with Senator Gillibrand and oppose Trump’s plan to privatize Social Security?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113071447/562548068/1751013046?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.08.10_Social-Security_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWEwZTMxZS1mNTc1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=boCXeSnV2js18w-SXld1MqeXZiYR90C9XQYt_qFtlWM=&emci=6d07ee9d-8074-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=fea0e31e-f575-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7659029) | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113071449/562548070/1751013046?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.08.10_Social-Security_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWEwZTMxZS1mNTc1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=boCXeSnV2js18w-SXld1MqeXZiYR90C9XQYt_qFtlWM=&emci=6d07ee9d-8074-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=fea0e31e-f575-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7659029)

body:
We need to build a nationwide, grassroots movement that can oppose Trump’s authoritarian rule and far-right agenda.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1754%2E791427%2ELsLxjU)

Friend, we’re reaching out today because, despite the constant chaos and breaking news of our time, we need to make sure our fundraising stays on track.
**So, we’re hoping you can chip in $10 to Ilhan Omar today and help her continue to stand strong for our progressive values.**
$10 because we need to build a nationwide, grassroots movement that can oppose Trump’s authoritarian rule and far-right agenda.
$10 because unlike other members of Congress, we’ve never taken a dime from corporate Super PACs or far-right mega-donors to fund this campaign.
$10 because that means we need a lot of donations from folks like you, to build the warchest we need to win what could be an extremely tough primary.
We know $10 doesn’t sound like much in the face of billionaire oligarchs, but trust us, it all adds up. And we have seen time and time again that a grassroots funded campaign can beat **_anyone**_ if we stay organized.
**[Chip in your $10 to Ilhan Omar right now and join the thousands of others who are doing the same. Your help is more critical now than ever before.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug25.m0VVrI&refcode=em250810-1-180&t=2&akid=1754%2E791427%2ELsLxjU)

subject: Deadly Strike Coming To America's Power Grid!..
body:
THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21761/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/60bde5f46686cb4846c1db4c080dad2fe38aa20d)

| | |
---

---
| | |
---
| | **FORMER CIA OFFICIAL WARNS:** **DEADLY STRIKE COMING TO AMERICA'S POWER GRID** _**Can you keep your family safe when the lights go out?**_
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21761/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/60bde5f46686cb4846c1db4c080dad2fe38aa20d)
---
**Former CIA Director stunned listeners with a stern warning...** An attack on America's infrastructure would _"blackout the national grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse"._ In fact, attacks on just nine of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in coast-to-coast black-outs, plunging millions into darkness for up to 18 months. Terrifying. **OUR GOVERNMENT IS WOEFULLY UNPREPARED** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer – spoiled. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most – and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21761/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/60bde5f46686cb4846c1db4c080dad2fe38aa20d). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **FOX & FRIENDS FEATURES BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR**
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21761/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/60bde5f46686cb4846c1db4c080dad2fe38aa20d)

The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **YOUR LIFELINE: THE NEW & IMPROVED PATRIOT POWER GENERATOR 2500X** The Patriot Power Generator 2500X now has double the capacity, more power, and newly expandable than our previous best-selling model. With this NEW Patriot Power Generator 2500X... You get MORE power... You get FASTER recharging... And it can even power your FRIDGE! It was designed to safely and dependably meet your power needs. And best of all, it harnesses the power of the sun to keep a state-of-the-art lithium-iron-phosphate battery charged, so it delivers life-saving power for FREE. **Unlike other generators, you'll never run out of gas.** You'll have a power supply that you can recharge endlessly. And its portability is a huge advancement over chunky gas generators, or home-installed systems. You can take the Patriot Power Generator 2500X with you if you are forced out of your home. You'll have an ample supply of AC electricity available to power your fridge, freezer, or medical devices. Even your coffee maker... power your cell phones, computers, radios... and so much more. You can even use it to power an electric blanket to keep you warm. **NO DEADLY FUMES, AND SILENTLY STEALTHY** The [**Patriot Power Generator 2500X**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21761/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/60bde5f46686cb4846c1db4c080dad2fe38aa20d) is a completely self-contained system that silently provides up to 2,500 continuous watts of totally FREE, renewable power. Fellow Conservative,

**I need to ask you something that might feel small — but matters a lot.**

**
You may not have donated in a while. I get it. But if you ever believed in what we’ve done together — the tax cuts, the conservative judges, the border wall — **[I’m asking you to come off the sidelines for just one dollar.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=76570e675a364ab383c807ca194520ee&_e=XV0Sxe_O03eV079jr8i7lVReTNdxUory6ueDfprKYXiM3_jn8wOYqFOFiBmHZfxpbGoOpOSyFBIP51MTLF-yZObqyE9kcwyZIHK3d22bwVd27QzqHvQh4vm5RsX56OsdjTlwqZHKLc3B1iZHKhQ3zhBnTmBApMZjT2dqyiAnHN8-ezakI0-p3l7Ucc6t7f2OLCF2pLhwnjiEnico3Xd9mnkR2wEc4W6ZjWsDxUkBeibocDHO-ZW90IVszpit7MAjeACC-F9GNl3_fakYvIKhjgDdilU7eZwS-Kfub14qDJ84P8BLd7qlj7OtPUulWxYc2JAG5ylClNeXNVYNANdCN2nq0cvh2RIkB30aGoJEukDViPCan9nJ6len7y7v3KRugrNJCwfQD_-Ey5D4nYTlzzl_Aqrsz3tR2idOSfYsX6SQ5R-xlHPkoq1QZzINBauuj61nQ2ltwRaPxo0ZgVucxpR9rQQlPiRtwOabjhXLMHH-UWjo7hoVgbmJNwlO_JHPQ_akETRY-53g2OLMix3kf2KttuGQjXXJf6rUZ73K1NwJmf4DdC37dMmzaUKZvP0ucioateGSLVCXSyd9kSPbUdEzxAsq4lmvfx6i4-1oLix898niCUZekaExEthQJLd-iXfIw1EheIXRum1CIvz-G5JLxITp3EVmdZxsgOGeZHNx3_j6zhaMoSH9CFoyN8u1_lYfYU76w7MtNk8GEfYCcDnhqjR1ZusjIYd6XzO_lq518TxtZDip6YTsM9J64plT3stai7XnK1BJdRjVqaYmGY1FX1YCnNL-r3y1pu6Kfzyig3zshL0DyW9RM-TdipnsUW8HRvv19f-nsQXr0l6tL7uxhmwkIRlhZGtfOqVTI1Lm0YXjY1w5lG_2xy1n9fa1kshfWgExPJHXSxySY5b0nQ%3D%3D) **

Because just a couple weeks ago, while you were going about your life, the Senate passed President Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” and it was signed into law just days later. We pulled an all-nighter to get it done. Why?

Because i**t locks in permanent tax relief, imposes work requirements for welfare, and invests over $170 BILLION into border security, including:**
1. $46.5 billion for the wall
2. $45 billion to expand detention facilities
3. $29.9 billion to hire 10,000 new ICE agents

This is real progress — the kind we dreamed about just a few years ago. But now the Democrats smell blood. They’re outraising us, outspending us, and targeting our Senate seats — even in red states.

**They want revenge.**

If we lose this next election, everything we just won could vanish. They’ll tear it all down.

That’s why I’m writing you — not for $10, not for $100 — just for $1. Not because $1 will flip the Senate, but because it’s a signal that you haven’t given up.

[**CHIP IN $1 NOW**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=76570e675a364ab383c807ca194520ee&_e=XV0Sxe_O03eV079jr8i7lVReTNdxUory6ueDfprKYXiM3_jn8wOYqFOFiBmHZfxpbGoOpOSyFBIP51MTLF-yZObqyE9kcwyZIHK3d22bwVd27QzqHvQh4vm5RsX56OsdjTlwqZHKLc3B1iZHKhQ3zhBnTmBApMZjT2dqyiAnHN8-ezakI0-p3l7Ucc6t7f2OLCF2pLhwnjiEnico3Xd9mnkR2wEc4W6ZjWsDxUkBeibocDHO-ZW90IVszpit7MAjeACC-F9GNl3_fakYvIKhjgDdilU7eZwS-Kfub14qDJ84P8BLd7qlj7OtPUulWxYc2JAG5ylClNeXNVYNANdCN2nq0cvh2RIkB30aGoJEukAAj29GquiMWEqXJUtRBCveVUXig1HgntAV1ixLYkIGuOnIYtgTP5IHNttMlKARZy5xxHT_6OVbyvW1w5-EUmAFJ00lUx5uktk5tCGWW8ve8Ahz92H1aWqjZOKcgC7YTsCCuBww-3Qd5Ohu13rPMFdD7X9FxFllTMJyFO1rmPiMIOr9NgBiXjnc4xamk3MiOISJw273w0HQo0QZC3fLXI9WgWJIHfMJ1svSVT6_m3ecjYTz-I8DCX41zHef5GSA3d3ZUIOEU5gDAwiDdQ0G2XkvSWL3wniViUCnepBRJ3g8Q7kx4NZg9FwBsRneq9zniPZu2aFk5lf3PHd4rmFZ1mUY0nqGQ_EmlOlNEhccsq2nVYWQvVxbwolXyNtTpZQRs01FFQ4re2WqBRPlz-rQNA_AnU6IWZ-8R2CACRO0VYgKUQfQmXxWK5GknMoweFS0pVkuOYcpmhe5ossgFZNKF3Fo8sOSQULLcqSY0A2ttrLBL_-QDec1GIO8p2P8Xt5NVR_dkuHB0ThYEAWSWWLuGTwtls1s8j2c8a0FbuwaG9mjdA%3D%3D)

Your name on our donor list tells me we’re not alone — that this still matters to you.

When Republicans see 10,000 patriots step up with just one dollar, it tells our entire movement: **we’re still in this fight.
**
You stood with us once. I hope you’ll stand with us again — **[even if it’s just for $1.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=76570e675a364ab383c807ca194520ee&_e=XV0Sxe_O03eV079jr8i7lVReTNdxUory6ueDfprKYXiM3_jn8wOYqFOFiBmHZfxpbGoOpOSyFBIP51MTLF-yZObqyE9kcwyZIHK3d22bwVd27QzqHvQh4vm5RsX56OsdjTlwqZHKLc3B1iZHKhQ3zhBnTmBApMZjT2dqyiAnHN8-ezakI0-p3l7Ucc6t7f2OLCF2pLhwnjiEnico3Xd9mnkR2wEc4W6ZjWsDxUkBeibocDHO-ZW90IVszpit7MAjeACC-F9GNl3_fakYvIKhjgDdilU7eZwS-Kfub14qDJ84P8BLd7qlj7OtPUulWxYc2JAG5ylClNeXNVYNANdCN2nq0cvh2RIkB30aGoJEukDevxJNcNmAEhS1GqapeLTKa2y-d0vhTUA4-VmPuaE_cc3TPerbDafDnwasMrtnMHTvKEiSYW2G3QQQ1ARMU71VrO__j0EQQ1SiH3H8Fpxb0dc1SYWeCjwqpbiSINzWmTkaGVEiusbgCoDCfW_8wiWB_fH8dVXI8hYj4ol79zm186aZreBQj_d831uJm8jwADUYEx6dE-i77-nqqhM4YtqwBj5qx5GTwDyqzVKPhHQ0uDBNLv1kVXZCWBRIK3Ewm-ZYtW1i6zj8rKOK8cl8w7rFQjrauFQFZM4tZudrxJOHxVTd2MiFvkEc2EzbSo-CH3s9cn0lX9U9Te1DfkSUflaZh8qS0rm0uJ2buS37o7Er25DE0LojC7FagJxYSzD_9VPvYBuvPBbDULVdV7CbTSKFivC36aeSgesf-2PPpTTg28Tpj94PhQ_pyKi59nKIN64D11X5HdVBDzVULAeFXzksswELg6lWmuLq4d4DdGde6dgLrLvAXrsMXwTW_Z60WQWoXyNI3n2UkiCneB2WwDwgAFKW3s_9q_soqUeG0mH7XQ%3D%3D) **

clean_body: Promises made, promises kept | Fellow Conservative, I need to ask you something that might feel small — but matters a lot. Will you today to help us stop the Democrats from taking the Senate? You may not have donated in a while. I get it. But if you ever believed in what we’ve done together — the tax cuts, the conservative judges, the border wall — Because just a couple weeks ago, while you were going about your life, the Senate passed President Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” and it was signed into law just days later. We pulled an all-nighter to get it done. Why? Because it locks in permanent tax relief, imposes work requirements for welfare, and invests over $170 BILLION into border security, including: 1. $46.5 billion for the wall 2. $45 billion to expand detention facilities 3. $29.9 billion to hire 10,000 new ICE agents This is real progress — the kind we dreamed about just a few years ago. But now the Democrats smell blood. They’re outraising us, outspending us, and targeting our Senate seats — even in red states. They want revenge. If we lose this next election, everything we just won could vanish. They’ll tear it all down. That’s why I’m writing you — not for $10, not for $100 — just for $1. Not because $1 will flip the Senate, but because it’s a signal that you haven’t given up. Your name on our donor list tells me we’re not alone — that this still matters to you. When Republicans see 10,000 patriots step up with just one dollar, it tells our entire movement: we’re still in this fight. You stood with us once. I hope you’ll stand with us again — For America, Ted Cruz U.S. Senator - Texas | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Protecting Senator Gary Peters' legacy

body:
