Hey team, When Senator Debbie Stabenow retired, Fight Like Hell PAC helped keep Michigan’s Senate seat blue. And we really did fight like hell for that seat. Last year's Senate race in Michigan was nail-bitingly close — **we won by a mere 0.3%.** Every donation played a _vital role_ in achieving this victory for Elissa Slotkin. Now, with another Senate seat up for grabs after Senator Gary Peters announced his retirement, national Republicans are already zeroing in on Michigan as a key target. My previous opponent, funded by right-wing billionaire Betsy DeVos, is even hinting at making a run for this seat. **Look, I know what it takes to win in Michigan. I’ve done it by double digits — twice.** Republicans were just 20,000 votes away from turning Michigan’s Senate seat **red** last year. They've got their sights set on doing it again. If we want to protect Senator Gary Peters' legacy and safeguard all the progress we've made, we need to out-organize, out-fundraise, and out-hustle them starting now. **[Can you chip in $10 to fuel Fight Like Hell PAC? name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Completing the voter verification process
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
I’m making a personal request...
| **__A Personal Request from the House GOP Leadership Chair, Rep. Elise Stefanik_ _**
---
Friend,
---
President Trump has expanded our Party’s electoral coalition like never before.
---
**We now have far more voters than the Democrats – but that total includes _MILLIONS_ of “less engaged” voters who don’t always turn out when President Trump isn’t on the ballot.**
---
Our path to victory in the midterms is simple: If every “likely” Republican voter shows up to cast a ballot, we’ll win in a landslide.
---
_But if we get complacent and our turnout dips, we’ll _LOSE_ our House Majority to radical, Far Left Democrats!_
---
**Given the new dynamics of our electoral coalition, the GOP’s official 2025 Voter Verification project has never been more critical.**
---
We need to know exactly who we can count on to show up and cast their ballot for Republicans in the midterms.
---
You see, every Republican voter we confirm as “VERIFIED” for the midterms is one less voter we need to spend time and money targeting between now and Election Day.
---
_That way, we can prioritize spending our limited financial resources to target the millions of less engaged “likely” Republican voters and focus on getting them to the polls._
---
**As House GOP Leadership Chair, it’s my duty to ensure our existing GOP voter file is _100% VERIFIED_ before the end of the year. **
---
And when I say “100% verified,” any old response isn’t enough...
---
I need to make sure that __every_ _single__ Republican voter we have on file has submitted a complete, up-to-date Voter Verification survey measuring their voter intensity and confirming their intention to vote for Republicans in the midterms.
---
That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Friend...
---
[**Please complete our survey to ensure that YOUR voter profile is fully verified and confirm that you’re one of the most engaged Republicans voters who we can count on to show up and vote in the midterms.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=f33b3a556171455bb16a2eccf26e869f&_e=lac7eBWDCa4AfD-E6gDKupdWpt8MfF9k6TMQ5E7BzBxJlKytxpFkqFDK_a9EsJbYtPt_O4zmWAhx0Yz72-KayHdjRn2sA1NRACyXrE2FI6WcJ8qkiM7QgrCFe1RtoH8-hgYEzHmXjzE6yrYgkbMDiWyRpSk8Pze5QMyVN772FcJKcTAD4nQxri4AsrCt2kxIvX5QSS4iVJjL9mopR0TYjHnB67CI1ghoB8y8leQcZ8lK13GBE4V8Wu8Ka5Kd6Edrq-evso4OVUJe1oJ84gyZpaR3_b8vxjSJPdDzz7fsbeRI0sITSUHrm83uIImyPpnw0cNdWhdS9Z1vad0QBwNm-alM9ZdJ_UlCTvXo3imD6dB0YT5KxmmVgqbtOHBi1lJOP9-QWgqgpoFCzDcx-cpSqF3flrAVwYApwJVlAL2d5LmD2j9ltlcPYCAUj77Q97g5wPGgptQ_GIWTTp57lJQI3Uz5WhsdJcicZmzKmVf-3dDxo9pSIcpoHx47ZypOseVDlLXIgkzMtgOk0QLdG8TNewpHh-wN9zp-ssDlaDhxvAcYPI47ymzc-FrQHQjfezTKYWmiP4ThckBGXNYm3URdYzVD-dNzNsDPlzDzH-J3jB8%3D)

We now have far more voters than the Democrats – but that total includes MILLIONS of “less engaged” voters who don’t always turn out when President Trump isn’t on the ballot. Our path to victory in the midterms is simple: If every “likely” Republican voter shows up to cast a ballot, we’ll win in a landslide. But if we get complacent and our turnout dips, we’ll LOSE our House Majority to radical, Far Left Democrats! Given the new dynamics of our electoral coalition, the GOP’s official 2025 Voter Verification project has never been more critical. We need to know exactly who we can count on to show up and cast their ballot for Republicans in the midterms. You see, every Republican voter we confirm as “VERIFIED” for the midterms is one less voter we need to spend time and money targeting between now and Election Day. That way, we can prioritize spending our limited financial resources to target the millions of less engaged “likely” Republican voters and focus on getting them to the polls. As House GOP Leadership Chair, it’s my duty to ensure our existing GOP voter file is 100% VERIFIED before the end of the year. And when I say “100% verified,” any old response isn’t enough... I need to make sure that every single Republican voter we have on file has submitted a complete, up-to-date Voter Verification survey measuring their voter intensity and confirming their intention to vote for Republicans in the midterms. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Friend... Official 2025 GOP Voter Verification Survey Scope: Measuring Voter Intensity Participant: dpwillis67@gmail.com Survey ID #: 175644-866 Submission time remaining: UNKNOWN Response Status: PENDING | Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1011&refcode=email-20250810_v&akid=9150%2E5885482%2EeKfdvG ]Our Revolution logo

The New York Times just dropped a political bombshell: Andrew Cuomo has
been secretly conspiring with Donald Trump to defeat Zohran Mamdani in the
New York mayoral race.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33255?source=email-20250810&t=1061&akid=9150%2E5885482%2EeKfdvG ]Headline: Trump spoke to Cuomo about running for Mayor

This isn’t idle chit-chat. Trump is planning a major intervention to
defeat Mamdani, receiving a briefing from a former Clinton pollster on the
latest polling as well as meeting with New York Republicans to plot his
next steps.

Trump, the Democratic establishment, and a gaggle of Billionaires – who’ve
poured millions into attack PACs – are forming a once-unimaginable unholy
alliance to stop Zohran Mamdani and the grassroots movement behind him.

But we have something their billions can’t buy: an inspirational
people-powered movement that can fuel and support incredible grassroots
organizing to carry Zohran Mamdani to victory in November.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250810nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9150%2E5885482%2EeKfdvG ]Can you donate right now to stop Trump from taking down Mamdani, by
powering Our Revolution’s grassroots organizing to help Zohran Mamdani
win? Each $1 we raise equals 3 phone calls and 3 texts that will bring
voters to the polls.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250810nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9150%2E5885482%2EeKfdvG ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250810nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9150%2E5885482%2EeKfdvG ]CHIP IN $22

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250810nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9150%2E5885482%2EeKfdvG ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250810nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9150%2E5885482%2EeKfdvG ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

When Zohran Mamdani won the primary, it wasn’t an accident. He knocked on
thousands of doors in Astoria, met with tenant organizers in public
housing courtyards, stood with workers on strike, and built a coalition
that looks like New York City—Black, brown, immigrant, queer,
working-class, and unbossed. The Mamdani campaign didn’t win by flooding
TV with slick ads; it won by building trust in bodegas and bus stops.

Trump and his billionaire allies see Mamdani and this blossoming
grassroots movement as a direct threat precisely because Mamdani will
stand up to Wall Street and fight back against corporate capture of our
democracy. Elizabeth Warren recently put it plainly: Progressives like
Mamdani are genuinely dangerous to Trump and the Billionaire Class.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33255?source=email-20250810&t=1060&akid=9150%2E5885482%2EeKfdvG ]Headline: Elizabeth Warren on why billionaires are doing all they can
to stop Zohran Mamdani

Let’s be clear: This isn’t just about one election. If the forces behind
Trump, Cuomo, and Eric Adams can overturn a democratic win by rallying
billionaire cash and anti-democratic alliances against a DEMOCRAT in New
York City, they’ll do it everywhere.

Grassroots power has always been Our Revolution’s engine. It’s how we win.
But to break through the deluge of negative ads, we need resources for
digital outreach, phonebanks, and block-by-block canvassing to help Zohran
Mamdani win in November.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250810nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9150%2E5885482%2EeKfdvG ]Trump thinks he can team up with Cuomo to buy our democracy. Let’s prove
them wrong—rush a donation now to help Our Revolution’s grassroots
campaign Zohran Mamdani fight back and win:

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

subject: New York Times: White House Pushes Texas to Redistrict, Hoping to Blunt Democratic Gains
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Don't mess with Texas
#
Y’all, as if all the destruction Donald Trump has caused nationally isn’t enough, **_now he’s messing with Texas._**
The latest reports just revealed that he’s pressuring Texas Republicans to gerrymander new congressional districts that could DESTROY all the progress Democrats have made here over the past few years:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93270?refcode=em20250810-9249&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9249%2E614464%2EbSTyZB)
**NOT on my watch.** I’ll fight to protect my home state from Trump’s schemes if it’s the last thing I do.
But this ultimately isn’t just about Texas. **This is about our democracy.**
Republicans know they can’t win an election without lying and cheating. So ahead of the 2026 midterm elections, they’re trying to rig the game in their favor by gerrymandering their way into another term in the majority.
**[I REFUSE to let that happen, but I need your help to fight back and stop them before it’s too late. Please, help me protect Texas and our democracy from these anti-democratic schemes before it’s too late by splitting a donation of any amount between my campaign and State Democrats Committee right away. >>](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93270?refcode=em20250810-9249&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9249%2E614464%2EbSTyZB)**

name: Wage Cut Protection Team via Care in Action
subject: Stop Trump ending minimum wage and overtime protections for home care workers!
body:
Trump’s attacks are increasing: now he’s moving to end minimum wage and overtime protections for home care workers. Let’s come together to stop him.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113073760/562554310/664783965?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=c4_dol_rule_comments&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjMzNWRiNS1mYTc1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uITZnAQNHZ0MjdOSiqaDO6W_w4JQVLfGkd-HclrCsn4=&emci=41420e5c-cc73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=e2335db5-fa75-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
Peter,
The Trump administration’s attacks on our communities just won’t stop. **First he gutted Medicaid to pay for tax cuts for billionaires and now he’s moving to strip minimum wage and overtime pay protections from home care workers.**
If finalized, Trump’s recently proposed new federal rule will **strip away pay protections from home care workers** , further marginalizing the already underpaid and mostly Black, Latina, Asian-American, and immigrant workforce.
**This move sends yet _another_ message that care work** is not real work and is an insult to the care workers who spend their lives ensuring our loved ones receive the assistance they need to live with dignity and independence in their homes.
[**We are NOT going to let them get away with it, so Care in Action is joining the National Domestic Worker's Alliance for a massive push to overwhelm the Department of Labor’s public comment period with opposition to this cruel federal rule change. Can you send in a public comment right now?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113073768/562554342/-1386708787?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=c4_dol_rule_comments&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjMzNWRiNS1mYTc1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uITZnAQNHZ0MjdOSiqaDO6W_w4JQVLfGkd-HclrCsn4=&emci=41420e5c-cc73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=e2335db5-fa75-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113073784/562554395/-1386708787?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=c4_dol_rule_comments&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjMzNWRiNS1mYTc1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uITZnAQNHZ0MjdOSiqaDO6W_w4JQVLfGkd-HclrCsn4=&emci=41420e5c-cc73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=e2335db5-fa75-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
In 2013, domestic workers and advocates organized a massive campaign for guaranteed minimum wage and overtime pay — and we won. Domestic workers have been excluded from some basic labor protections for decades. This victory was a major shift in domestic worker rights.
But now, the Department of Labor’s proposed changes to the “companionship rule” will take back this hard-fought victory from home care workers. **It will hand power back to employers, leaving care workers even more vulnerable, devalued, and exploited at a time when we need them most.**
Sadly, it’s just the latest example of how Trump’s Department of Labor is attacking workers. Last month alone, DOL unleashed a shocking sixty-four regulatory actions – mostly designed to reverse critical rules that exist to ensure workers get a just day’s pay and are safe at work.
It could not be clearer who the Trump administration is working to protect: billionaires and corporations. **But we cannot be silent as our health care, our job protections, and our livelihoods are taken away.**
This community knows that care work is real, vital work that millions across the country rely on. So let’s come together now and speak directly to the Department of Labor: [**Don’t take away minimum wage and overtime protections for home care workers! Make your public comment now — you can find more tips for leaving a comment when you click here.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113073790/562554412/-1386708787?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=c4_dol_rule_comments&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjMzNWRiNS1mYTc1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uITZnAQNHZ0MjdOSiqaDO6W_w4JQVLfGkd-HclrCsn4=&emci=41420e5c-cc73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=e2335db5-fa75-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
[Make Your Public Comment](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113073796/562554428/-1386708787?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=c4_dol_rule_comments&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjMzNWRiNS1mYTc1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uITZnAQNHZ0MjdOSiqaDO6W_w4JQVLfGkd-HclrCsn4=&emci=41420e5c-cc73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=e2335db5-fa75-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
This attack on worker rights isn’t just about home care, it’s about all domestic work. If the Department of Labor succeeds in stripping rights from care workers, it opens the door to attacks on the rest of us and all of the progress we’ve won in Congress and states across the country.
As always, thanks for all you do,
The Care in Action Team

clean_body: Trump’s attacks are increasing: now he’s moving to end minimum wage and overtime protections for home care workers. Let’s come together to stop him. Peter, The Trump administration’s attacks on our communities just won’t stop. First he gutted Medicaid to pay for tax cuts for billionaires and now he’s moving to strip minimum wage and overtime pay protections from home care workers. If finalized, Trump’s recently proposed new federal rule will strip away pay protections from home care workers , further marginalizing the already underpaid and mostly Black, Latina, Asian-American, and immigrant workforce. This move sends yet another message that care work is not real work and is an insult to the care workers who spend their lives ensuring our loved ones receive the assistance they need to live with dignity and independence in their homes. In 2013, domestic workers and advocates organized a massive campaign for guaranteed minimum wage and overtime pay — and we won. Domestic workers have been excluded from some basic labor protections for decades. This victory was a major shift in domestic worker rights. But now, the Department of Labor’s proposed changes to the “companionship rule” will take back this hard-fought victory from home care workers. It will hand power back to employers, leaving care workers even more vulnerable, devalued, and exploited at a time when we need them most. Sadly, it’s just the latest example of how Trump’s Department of Labor is attacking workers. Last month alone, DOL unleashed a shocking sixty-four regulatory actions – mostly designed to reverse critical rules that exist to ensure workers get a just day’s pay and are safe at work. It could not be clearer who the Trump administration is working to protect: billionaires and corporations. But we cannot be silent as our health care, our job protections, and our livelihoods are taken away. This community knows that care work is real, vital work that millions across the country rely on. So let’s come together now and speak directly to the Department of Labor: This attack on worker rights isn’t just about home care, it’s about all domestic work. If the Department of Labor succeeds in stripping rights from care workers, it opens the door to attacks on the rest of us and all of the progress we’ve won in Congress and states across the country. As always, thanks for all you do, The Care in Action Team

subject: For every single American

body:
#
Texas Republicans are trying to steal five Democratic-held congressional seats — not by earning votes, but by rigging our congressional map to lock in control before the midterm elections.
It’s Donald Trump’s plan to hold on to the majority in the U.S. House of Representatives. Greg Abbott and Ken Paxton are doing his bidding. And they’re trying to scare us into silence through investigations and threats of arrest.
But instead of bending the knee, Democratic lawmakers in Texas left the state to block this power grab. They’re putting everything on the line not only for their constituents in Texas, but for all of us wherever we live in America.
**This is the fight. Right here. Right now.**

name: Gov. Andy Beshear via In This Together PAC
subject: Chris Pappas is the kind of person ITT was built to support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
A proven record of winning tough races
Hey Peter, it's Governor Andy Beshear.

When I first ran for attorney general in Kentucky, people said it couldn’t be won. When I ran for governor, everyone told me the state had become too red and a Democrat couldn’t break through the partisan noise. But three races – and three wins – later, our campaign proved everyone wrong.

I didn’t win three times as a Democrat in deep-red Kentucky by bowing down to party politics. I won by sticking to my values, staying true to my faith, and never forgetting who I would serve when I entered office. I listened to what Kentuckians had to say, stood up for their rights and addressed their concerns, just like our leaders are supposed to.

When I launched In This Together PAC, I did it with a simple goal: **To support good people in hard races—not just in Kentucky, but nationwide.** I want to share the approach that has helped us win tough elections and support the campaigns of leaders who show up, tell the truth, and actually do the job the American people hired them to do.

[**That's why I’m proud to support New Hampshire Congressman Chris Pappas as he runs to become the next Senator of the Granite State, and why I'm asking you to split a contribution of $5 between In This Together PAC and Chris’s campaign today. >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113075235/562558500/1338003640?refcode=em25_250810_split_fndt_gq_act___GOVAB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250810_split_fndt_gq_act___GOVAB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=1f0b75d3-fb75-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWYwYjc1ZDMtZmI3NS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PH4qMqQCTIMByNGuiDGSG04DW0mFoCmnHbfVJ9r5BFA=)

Chris Pappas knows how to win a tough race, too. He ran in one of the most competitive districts in the country and won reelection **three times.**

But it’s not a coincidence that he succeeded. Throughout his time in Congress, Chris has stood up for the people of New Hampshire at every turn. He’s fought to support New Hampshire’s small businesses, improve access to affordable health care for all, get our veterans the benefits they have earned, and combat the opioid epidemic.

He's proven time and again that hard work, fairness, and common sense are a winning combination. And now, he’s stepping up to run for Senate in a race that will be one of the most watched— _and most expensive_ —in the country.

Chris Pappas is the kind of person ITT PAC was built to support, and I hope you’ll stand with us and help his campaign today.

[**Will you chip in a split donation to both In This Together and Chris Pappas so we can continue to elect for-the-people leaders in the Senate and nationwide?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113075236/562558501/1338003640?refcode=em25_250810_split_fndt_gq_act___GOVAB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250810_split_fndt_gq_act___GOVAB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=1f0b75d3-fb75-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWYwYjc1ZDMtZmI3NS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PH4qMqQCTIMByNGuiDGSG04DW0mFoCmnHbfVJ9r5BFA=) [Split a donation »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113075237/562558502/1338003640?refcode=em25_250810_split_fndt_gq_act___GOVAB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250810_split_fndt_gq_act___GOVAB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=1f0b75d3-fb75-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWYwYjc1ZDMtZmI3NS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PH4qMqQCTIMByNGuiDGSG04DW0mFoCmnHbfVJ9r5BFA=) Thank you,

Gov. Andy Beshear
Founder of In This Together PAC

clean_body: A proven record of winning tough races Hey Peter, it's Governor Andy Beshear. When I first ran for attorney general in Kentucky, people said it couldn’t be won. When I ran for governor, everyone told me the state had become too red and a Democrat couldn’t break through the partisan noise. But three races – and three wins – later, our campaign proved everyone wrong. I didn’t win three times as a Democrat in deep-red Kentucky by bowing down to party politics. I won by sticking to my values, staying true to my faith, and never forgetting who I would serve when I entered office. I listened to what Kentuckians had to say, stood up for their rights and addressed their concerns, just like our leaders are supposed to. When I launched In This Together PAC, I did it with a simple goal: To support good people in hard races—not just in Kentucky, but nationwide. I want to share the approach that has helped us win tough elections and support the campaigns of leaders who show up, tell the truth, and actually do the job the American people hired them to do. = Chris Pappas knows how to win a tough race, too. He ran in one of the most competitive districts in the country and won reelection three times. But it’s not a coincidence that he succeeded. Throughout his time in Congress, Chris has stood up for the people of New Hampshire at every turn. He’s fought to support New Hampshire’s small businesses, improve access to affordable health care for all, get our veterans the benefits they have earned, and combat the opioid epidemic. He's proven time and again that hard work, fairness, and common sense are a winning combination. And now, he’s stepping up to run for Senate in a race that will be one of the most watched— and most expensive —in the country. Chris Pappas is the kind of person ITT PAC was built to support, and I hope you’ll stand with us and help his campaign today. = = Thank you, Gov. Andy Beshear Founder of In This Together PAC | | Andy and In This Together PAC are working to support leaders who will lead with compassion and decency, reject anger politics, and always do what's right. Will you donate today to support In This Together's mission? = _ Paid for by In This Together PAC. InThisTogetherPAC.com. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to In This Together PAC are not tax deductible. In This Together PO Box 5822 Louisville, KY 40255 United States

The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee is calling on Democratic state legislatures to use all available powers to protect our democracy – including pursuing mid-cycle redistricting in blue states. [Learn more about our Dems on Redistricting Offensive here → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWxfidpjDku9pQtiQct-OaiXqf2BjePjD2iaZ_6ISXvfNrW5OUUxOW68uuByZAWgWo1XXA5Le7IOhE646qOLdef15JmdkSfxGHr2YvCFzVU4vj7cvLBMe3vDVzyRO-ybNpNN3y4ibmGXMKzFQtAQWKu5DWAo9t60RVBuvLQS6M7Rq1ZafEDMZZTskp9aX6glIrEjT6cmyZSqgJ9ipBE0krgwS5X436t6nlwtVOAhoFyR_pqI6zXRaJpu94Uisf3SfV1IruFpseNAuPDoyQEvUIHeeT4FwKzFurRAgSO9lhZE4hN9z2bHhCL-ktqrmOw9dMSKB6V2FcbcwUxtIS7Y3y5-PtvS1vCACf_c6xd-BO7IA8oSTX_6-09nYF8vHO8hA5T1b2ch_DkdJxag59X9O2w3xe23CEuVax9FlSt2pHpjpjGUhbvICiHGucbiua3pwcY5WVHCO6LKmTR_YBQlM8G10k28_2anO_zmFADvvTXorSEihCqIhbo0LIFEdVfIX9ZQnq4Ua0dNS6k2R6zCezN8xOEV1SKDHf7YoVpp3L95vqsraDGekO6qcWwEW3_JvyQ/4ix/3OGR4ExRSVmP5LImCJ8XaQ/h2/h001.VlZ1z5na3iLvkFaY9VJuIelu-qwJQYnUXc2GaINowME)

Democratic state lawmakers who left the state to try to block a vote on new congressional maps now have warrants issued for their arrest as they take refuge in Illinois and New York – federal law enforcement agents are being weaponized to intimidate lawmakers who are standing up for our democracy. 🔦 **Spotlight:_Jessica Anderson prepares to flip a seat in the VA House_ **
The DLCC announced Jessica Anderson as a Spotlight Candidate in her race to flip a seat in the Virginia House. Anderson’s district is highly competitive – her Republican opponent was elected by less than 700 votes in 2023. She is an advocate for strengthening social safety nets and protecting personal liberty. clean_body: Here's the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter for Sunday, August 10th, 2025. | | | | | | 🎉 Special Election Result:Democrats win DE Special Election On Tuesday, Democrat Alonna Berry won a toss-up seat in the Delaware House, maintaining Democrats' three-fifths majority in the state House. 📢 Taking a Stand:DLCC calls for Mid-Cycle Redistricting The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee is calling on Democratic state legislatures to use all available powers to protect our democracy – including pursuing mid-cycle redistricting in blue states. 🚨 Texas:State Republicans issue arrest warrants for their Democratic colleagues, now involving the FBI in their attacks on Democracy Democratic state lawmakers who left the state to try to block a vote on new congressional maps now have warrants issued for their arrest as they take refuge in Illinois and New York – federal law enforcement agents are being weaponized to intimidate lawmakers who are standing up for our democracy. 🗳️ Arizona:Republican candidate says women shouldn’t hold public office Despite being a woman running for the Arizona state Senate herself, a GOP candidate previously 🔦 Spotlight:Jessica Anderson prepares to flip a seat in the VA House The DLCC announced Jessica Anderson as a Spotlight Candidate in her race to flip a seat in the Virginia House. Anderson’s district is highly competitive – her Republican opponent was elected by less than 700 votes in 2023. She is an advocate for strengthening social safety nets and protecting personal liberty. 🗳️ Upcoming elections:Democrats work to build progressive power State Democrats are facing over a dozen elections in the coming months. ****** | | ---|---|--- | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: “Katie Porter has emerged as the Democratic frontrunner”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39994%2E3422442%2EVQSUBN)
Dear Peter,
Here’s what an independent pollster had to say about the state of the California Governor race after looking at data he collected last week:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250810_1_ak?refcode=em20250810-39994&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39994_3422442_VQSUBN&akid=39994%2E3422442%2EVQSUBN)
Here’s the key takeaway: **we’re in a strong position, but the outcome isn’t guaranteed.** More than one-third of voters are still undecided, which means that things can still change between now and the election next year.
**Your donation today can make an outsized difference.** Not only will it help us reach voters that we need to hear Katie’s message, but also, if outside groups see strong fundraising numbers from our campaign, they might think twice before getting involved in this race and spending to defeat Katie.
**[So if you’re unsure about whether to give now or to wait and see, we hope you’ll consider chipping in today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250810_1_ak?refcode=em20250810-39994&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39994_3422442_VQSUBN&akid=39994%2E3422442%2EVQSUBN)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250810_1_ak?refcode=em20250810-39994&refcode2=39994_3422442_VQSUBN&akid=39994%2E3422442%2EVQSUBN)
Onward,
Team Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250810-39994&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39994_3422442_VQSUBN&akid=39994%2E3422442%2EVQSUBN)**

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Will you join our focus group?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi friend, it's Senator Kirsten Gillibrand. I am excited and honored to serve as your Chair of the DSCC.

My entire career, I've believed in **the power of grassroots activism.** I know that campaigns -- and Senate majorities -- are won by the people who put in the work, from volunteers knocking on doors and stuffing envelopes to supporters sharing their priorities. _And that last piece is why I want to hear from you._

**[Today, I'm pleased to invite you to join my official DSCC Focus Group. Flipping the Senate depends on knowing what issues and messages matter most to this team, so it's important that I personally hear from top supporters like you. Your feedback will enable us to build our strategy to take back the majority -- so please, will you take my survey before midnight?](http://go.dscc.org/go/21861?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250810-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250810-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=20937%2E9716520%2E9gwKtr)**

| | [ENTER FOCUS GROUP](http://go.dscc.org/go/21861?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250810-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250810-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=20937%2E9716520%2E9gwKtr)
---

Donald Trump has spent years attacking your personal freedoms, and now that he's back in office, that will only continue.

The Senate is our _best chance_ at stopping the MAGA agenda and putting forth a positive Democratic vision. Together, we can flip the Senate and pursue that bold path, but we'll only be effective if we incorporate _your_ invaluable knowledge of the landscape we face.

**[So please, will you take a few moments to join my DSCC Focus Group by completing a brief survey before midnight? Democrats are at our strongest when we hear from supporters like you, so I'm humbly asking you to take a few moments to share your thoughts on how we can win.](http://go.dscc.org/go/21861?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250810-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250810-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=20937%2E9716520%2E9gwKtr)**

The path forward starts today. It's a privilege to be your DSCC Chair, and **[with your input](http://go.dscc.org/go/21861?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250810-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250810-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=20937%2E9716520%2E9gwKtr)** , we'll build our strongest majority yet.

With gratitude,

Kirsten

Kirsten Gillibrand
DSCC Chair

[](http://go.dscc.org/go/21861?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250810-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250810-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=20937%2E9716520%2E9gwKtr)

name: Andy Beshear
subject: The path forward isn’t left or right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
This race isn’t just about one state. It’s about the country we want to be.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250810_1_beshear?refcode=em20250810-1783&amount=5&refcode2=1783_582294_D0utYc&akid=1783%2E582294%2ED0utYc)
It’s Kentucky Governor Andy Beshear.
You’ve heard me say it before: The path forward in this country isn’t left or right — it’s straight ahead.
It’s about showing up, doing the work, and delivering for all our families, no matter where they live or who they voted for.
**That’s exactly the kind of leader Chris Pappas is.**
Chris and I may come from different parts of the country — New Hampshire and Kentucky — but we share a deep belief in something simple but powerful: Public service is about lifting people up, not tearing each other down.
Chris has spent his career working across the aisle, protecting health care, defending reproductive rights, and standing up for small businesses and working families. He’s never forgotten where he comes from — and he never stops fighting for the people who sent him to Washington.
**Now Chris is running for the U.S. Senate. And I’m proud to endorse him.**
But the road ahead won’t be easy. National Republicans are planning to target this race, hoping to flip this seat and push an agenda that would take us backward. Chris is going to need all of us — every voice, every volunteer, and yes, _every dollar_ — to win.
I’m no stranger to competitive elections. I know Chris can’t win this fight without us.
So I’m asking:
[**Will you contribute $5 or whatever you can today to help Chris Pappas win in New Hampshire and bring commonsense and real leadership to the Senate?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250810_1_beshear?refcode=em20250810-1783&amount=5&refcode2=1783_582294_D0utYc&akid=1783%2E582294%2ED0utYc)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250810_1_beshear?amount=5&refcode=em20250810-1783&refcode2=1783_582294_D0utYc&akid=1783%2E582294%2ED0utYc)**
This race isn’t just about one state. It’s about what kind of country we want to be. One where we look out for one another. One where leaders work to unite us — not divide us.
Chris Pappas is ready to move us forward. Let’s help him get there.
Thank you,
Andy Beshear
Governor of Kentucky
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer&refcode=em20250810-1?t=1&refcode2=1783_582294_D0utYc&akid=1783%2E582294%2ED0utYc)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1783%2E582294%2ED0utYc)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1783%2E582294%2ED0utYc)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1783%2E582294%2ED0utYc)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

name: Delia Ramirez
subject: The far right wants me to be removed from my committees, stripped of my citizenship, and deported
body:
Right-wing forces are attacking me after weaponizing a misinterpretation of my comments.
#
Hi Peter, it’s Rep. Delia Ramirez.
Last week, an acknowledgement I made of my Guatemalan roots — and the pride I feel as a Guatemalan American — was **twisted into a false narrative.**
Right-wing forces, including the Department of Homeland Security, weaponized a misinterpretation of my comments, made in Spanish, to question my loyalty as an American and silence me as I continue to push back against this fascist administration.
**They’ve even gone so far as to call for me to be removed from my committees, stripped of my citizenship, and deported** — a ridiculous attack meant only to rile the far-right with false narratives and dangerous precedents.
These attacks are rooted in xenophobia and racism. Conservatives with narrow, exclusionary views of America take offense when someone who looks like me speaks with pride about their heritage.
**[With far-right Republicans increasing their hostile attacks on working-class progressives like me and my fellow Justice Democrats in Congress, will you help us fight back by pitching in a split donation of $5?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250810-dr?refcode=em20250810-36917&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36917_1203867_FRgJ4J&akid=36917%2E1203867%2EFRgJ4J)**
Here’s the truth: _my very existence threatens the far right’s white supremacy._
My entire life and political work – as a proud daughter of immigrants, who unapologetically advocates for housing as a human right and healthcare for all, first as a social service provider, then as a state rep, and now as a congresswoman – has been about uplifting working-class people of every background. I fight for _all_ of us.
**When the right wing seeks to divide us using race, ethnicity, and the roots we hold dear, I will always fight back.** The U.S. is at its best when we live our values as a multiracial and multicultural democracy, where our mosaic of cultures represents something new and uniquely American. It’s something we should be intensely proud of and work tirelessly to defend.
**[I hope you’ll stand with me now against these hateful attacks and fight for the inclusive vision of America we’re building together by making a split contribution to my campaign and Justice Democrats today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250810-dr?refcode=em20250810-36917&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36917_1203867_FRgJ4J&akid=36917%2E1203867%2EFRgJ4J)**
**[Contribute $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250810-dr?refcode=em20250810-36917&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36917_1203867_FRgJ4J&akid=36917%2E1203867%2EFRgJ4J)**
Together, we will keep speaking the truth — proudly.
In Solidarity,
Delia

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250810-36917-footer&t=2&refcode2=36917_1203867_FRgJ4J&akid=36917%2E1203867%2EFRgJ4J)**

clean_body: Right-wing forces are attacking me after weaponizing a misinterpretation of my comments. Hi Peter, it’s Rep. Delia Ramirez. Last week, an acknowledgement I made of my Guatemalan roots — and the pride I feel as a Guatemalan American — was twisted into a false narrative. Right-wing forces, including the Department of Homeland Security, weaponized a misinterpretation of my comments, made in Spanish, to question my loyalty as an American and silence me as I continue to push back against this fascist administration. They’ve even gone so far as to call for me to be removed from my committees, stripped of my citizenship, and deported — a ridiculous attack meant only to rile the far-right with false narratives and dangerous precedents. These attacks are rooted in xenophobia and racism. Conservatives with narrow, exclusionary views of America take offense when someone who looks like me speaks with pride about their heritage. Here’s the truth: my very existence threatens the far right’s white supremacy. My entire life and political work – as a proud daughter of immigrants, who unapologetically advocates for housing as a human right and healthcare for all, first as a social service provider, then as a state rep, and now as a congresswoman – has been about uplifting working-class people of every background. I fight for all of us. When the right wing seeks to divide us using race, ethnicity, and the roots we hold dear, I will always fight back. The U.S. is at its best when we live our values as a multiracial and multicultural democracy, where our mosaic of cultures represents something new and uniquely American. It’s something we should be intensely proud of and work tirelessly to defend. Together, we will keep speaking the truth — proudly. In Solidarity, Delia Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources. # [Tax Cuts: The Historical Evolution of Lower Tax Policies](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1526781&post_id=170605880&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwNjA1ODgwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTQ4NDEyNzgsImV4cCI6MTc1NzQzMzI3OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE1MjY3ODEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.bUZJq9hVYf4NzXf2X9f0tGKTjKnS2yedfggMxH5BvoE)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/602ff5de-437e-4ea9-a953-4a524fb99555?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_"**Taxation is theft, purely and simply even though it is theft on a grand and colossal scale." Murray Rothbard**_
The concept of taxation has been intertwined with government since ancient times, but the push for lower taxes as a deliberate economic strategy emerged prominently in modern history, particularly in the United States and Western economies. In the early days of the American republic, taxes were minimal, reflecting a libertarian ethos rooted in resistance to British overreach. The U.S. Constitution initially limited federal taxation to tariffs and excises, with no income tax until the Civil War era. The first federal income tax in 1861 was a temporary wartime measure, starting at 3% on incomes over $800, but it was repealed in 1872.
This low-tax environment fostered rapid industrialization and innovation in the late 19th century, as entrepreneurs faced few fiscal barriers. The 20th century marked a shift toward higher taxes, driven by world wars and expanding government roles. The 16th Amendment in 1913 permanently established the federal income tax, with initial top rates at 7%. However, during World War I and II, rates skyrocketed--peaking at 94% in 1944 on incomes over $200,000.
Post-war, these high rates persisted under the guise of funding social programs, but economists began arguing they stifled growth. The 1920s saw a brief experiment with tax cuts under Presidents Harding and Coolidge, reducing top rates from 73% to 25%, which coincided with the Roaring Twenties' economic boom.
Revenue actually increased due to heightened economic activity, a precursor to later supply-side theories. The mid-20th century's high-tax regime, with top marginal rates over 90% in the 1950s, came under fire from free-market thinkers.
Milton Friedman, a Nobel laureate economist, critiqued this, stating,
_**"I am in favor of cutting taxes under any circumstances and for any excuse, for any reason, whenever it's possible."**_
Friedman argued that high taxes distorted incentives, reducing productivity and innovation. This view gained traction in the 1970s amid stagflation, leading to the Economic Recovery Tax Act of 1981 under President Ronald Reagan. Reagan slashed top individual rates from 70% to 50%, and later to 28% in 1986, emphasizing supply-side economics. He famously quipped, _**"Government's view of the economy could be summed up in a few short phrases: If it moves, tax it. If it keeps moving, regulate it."**_
Globally, similar patterns emerged. In the UK, post-WWII taxes reached punitive levels, but Margaret Thatcher's cuts in the 1980s mirrored Reagan's, spurring growth. Murray Rothbard, a libertarian philosopher, viewed taxes as coercive, writing, _"**Taxation is theft, purely and simply even though it is theft on a grand and colossal scale."**_
More recent U.S. examples include the 2001-2003 Bush tax cuts and the 2017 Tax Cuts and Jobs Act under Trump, which lowered corporate rates from 35% to 21%, boosting investment.
These policies reflect a historical lesson: lower taxes correlate with expansions, as seen in the 1920s, 1980s, and post-2017 recoveries, where GDP growth accelerated and unemployment fell.
Conversely, high-tax eras like the 1930s Depression prolonged stagnation. This history underscores that reducing fiscal burdens unleashes human potential, driving prosperity through voluntary exchange rather than state extraction.

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: We want to hear from you:
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250810-1470-foote&t=1001&akid=1470%2E342411%2EftDjon ]Squad Victory Fund

Hi Peter,

The strength of the Squad Victory Fund comes from this grassroots team —
people like you, at the heart of our progressive movement.

As we move through August, we’re shaping the direction of our work to
defend progressive values and back the Squad — leaders who fight every day
for justice, equity, and our communities.

But to make sure we’re focusing on what matters most to this team, we need
your input.

This movement is powered by people like you. When you share your
priorities, you help guide our strategy and build the momentum we need to
win.

Your voice directly shapes our approach — ensuring that every action we
take is driven by the needs and values of the communities we serve.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/priorities-survery-2025-august/?source=em20250810-1470&t=1002&akid=1470%2E342411%2EftDjon ]Will you take a moment to complete our August Priorities Survey? It
will only take a few minutes of your time.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/priorities-survery-2025-august/?source=em20250810-1470&t=1003&akid=1470%2E342411%2EftDjon ]TAKE THE SURVEY

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida are standing up to the
authoritarianism of the Trump Administration — but they cannot do it
alone.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19994?refcode=em20250810-1470&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=1470%2E342411%2EftDjon ]Please make a contribution today to support the Squad.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1470%2E342411%2EftDjon

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

[ ]Will you take a moment to complete our August Priorities Survey? It will only take a few minutes of your time. [ ]TAKE THE SURVEY In solidarity, The Squad Victory Fund Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida are standing up to the authoritarianism of the Trump Administration — but they cannot do it alone. [ ]Please make a contribution today to support the Squad.

_**“SHE WILL NOT LET YOU DOWN”**_
Friend, in the critical upcoming special election for Florida’s U.S. Senate seat, I am honored to tell you that **I just received President Trump’s total and complete endorsement!**
**My name is Ashley Moody, and I’ve been serving in the U.S. Senate on a temporary basis since Marco Rubio became our top diplomat – _but now it’s time to win this seat outright. _**
I’m a fifth-generation Floridian, former judge and Attorney General, wife of a law enforcement officer, and mother to two wonderful boys.
W _e can win this seat, but to be honest, history is stacked against us._
**Typically, the president’s party averages a FOUR-SEAT LOSS in Senate midterm elections. If that happens, say hello to Majority Leader Chuck Schumer and goodbye to any forward movement on President Trump’s agenda.**
_I don’t need to tell you what a disaster that would be for this country._
**[President Trump put his faith in me to win this critical special election, and now I’d like to ask for yours. name: Ted Cruz
subject: My father escaped socialism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
Socialism is creeping into the Democratic Party.

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, The socialist movement is no longer a distant threat -- **_it 's taking over the Democratic Party right now. _** And if we don't act fast, America as we know it could be gone forever. As the son of a man who fled the socialist revolution in Cuba, I know firsthand what happens when the government takes control and individual freedoms are stripped away. **My father was imprisoned and tortured by the communist forces that seized power in Cuba. He risked everything to escape and come to America with nothing but a dream of freedom and $100 sewn into his underwear.** **[[STOP SOCIALISM]](http://trk.tedcruz.)**
---
[](http://trk.tedcruz._0tv4IhUt2UP5q5Iyg)
---
But today, that same socialist ideology that stole everything from my father is starting to take root right here in America. **It 's creeping into the Democratic Party, and we've already seen a socialist win the NYC Democratic primary for mayor.** Make no mistake, Fellow Conservative,**_this is not the country_** we want for our children and grandchildren. [**That's why I am turning to you at this critical moment. Will you please chip in $10, $50, or even $100 to stop this socialist movement from taking over America?**](http://trk.tedcruz.) **[[STOP SOCIALISM]](http://trk.tedcruz.)** I will never stop fighting to protect our freedom, our values, and the American Dream that my father risked everything to find. We cannot let the Left take away what we've worked so hard to build. **[So please, join me today and stand up against the socialist takeover that's threatening our great country. >>](http://trk.tedcruz.)** **[[STOP SOCIALISM]](http://trk.tedcruz.-bkX7kmw)** Thank you, Ted Cruz
---

And if we don't act fast, America as we know it could be gone forever. As the son of a man who fled the socialist revolution in Cuba, I know firsthand what happens when the government takes control and individual freedoms are stripped away. My father was imprisoned and tortured by the communist forces that seized power in Cuba. He risked everything to escape and come to America with nothing but a dream of freedom and $100 sewn into his underwear. [[STOP SOCIALISM]]() But today, that same socialist ideology that stole everything from my father is starting to take root right here in America. It 's creeping into the Democratic Party, and we've already seen a socialist win the NYC Democratic primary for mayor. Make no mistake, Fellow Conservative,this is not the country we want for our children and grandchildren. [[STOP SOCIALISM]]() I will never stop fighting to protect our freedom, our values, and the American Dream that my father risked everything to find. We cannot let the Left take away what we've worked so hard to build. [[STOP SOCIALISM]]() Thank you, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265 | | | To stop receiving emails from Ted Cruz for Senate, to unsubscribe. |

name: Democrat Mark Takano
subject: On the Anniversary of the PACT Act, it’s critical to continue our fight for veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Trump and his Republican allies are stripping veterans of their benefits and attacking their families.
Hi Peter – it’s U.S. Congressman Mark Takano.
As Ranking Member of the House Committee on Veterans’ Affairs, I’m proud to fight for our nation's veterans every single day in Congress.
Three years ago this month, I led the passage of the PACT Act, **helping over 1 million veterans receive disability compensation benefits and over 5.6 million be screened for toxic exposure.**
This bill was the largest expansion of veteran healthcare in generations, and it was an honor to work with other incredible advocates for our veterans like Jon Stewart.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93351?refcode=em20250810-9239&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9239%2E614464%2ERlPpWB)
At a time when Trump and his Republican allies are stripping veterans of their benefits and attacking their families, it’s never been more important to stand up for those who have fought and sacrificed for our country and our safety.
**[So Peter, can you split a donation between my campaign and Heartland Patriots today to ensure we continue to have leaders in Congress who will fight back against these horrible Republican attacks?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93351?refcode=em20250810-9239&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9239%2E614464%2ERlPpWB)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93352?refcode=em20250810-9239&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=9239%2E614464%2ERlPpWB) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93352?refcode=em20250810-9239&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=9239%2E614464%2ERlPpWB) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93352?refcode=em20250810-9239&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=9239%2E614464%2ERlPpWB) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93352?refcode=em20250810-9239&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=9239%2E614464%2ERlPpWB) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93352?refcode=em20250810-9239&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=9239%2E614464%2ERlPpWB) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93352?refcode=em20250810-9239&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=9239%2E614464%2ERlPpWB) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93351?refcode=em20250810-9239&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9239%2E614464%2ERlPpWB)
---
As Representative for Riverside County, I serve one of the largest veteran populations in the United States — and I’m committed to working for those who have sacrificed so much for our nation.
That’s why I’m disgusted by the Trump administration’s mistreatment of veterans and active duty service members, from cutting funding from programs that help veterans avoid housing insecurity and homelessness, to issuing an executive order allowing VA hospital doctors to refuse to treat Democrats and unmarried veterans, to cutting benefits and gutting the Department of Veterans Affairs.
**[I’m fighting back against these terrible attacks, but I need your help, Peter. Please split a donation between my campaign and Heartland Patriots today to elect Democrats who will protect our veterans.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93351?refcode=em20250810-9239&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9239%2E614464%2ERlPpWB)**

clean_body: We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war A message from our sponsor... | | | | | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war. | | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian Victor Davis Hanson of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. body:
Your health care is at risk. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113079568/562573018/823540626?refcode=ea.c614eb80-0676-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.c614eb80-0676-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjE0ZWI4MC0wNjc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XJIL84xoQMLLffUz65lJSrzHiCA4yh14716ea8e7f3M=&emci=bf14eb80-0676-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=c614eb80-0676-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=17205535)
**Peter, Republicans said they wouldn’t try to cut Medicaid or Medicare._They lied._** Since we signed Medicaid Expansion into law, more than 670,000 of our neighbors in North Carolina have gotten covered and been able to access the care they need. Now, our Medicaid Expansion — and coverage for millions more Americans across the country — is at risk by Washington Republicans’ massive federal funding cuts. Getting Medicaid Expansion in North Carolina took a decade of work, persistent negotiation, and teamwork. I can tell you that we had to fight like hell to get this done. And we eventually got to a bipartisan agreement to get it done. Peter, I’m ready to fight to protect Medicaid Expansion, and all the progress we’ve made, for all Americans — but I need your help. **[Will you join me and demand Republicans keep their promise to protect Medicaid and Medicare? Add your name here >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113079571/562573022/1862754686?refcode=ea.c614eb80-0676-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.c614eb80-0676-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjE0ZWI4MC0wNjc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XJIL84xoQMLLffUz65lJSrzHiCA4yh14716ea8e7f3M=&emci=bf14eb80-0676-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=c614eb80-0676-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=17205535)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113079573/562573024/1862754686?refcode=ea.c614eb80-0676-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.c614eb80-0676-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjE0ZWI4MC0wNjc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XJIL84xoQMLLffUz65lJSrzHiCA4yh14716ea8e7f3M=&emci=bf14eb80-0676-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=c614eb80-0676-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=17205535)

clean_body: Your health care is at risk. | Peter, Republicans said they wouldn’t try to cut Medicaid or Medicare.They lied. Since we signed Medicaid Expansion into law, more than 670,000 of our neighbors in North Carolina have gotten covered and been able to access the care they need. Now, our Medicaid Expansion — and coverage for millions more Americans across the country — is at risk by Washington Republicans’ massive federal funding cuts. Getting Medicaid Expansion in North Carolina took a decade of work, persistent negotiation, and teamwork. I can tell you that we had to fight like hell to get this done. And we eventually got to a bipartisan agreement to get it done. Peter, I’m ready to fight to protect Medicaid Expansion, and all the progress we’ve made, for all Americans — but I need your help. | Thank you for joining with me, Roy Cooper Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. = = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: In Case You Missed It: Young Voters Are Switching Sides
body:
Plus, Mark’s Big Predator Capture 🎯 No Doubt About It Podcast for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=ef850a36bc&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | | This one is different.

It’s deep, eye-opening, and packed with moments you’ll be thinking about all week.

🎧 Watch the **No Doubt About It Podcast** with Mark & Krysty Ronchetti → 👉 [Here](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d6aa4f7fdc&e=567664f14c)
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=06cd3754ca&e=567664f14c)
| | **🔥 Young Voters Are Waking Up**

They were promised the American Dream — but now, it’s out of reach. And young men? They’ve had enough. The numbers show a massive political shift as Gen Z and Millennial men move toward the Republican Party.

We break it down — and explain how some voters are now supporting politicians as different as Donald Trump and Zohran Mamdani. You read that right. **There’s a political realignment happening, and we dive into it.**
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=2748d4c8f2&e=567664f14c)
---
| | **📰 Media Trust is Collapsing**

As more young people leave traditional news behind, we look at why the media's one-sided coverage is backfiring — and how it’s damaging both journalism and the nation.
**🙏 Gen Z Men Are Turning Toward Faith**

Krysty goes deep into why more young men are seeking faith, meaning, and fatherhood — and how this surprising trend could reshape American families and culture. Plus, hear powerful words from NFL legend Jared Allen on what really matters in life: faith and family.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=ac97843ff4&e=567664f14c)
---
| | **📸 Sunday Game Day: A Predator on Camera**

It finally happened. Mark captured video of the big predator he’s been hunting with his trail cams in the northern mountains. We show you the must-see footage and talk about what it means for wildlife in high-altitude country. You won’t believe your eyes.
---
|
---

✅ **LIKE** the episode on[ ](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=64e8bcf0b3&e=567664f14c)[YouTube ](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=eec209e798&e=567664f14c)

✅ **RATE & REVIEW** us on [your favorite podcast platform](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=3347a287a7&e=567664f14c)

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: $300 billion to fight homelessness
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The housing crisis is getting worse.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250810-5323-footer&t=1&akid=5323%2E420207%2E89JKdc)
Peter,
In Seattle and cities across the country, people in our communities are living in tents, cars, and crowded shelters. Not because they’ve done anything wrong, but because our country refuses to treat housing as a human right.
**That has to change.**
That’s why recently, I introduced the **Housing is a Human Right Act** with Representative Grace Meng and a coalition of progressive lawmakers. This legislation invests more than _$300 billion_ in affordable housing, services, and humane, community-based solutions to end homelessness in America.
**Because homelessness isn’t a personal failure. It’s a failure of policy and priorities.**
In my home district of Seattle, more than 16,000 people experience homelessness on any given night. Washington state now has the **third-highest** homeless population in the nation. And yet, Trump and Republicans just pushed through massive tax breaks for billionaires while slashing food assistance and healthcare.
This is what we’re up against, Peter. We need investments in housing and care, not more punishment and neglect.
[**If you believe housing is a human right, pitch in $3 or more today to help us build the political power to get this done.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250810-1?refcode=em20250810-5323&amount=3&refcode2=5323_420207_89JKdc&akid=5323%2E420207%2E89JKdc)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250810-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250810-5323&refcode2=5323_420207_89JKdc&akid=5323%2E420207%2E89JKdc)**
We have the solutions. We just need the will to act.
Thank you for standing with me,
Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250810-5323-footer&t=2&refcode2=5323_420207_89JKdc&akid=5323%2E420207%2E89JKdc)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Ted Cruz
subject: This wouldn’t have been possible without you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
History has been made, and now it’s time for you to step in and ensure we can continue our work | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=cf89b1121dc64a748662eb2bb116e2a8&_e=d4AOm0i56tkSJvtpF0fQb1PyhEE2mHfhKTgQXt359hD3FsWDhtRUCat77NFZcXfZz5QoaVQGfwoqwREwtjBDmyhqsIeiBT_U1OnTtbwV6YeGf7w5zu8SmzzGsenZ5ikbLR2RuSwDCSyHRz16uRYKfp9I2Q_oF4CxrstUurA7_2udumdJYLN3In2Egw5MnrOGM7F9vRqtOELITivguE5qKfIWgAbizgYSWZ8urExFVddzr7Ceb1eqk9ACep6NYlRANM10KHNnKEMaMNI-p5jiYWVq3GHAdtyOxLCk-Ehur2X165dXEA8zak2vDnFOdcWWwg5LMv4h9r2ohR6NcmTZ3PmrWNEUFZPdpHsE2lAc31FI3WirgMnkT7fKB_qi4ONMBz2-J_gbq58JKL587PAYZO4c-M1FWR2UEg3QyQ6tRlOEo-y46nQG-xcaMCsWIMlNsqkFTUHWPwrA_Ro-MNwvtLx6nrY5F_cyZpW8ARV_QMICGhXxQgFjjKQ2sHzlhZoKvD3d5Wg_qhbeRHNZY0IacH6iLmdLHdaysdgNJIgyTu_f-25vmvhnS1CRumy2M5tpB01NYOiGirvGbBfJrSAa1FsEzMrPf09D2gmjHvakt3P6ZKnT47FHprT1Ro77ANls3RrWKTpB9IJHiFxFQ3uUcjA981__mmtGZ5j5yNGdtJT55pPVVVV4pSrjio5WpUqqUqjaPbPSrQtT-8AuBKKaDZjdZmGc1o8lKeS024993fM8rAg65DkYECpxyelc02WeLrT9XViSYz9BEA-fSWjT3Jh_i63BqpMe6apy_dmeSJzn4VrYElrQ75tiNPM3Pr7bQOdZLTx2F9sjFRwtZKLpdK8drl74fceF6s_E2-UkKMHqJsoaneWOFcLqeeZNwQQttzuRA3FS-9fVhniSQb6fgQ%3D%3D)

---

Fellow Conservative,

**I need to ask you something that might feel small — but matters a lot.**

**Will you[chip in just $1](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=cf89b1121dc64a748662eb2bb116e2a8&_e=d4AOm0i56tkSJvtpF0fQb1PyhEE2mHfhKTgQXt359hD3FsWDhtRUCat77NFZcXfZz5QoaVQGfwoqwREwtjBDmyhqsIeiBT_U1OnTtbwV6YeGf7w5zu8SmzzGsenZ5ikbLR2RuSwDCSyHRz16uRYKfp9I2Q_oF4CxrstUurA7_2udumdJYLN3In2Egw5MnrOGM7F9vRqtOELITivguE5qKfIWgAbizgYSWZ8urExFVddzr7Ceb1eqk9ACep6NYlRANM10KHNnKEMaMNI-p5jiYWVq3GHAdtyOxLCk-Ehur2X165dXEA8zak2vDnFOdcWWwg5LMv4h9r2ohR6NcmTZ3PmrWNEUFZPdpHsE2lAc31E10r9EotSPK7cvYW7pSUXwvf_CZ5FQ40Ooze35N-93_-hzX0pXFvEPIPEzYH0AXrhGH84FCt5mgj4Q_NmV658dW6aIg0bNtqMIUIJ0c_RmPiwTw0DhsSmThWJ-HNEP2we0EKnFv7_7UqXaJr_kBvgUvN17TOe44aNZyPFdw0PZ_Y9UyZjizJa78sRggWLCw5g9b1Xara-MlICgUwpT5WzszO5ZJGnkaSQ_BRmgl9Y0p6HYjUetTKPl2BR0YMrtYjGe-1-2mIewDSePcB4DS11bq1BT7bqtJwkncuMShA7F6n-MZ_eGTpiDAEWFKudgJTRIbe4zyL6HrwXNqDFQkTe_g1dwehGTkcCflKo2vZz55GBeCItf3mz87WxlPi9mRpi9OE8tuhqpA6tP3wqUUKUKeJR8udtRwGMmMDa3VXZhLEeS6BNxxngEcO0vKn7Za2TeRyx5y-2roJvnHlIkkzztgFFA8fr_Zdh8AMFYkCYFeoO9nWtquSNaklhZRu_I14KKecmvKNuycucBmwr5f0RXiCnz6cNew7nilZk62cjInw%3D%3D) today to help us stop the Democrats from taking the Senate?
**
You may not have donated in a while. I get it. But if you ever believed in what we’ve done together — the tax cuts, the conservative judges, the border wall — **[I’m asking you to come off the sidelines for just one dollar.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=cf89b1121dc64a748662eb2bb116e2a8&_e=d4AOm0i56tkSJvtpF0fQb1PyhEE2mHfhKTgQXt359hD3FsWDhtRUCat77NFZcXfZz5QoaVQGfwoqwREwtjBDmyhqsIeiBT_U1OnTtbwV6YeGf7w5zu8SmzzGsenZ5ikbLR2RuSwDCSyHRz16uRYKfp9I2Q_oF4CxrstUurA7_2udumdJYLN3In2Egw5MnrOGM7F9vRqtOELITivguE5qKfIWgAbizgYSWZ8urExFVddzr7Ceb1eqk9ACep6NYlRANM10KHNnKEMaMNI-p5jiYWVq3GHAdtyOxLCk-Ehur2X165dXEA8zak2vDnFOdcWWwg5LMv4h9r2ohR6NcmTZ3PmrWNEUFZPdpHsE2lAc31EEitT3BYMGOGMWWQx_W626Wdf2X2i42KukX9jNAXk41mDLLUyIngwDvH3iOn7mJV5me2MC_JtoP24byyas6j47Qqaj2s0Cdre8BDiCfFJ7RU2ajTN-IDQbqvgm6j24DGC3K9lxSmlLVpdW5E57pPuSJfD6HxEOgOXVs_5RWbqIrpixVnrYgEKNOXDm_dXzWp89gkySM3snk_E-EDjv4oNHB1ocawv4GYk8PoLGCct8c7ey3WYrWgZ3QQCByTVQC-hbmP-aE02yAO3zvKrbBf4bgtVA0924KI9pF82Xeti6phmleIOG_hhRumYQf1w7ZnCQotmRpv4N0uUvxwt182uRZ4KzX2YaHrVzq-z5Pp_-E8Gh59lbbuFFCvJH657OMxDHK2XEy0eI4hOooc0zAALZHiE8Wl3fCjBtsdOyaj9yk6501xnWjXkz94m9wX0elbggwDB2HuNcNcfacBIQsmt1Zgf00bvG5LVj5eS2X7BqJWqBvZvgHf0xzCg9eABGfDqTVlJbtdf5pdLeahSb2OF85C8UtT1qIx8bTKOBFCWxDg%3D%3D) **

Because just a couple weeks ago, while you were going about your life, the Senate passed President Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” and it was signed into law just days later. We pulled an all-nighter to get it done. Why?

Because i**t locks in permanent tax relief, imposes work requirements for welfare, and invests over $170 BILLION into border security, including:**
1. $46.5 billion for the wall
2. $45 billion to expand detention facilities
3. $29.9 billion to hire 10,000 new ICE agents

This is real progress — the kind we dreamed about just a few years ago. But now the Democrats smell blood. They’re outraising us, outspending us, and targeting our Senate seats — even in red states.

**They want revenge.**

If we lose this next election, everything we just won could vanish. They’ll tear it all down.

That’s why I’m writing you — not for $10, not for $100 — just for $1. Not because $1 will flip the Senate, but because it’s a signal that you haven’t given up.

clean_body: History has been made, and now it’s time for you to step in and ensure we can continue our work | Fellow Conservative, I need to ask you something that might feel small — but matters a lot. Will you today to help us stop the Democrats from taking the Senate? You may not have donated in a while. I get it. But if you ever believed in what we’ve done together — the tax cuts, the conservative judges, the border wall — Because just a couple weeks ago, while you were going about your life, the Senate passed President Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” and it was signed into law just days later. We pulled an all-nighter to get it done. Why? Because it locks in permanent tax relief, imposes work requirements for welfare, and invests over $170 BILLION into border security, including: 1. $46.5 billion for the wall 2. $45 billion to expand detention facilities 3. $29.9 billion to hire 10,000 new ICE agents This is real progress — the kind we dreamed about just a few years ago. But now the Democrats smell blood. They’re outraising us, outspending us, and targeting our Senate seats — even in red states. They want revenge. If we lose this next election, everything we just won could vanish. They’ll tear it all down. That’s why I’m writing you — not for $10, not for $100 — just for $1. Not because $1 will flip the Senate, but because it’s a signal that you haven’t given up. Your name on our donor list tells me we’re not alone — that this still matters to you. When Republicans see 10,000 patriots step up with just one dollar, it tells our entire movement: we’re still in this fight. You stood with us once. I hope you’ll stand with us again — For America, Ted Cruz U.S. Senator - Texas | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265

name: Steel River GoPack
subject: When the grid goes down, what will you do!..
body:
You don’t need a bunker. You need this...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21767/6374453/c57e37f44275a071ddc18bee52ed591ed372d2ff/586d352379f1f48f45acaf06fa3d3380b9a1b5f5)
