---
| | Hey, Not trying to be dramatic, but if the last few years have taught us anything, it’s this: **You can’t count on the system to bail you out.** That’s why we’re giving away 200 of our **Steel River Go Packs**. It’s a simple survival kit we built for regular people who just want to be a little more prepared. It’s got:
* Waterproof matches
* A tough little multitool
* Solar charger
* Headlamp
* Emergency baton — flashlight, area light, and flashing red SOS mode with a magnetic base
* And a spork that’s actually kind of badass

No fluff. Just useful gear. Just pay shipping and it's yours. If you've been meaning to get your act together — even just a little — this is an easy first step. [Get your free Go Pack here while they’re still available](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21767/6374453/b084e3d434dbcc7ca5f35906e998b9f30fa895bb/586d352379f1f48f45acaf06fa3d3380b9a1b5f5) Stay sharp,
– Mike
Steel River Team P.S. These usually go fast when we open up a new batch. If the link doesn’t work, we’re out.

We thought you may be interested to receive this breaking news alert.

Illinois Review is the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump.

THE CONSTITUTIONAL CASE FOR IMPEACHING OBAMA FOR TREASON AND SABOTAGING AN ELECTION (https://stonezone.com/the-constitutional-case-for-impeaching-obama-for-treason-and-sabotaging-an-election/?fbclid=IwY2xjawMDHoVleHRuA2FlbQIxMQABHmxzN0nN2SdybESnv_gAMHYEtA1SJAT1O4i3cCZMzpoOD0J-4e5fkDA2ql3Y_aem__Tx8j5PeVIjE4Qyorx5jfw&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fb319014c8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://stonezone.com/the-constitutional-case-for-impeaching-obama-for-treason-and-sabotaging-an-election/?fbclid=IwY2xjawMDHoVleHRuA2FlbQIxMQABHmxzN0nN2SdybESnv_gAMHYEtA1SJAT1O4i3cCZMzpoOD0J-4e5fkDA2ql3Y_aem__Tx8j5PeVIjE4Qyorx5jfw&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fb319014c8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
By Illinois Review

Since President Donald Trump’s historic victory in 2016, Democrats have relentlessly pushed the now-debunked narrative that his campaign colluded with Russia to sway the election.

They didn’t just question the outcome – they amplified the narrative with politically charged rhetoric that deepened national division.

“The actions of the Trump presidency have revealed the dishonorable fact of the president’s betrayal of his oath of office, betrayal of our national security, and betrayal of the integrity of our elections,” declared Speaker Nancy Pelosi on September 24, 2019.

For four years, Democrats relentlessly pursued Donald Trump – weaponizing investigations and working to delegitimize his presidency. Then, in 2021, they shattered historical precedent by voting to impeach him after he had already left office – an action no former president had ever faced.

Their justification was rooted in Article I, Section 3, Clause 7 of the Constitution; impeachment, they argued, isn’t solely about removal from office – it also serves to bar individuals from ever holding public office again.

But with the recent release of declassified documents by Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard – revealing how the Obama administration manipulated intelligence assessments to sabotage Trump’s 2016 victory – Democrats may have opened a constitutional door they now regret.

Former Trump impeachment attorney David Schoen believes that door swings both ways – and could hit Obama squarely on his legacy.

In a July 27, 2025 appearance on Newsmax, and in a subsequent appearance on The StoneZONE on 77WABC, Schoen laid out what could be the most explosive constitutional argument of our time: that Barack Obama is eligible for impeachment even as a former president.

More significantly, Schoen contends that newly declassified intelligence could implicate Obama in what amounts to a treasonous abuse of power – weaponizing the U.S. intelligence community to interfere in the 2016 election and delegitimize Trump’s presidency through the now-discredited Russia collusion narrative.

If proven true – and the facts increasingly point in that direction – Obama’s alleged orchestration of an intelligence operation against a political opponent under false pretenses wouldn’t merely constitute dirty politics. It could constitute a seditious conspiracy, representing a calculated effort to weaponize the government’s machinery to subvert a democratic election and undermine a duly elected president.

This unprecedented abuse of power is undeniably impeachable.

What’s more, the constitutional precedent set by Trump’s second impeachment could strip Obama of any legal immunity, exposing him to charges ranging from obstruction of justice and abuse of power to perjury.

And even treason. The American people deserve nothing less than equal justice under the law – not political immunity cloaked in the guise of protecting a legacy.

clean_body: view in browser () | update preferences () | unsubscribe () This IR e-Blast Powered By: Dear Peter, We thought you may be interested to receive this breaking news alert. Illinois Review is the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump. Twitter () Facebook () IllinoisReview.com () THE CONSTITUTIONAL CASE FOR IMPEACHING OBAMA FOR TREASON AND SABOTAGING AN ELECTION () By Illinois Review Since President Donald Trump’s historic victory in 2016, Democrats have relentlessly pushed the now-debunked narrative that his campaign colluded with Russia to sway the election. They didn’t just question the outcome – they amplified the narrative with politically charged rhetoric that deepened national division. “The actions of the Trump presidency have revealed the dishonorable fact of the president’s betrayal of his oath of office, betrayal of our national security, and betrayal of the integrity of our elections,” declared Speaker Nancy Pelosi on September 24, 2019. For four years, Democrats relentlessly pursued Donald Trump – weaponizing investigations and working to delegitimize his presidency. Then, in 2021, they shattered historical precedent by voting to impeach him after he had already left office – an action no former president had ever faced. Their justification was rooted in Article I, Section 3, Clause 7 of the Constitution; impeachment, they argued, isn’t solely about removal from office – it also serves to bar individuals from ever holding public office again. But with the recent release of declassified documents by Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard – revealing how the Obama administration manipulated intelligence assessments to sabotage Trump’s 2016 victory – Democrats may have opened a constitutional door they now regret. Former Trump impeachment attorney David Schoen believes that door swings both ways – and could hit Obama squarely on his legacy. In a July 27, 2025 appearance on Newsmax, and in a subsequent appearance on The StoneZONE on 77WABC, Schoen laid out what could be the most explosive constitutional argument of our time: that Barack Obama is eligible for impeachment even as a former president. More significantly, Schoen contends that newly declassified intelligence could implicate Obama in what amounts to a treasonous abuse of power – weaponizing the U.S. intelligence community to interfere in the 2016 election and delegitimize Trump’s presidency through the now-discredited Russia collusion narrative. If proven true – and the facts increasingly point in that direction – Obama’s alleged orchestration of an intelligence operation against a political opponent under false pretenses wouldn’t merely constitute dirty politics. It could constitute a seditious conspiracy, representing a calculated effort to weaponize the government’s machinery to subvert a democratic election and undermine a duly elected president. This unprecedented abuse of power is undeniably impeachable. What’s more, the constitutional precedent set by Trump’s second impeachment could strip Obama of any legal immunity, exposing him to charges ranging from obstruction of justice and abuse of power to perjury. And even treason. The American people deserve nothing less than equal justice under the law – not political immunity cloaked in the guise of protecting a legacy. name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: Congress has the right to know
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=s2GUWa5qI%2BxyWE6%2FwaFO5V6y7Zkcd2gUYnClV0TLKi23HUsm6kZJ0%2BudiqwH%2FdIluHE%2F8n2u3vbl2HpnhViqzmgXINqS0KrIBGtdlufI0oimmx6kbXLBffMsLDyOb2E52ZtRujU4k%2BMk449M2fWC270DbjpYWDmuhsgenxQCQJ4J6EgUTTlnPLJvCP13R3PEoj1TiwNBLPjlFa%2Bosv5XrLwgJM133u1Xfo04inkFwPu8FT7D1PVPba%2FgZt4Cp%2FlOoOYpccAvcnILiWEgPu56RVOXJJjrtx1nSgcVcEdR9IwoYp8COiJNSA00rlVLEkiP%2BlPaY4eBFeGM5hLWnFAgkG55746xLwpUIIGr7Kktz1Tk7tsuq%2FQTN8UJ4DT8HytD1h%2Fdn%2Bd4U0MS7uIdiRAuXe89Nel2IQKRZYeOCTGts7dwv%2BcplDl0DkG4bKqx9SvK]

# [#]
For weeks, I’ve been trying to schedule an oversight visit to the Adelanto ICE facility. As a Member of Congress, I have a legal and constitutional obligation to ensure that people in our district are not being subjected to inhumane conditions.

But the Department of Homeland Security, under Donald Trump’s leadership, has repeatedly stonewalled me.

DHS has continuously changed their policies, delayed our requests, and made excuse after excuse to prevent me and other Democratic Members of Congress from entering the facility.

I don’t need permission from DHS to do my job.

Congress has a constitutional right to conduct oversight. The Trump administration’s attempt to block us is not just unacceptable — it’s unlawful.

Blocking Members of Congress from overseeing ICE detention facilities doesn’t fix any issues at the border, it doesn’t make our communities safer, and it sure doesn’t create solutions. What it does do is chip away at our democracy and puts all of our civil liberties at risk.

Trump and his allies are using federal agencies to avoid scrutiny and punish their political opponents. They want to hide what’s happening behind closed doors — and silence those of us fighting to expose it.

We won’t be intimidated. But I need your help.

Because I am standing up to Trump, his supporters have put me on the target list. MAGA is actively preparing to unseat me in the Midterm Elections, but Team Ruiz is fighting back.

I’m committed to standing up to this dangerous overreach — but I can’t do it alone. Will you contribute $10 to help power our fight for accountability and protect the future of our democracy? >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-aug25?amount=10&refcode=SBD_RR_EM_FR_081025_DETENTIONCENTER_30DO30DNTL_D1_S1_RE

Thank you for standing with me,

Raul
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.

name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: Re: They’re going to rip apart the Voting Rights Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
Texas is trying to rig the game. | |
---
Peter, When Texas Republicans released their rigged congressional map, their Democratic counterparts left the state to keep it from coming to a vote. **Now, Trump’s FBI has agreed to help hunt down the Texas Democrats and force them to return to their legislative session.** This is not what democracy looks like—and the MAGA justices on the Supreme Court are just waiting for the Texas gerrymandering case to come before them so they can rubber-stamp this authoritarian power-grab. [**Congress must act now. name: Deb Haaland
subject: I stand on the shoulders of generations of fierce women
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
History doesn’t just happen. We have to make it together.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3717%2E400544%2ER4uEc6)
I want to take a moment to honor some of the fierce women who made me who I am.
[**First, will you donate $5 to our grassroots campaign for governor to help make history in New Mexico? It’d mean so much to me.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250810_1_fiercewomen?refcode=em20250810-3717&amount=5&refcode2=3717_400544_R4uEc6&akid=3717%2E400544%2ER4uEc6)
From my grandmother, mother and many before them, I am blessed to come from generations of resilient and fierce Pueblo women.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250810_1_fiercewomen?refcode=em20250810-3717&refcode2=3717_400544_R4uEc6&akid=3717%2E400544%2ER4uEc6)
_The fierce women who raised me – plus me in my Garth Brooks tee!_
My mother, Mary Toya, was born and raised in a boxcar, where the Laguna people created a community far from their home. She proudly served in the U.S. Navy, raised four kids as a military wife, and devoted 25 years to Indian education at the Bureau of Indian Affairs.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250810_1_fiercewomen?refcode=em20250810-3717&refcode2=3717_400544_R4uEc6&akid=3717%2E400544%2ER4uEc6)
_Mom served in the Navy and played the snare drum in the Santa Fe Indian Band._
Standing on the shoulders of women who came before me, I summoned the courage to run for office. When I became one of the first Native American women elected to Congress, I swore to leave the ladder down behind me so girls everywhere know they can be _anything_ they want to be.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250810_1_fiercewomen?refcode=em20250810-3717&refcode2=3717_400544_R4uEc6&akid=3717%2E400544%2ER4uEc6)
_Credit: CNN_
But here’s what I’m reminded of: History doesn’t just happen. We have to make it together.
**No state in America has ever elected a Native American woman as governor.[Can you help our campaign make history by chipping in $5 so we can keep up the momentum to win this race?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250810_1_fiercewomen?amount=5&refcode=em20250810-3717&refcode2=3717_400544_R4uEc6&akid=3717%2E400544%2ER4uEc6)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250810_1_fiercewomen?amount=5&refcode=em20250810-3717&refcode2=3717_400544_R4uEc6&akid=3717%2E400544%2ER4uEc6)**
Be fierce,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250810-1&t=2&refcode2=3717_400544_R4uEc6&akid=3717%2E400544%2ER4uEc6)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=3717%2E400544%2ER4uEc6)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=3717%2E400544%2ER4uEc6)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

From my grandmother, mother and many before them, I am blessed to come from generations of resilient and fierce Pueblo women. The fierce women who raised me – plus me in my Garth Brooks tee! My mother, Mary Toya, was born and raised in a boxcar, where the Laguna people created a community far from their home. She proudly served in the U.S. Navy, raised four kids as a military wife, and devoted 25 years to Indian education at the Bureau of Indian Affairs. Mom served in the Navy and played the snare drum in the Santa Fe Indian Band. Standing on the shoulders of women who came before me, I summoned the courage to run for office. When I became one of the first Native American women elected to Congress, I swore to leave the ladder down behind me so girls everywhere know they can be anything they want to be. name: Jon Ossoff for U.S. Senate
subject: Two problems
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter —
Our campaign is facing two big problems right now, and we’re hoping you can lend a hand. Here’s what’s going on:
Problem #1: Our team is reporting that we’re behind on our grassroots fundraising for the month of August. We expect and plan for a bit of a dip through the summer, but things have been even slower than usual.
Problem #2: Two new Republican opponents have entered the race, and GOP-aligned Super PACs are spending _millions_ of dollars on TV and digital ads attacking Jon.
This is not a good combination.
In a race this close, we need to respond quickly or we risk letting our Republican opponents and dark-money Super PACs control the narrative of this race. But fighting back takes resources, which is why we’re asking:
**[Can we count on you to chip in to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign today? Anything you can spare will go a long way in helping our team fight back against right-wing attacks and defend Jon’s seat.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250810-1-f&t=1&akid=625%2E5691347%2ERZ5Mtp)
**[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250810-1-f&t=2&akid=625%2E5691347%2ERZ5Mtp)**
Thanks for everything you’re doing to help Jon win.
Team Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=3&akid=625%2E5691347%2ERZ5Mtp) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=625%2E5691347%2ERZ5Mtp) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

name: Automated Message (via VPP)
subject: FWD: STAND WITH PBS! >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We’re reaching to Democrats who have not added their signature to our time-sensitive letter to PBS.
| | **THIS IS AN AUTOMATED MESSAGE**
* * *
We’re reaching to Democrats who have not added their signature to our time-sensitive letter to PBS, following Trump’s _forced closure_ of the Corporation for Public Broadcasting.

Trump gutted **$1.1 BILLION** from public broadcasting — putting news, children’s shows, and educational programs on the chopping block.

**_We’re FURIOUS — and we’re making sure PBS knows just how many Americans have their back in the fight for the free press!_**

[**We have limited spots left. Please confirm your signature is submitted before we close this letter at midnight:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92922?t=6&akid=20882%2E878179%2ECUKT2i) | [**ADD YOUR NAME WHILE YOU CAN: THANK PBS & STAND WITH PUBLIC BROADCASTING »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92922?t=7&akid=20882%2E878179%2ECUKT2i)
---
Thank you,
Voter Protection Project
**\- - - - - Begin Forwarded Message - - - - -**
FROM: Thank you, PBS ❤️ (via VPP)
TO: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Subject: re: Corporation for Public Broadcasting SHUTS DOWN
**We are DEVASTATED!!!**
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92922?t=8&akid=20882%2E878179%2ECUKT2i)
Trump gutted $1.1 BILLION from public broadcasting — putting news, children’s shows, and educational programs on the chopping block for _years to come._

[**We will NEVER forgive Trump or his MAGA minions for destroying public media! So we’re sending PBS a letter to thank them for their decades of service — and to stand with them in this critical fight »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92922?t=9&akid=20882%2E878179%2ECUKT2i)
[**CHIP IN $3 TO SIGN NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92922?t=10&akid=20882%2E878179%2ECUKT2i)
---
TO: PBS
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. To everyone at PBS,

**Thank you.** From Mr. Rogers to Sesame Street to PBS NewsHour and so much more, your freely available programming has meant so much to millions of Americans!

I am FURIOUS with Trump and the MAGA mob for wiping out your funding, but please know that I have your back in this fight.

**I also know that Trump’s attacks on the free press don’t end here — he wants to shut down MSNBC, CNN, and anyone else who holds him accountable.**

It’s not just upsetting, _it’s a dangerous step towards**outright authoritarianism!**_ That’s why I’m doing everything in my power to stop him.

[**I’m signing this letter today by chipping in $3 to VPP to thank you for your years of service and to join VPP in the fight against Trump’s attacks on the free press. It is _absolutely critical_ that we elect good Democrats who defend public media and our most essential freedoms »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92922?t=11&akid=20882%2E878179%2ECUKT2i) | [**CHIP IN $3 TO SIGN NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92922?t=12&akid=20882%2E878179%2ECUKT2i)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
_\- The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20882%2E878179%2ECUKT2i). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20882%2E878179%2ECUKT2i).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20882%2E878179%2ECUKT2i) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=20882%2E878179%2ECUKT2i). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20882%2E878179%2ECUKT2i)

Trump gutted $1.1 BILLION from public broadcasting — putting news, children’s shows, and educational programs on the chopping block. We’re FURIOUS — and we’re making sure PBS knows just how many Americans have their back in the fight for the free press! | Thank you, Voter Protection Project \- - - - - Begin Forwarded Message - - - - - FROM: Thank you, PBS ❤️ (via VPP) TO: dpwillis67@gmail.com Subject: re: Corporation for Public Broadcasting SHUTS DOWN We are DEVASTATED!!! Trump gutted $1.1 BILLION from public broadcasting — putting news, children’s shows, and educational programs on the chopping block for years to come. TO: PBS FROM: A grateful Democrat Subject: Thank you. To everyone at PBS, Thank you. From Mr. Rogers to Sesame Street to PBS NewsHour and so much more, your freely available programming has meant so much to millions of Americans! I am FURIOUS with Trump and the MAGA mob for wiping out your funding, but please know that I have your back in this fight. I also know that Trump’s attacks on the free press don’t end here — he wants to shut down MSNBC, CNN, and anyone else who holds him accountable. It’s not just upsetting, it’s a dangerous step towardsoutright authoritarianism! That’s why I’m doing everything in my power to stop him. | X A grateful Democrat \- The Voter Protection Project | | Paid for by VPP (www.protectvoting.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104 The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps. Please, consider making a . Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a.** to request fewer emails. Click here to . | |

body:
| | | **** Elizabeth Guzman just got an “F” ... _from the National Rifle Association._ _[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6EamYIQ3Jhpog8q_lJ17iZutLSQ3O4hzEpVkQPG_pTIkNNwSYqO9QZj4WxJpRikGQy86zjl-jLvDrCtdqmJwAylOukUNrgQaMziKr1TNl9zOb2majDaWgJSZRWOpLlp9jx7rHKM_O47HpeD6FtVbG9pIGBdfofg1Yml6oOCX_BHydG0xjSLGfG9j3ObN63J7PEn43YQs935w1GgF2PAPix1WoGnH-zUWVY9k12DCtPMn/4ix/XSo3Tm5wTMWFj-0Z2BAeUQ/h0/h001.6R0wDrhBCDnzajFl2Keqrz1nLp06xd6rQCpWl3bc64c)
_ As a former VA State Delegate, Elizabeth Guzman helped pass some of the strongest gun safety laws in Virginia’s history - including universal background checks and a crackdown on interstate gun trafficking. Now, she’s running to return to the VA House of Delegates against Ian Lovejoy - who proudly sports an NRA “A.” **Democrats are defending a 51-49 majority in the Virginia House of Delegates this November.** **The nonpartisan election forecasters at State Navigate say Elizabeth has a good chance to FLIP VA-HD22 blue.** Instead of the NRA, Elizabeth is a proud Moms Demand Action Gun Sense Candidate. _We need your help to win._ [**With less than 90 days to go, it’s now or never. Stand up to the NRA and donate to Elizabeth Guzman’s red to blue Democrat [Elizabeth Guzman](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.xqm-apKpWqGuZCDDu9wrxXA8maWDG4HvFsLVwyj62A-TR-eCz9TlnPXgIo2Bk1lkaO43mANZZBCzoYKr7f-l8jZ44ZK5eQN6nb7hfYnT2KE3sFs8ligHNFi_Jc2xCPFQCiQhvXNt7nDTxPfDQsuZxi-l2c-SyhwnXasUD6lxlGzZU_L7T6nBNQoUDfVdKTDrqcZVBxsgBP1-gQlJXJd4quq_YElphNztdaLMm0ZCdKGbabFgOeLQTtuilSd2W3GK61TecYa0kJNBNdc3AxsagZgMijwH6CiyKuRSxzdZdcc/4ix/XSo3Tm5wTMWFj-0Z2BAeUQ/h13/h001.FLj4SgGLb4FTvrMVRb6-FxOa7oNnwv0R3F078ZSUZdU) is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. clean_body: | | | ** Elizabeth Guzman just got an “F” ... from the National Rifle Association. As a former VA State Delegate, Elizabeth Guzman helped pass some of the strongest gun safety laws in Virginia’s history - including universal background checks and a crackdown on interstate gun trafficking. Now, she’s running to return to the VA House of Delegates against Ian Lovejoy - who proudly sports an NRA “A.” Democrats are defending a 51-49 majority in the Virginia House of Delegates this November. The nonpartisan election forecasters at State Navigate say Elizabeth has a good chance to FLIP VA-HD22 blue.** Instead of the NRA, Elizabeth is a proud Moms Demand Action Gun Sense Candidate. We need your help to win. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support, Team Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=081025_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=081025_1&amount=20]

body:
What happens on the border is killing Hoosiers. Let’s stop it now. | | | [](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/a57X0ex6KX-dgX4YxDhhtrbUICjRhQV7URJxakLL5NQ-OjbbOODchbyRAxa7_se9UvBdIJsD0mBQ2QnKJ0s4vFkaQd8moskbNOcIpPfN_2yzmVkBYcOhP_VocBKbaf6YZjDzeYzxfQ0IAGXJ1th8IqDMwyiIdg9Qzwscg7clIAnUyO69t5flHMF-YFDLZjLfdJUMPLbF3S_eo4QVLtO8VCOiHnSMuqB2WNwTLNMfbRSAOyvJN9wQ8d070etKAnIzuwRnnF2FudPDfqSp_peOEoZr2fZQZeaw6J1hexiYx7Dp2VzSw7CBgZg0rGgCENXXtV5TPG3zj8sHUsEYMHmN-aF9oMJHAEdN3Ntvaxb3FaPItHMJebk0KjMQJk5mBGv1eMVjvl_CkzCXJ3tOI_eeEpaJmdNC717PuUv400MXp40r_VmV9SgJeDGmnQ1vhW3HcJVsKx1HGxrFgz3vn0blmmexXRnOCCN0kghS4CtIynXEI9A0ylts7emLLoj9iEwXejJlhSDwZ_J4fq2SxTFiifQCPFio1FMKMlqipxf_vptscJEciDCepsve6JsCxGgxEtB8LaZyUYipr6o5qWhjiORTdkZCZnA15OcilDWXkA/u4CVsWQQgxFc0_6G85dTCZamz2IHSfZ7/11)

Fellow Republican, **This is what the Left’s open-border policies have done:**
🚨Fentanyl is now the **#1 killer** of Americans 18-45.
🚨Cartels are **using social media to target** Hoosier teens.
🚨Our **law enforcement is outmanned** and under attack.
Indiana Republicans aren’t waiting around. **We’ve taken real action:**

name: The Democratic Party
subject: Our Senate roadmap
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
---
Derek, To stop Trump’s agenda in its tracks, we _need_ to take back the Senate. Today, we’re going to ask you to [**make a contribution to the DNC to support that work.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?refcode=em_20250810_4232_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4232_22930333_WhCEZe&akid=4232%2E22930333%2EWhCEZe) But first, we’re going to share exactly what it will take to win a Senate majority: 🔵 We need to defend Jon Ossoff’s seat in Georgia, in what will undoubtedly be a very tight race. 🔵 We need to hold open Democratic-held seats in Michigan, Minnesota, and New Hampshire. 🔴 We need to win an open Republican-held seat in North Carolina — a state where nail-biter elections are the norm. 🔴 We need to flip at least three more Republican-held seats in states like Maine, Ohio, and Texas. **Winning all of these races will require strong statewide organizing programs. It will also require us putting in the work _now_ to reach voters and ensure they’re hearing Democrats’ message.** That’s exactly what we’re focused on. We recently launched our Organizing Summer program, which is working _right now_ to register voters, train volunteers, and make sure Americans are aware of the harm Trump is inflicting. We’re investing $1 million a month in Democratic state parties to ensure they’ve got the resources they need on the local and state level. We’ve held more than 130 town halls in all 50 states, listening to voters in every part of the country. [**But this is just the beginning. Derek, can you chip in $3 to the DNC today to help fund our long-term work? name: Georgia HQ
subject: SIGNATURE NEEDED: Pass the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
It's time to strengthen the Voting Rights Act of 1965

If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/502xl98alkm3J5MS-c04xA2?unsubscribedata=vM1kpXDZHTTOl%2Fpxox7MYaccInW1RigTdt0aBNHPno4kRFXJoG4uoVZ6Uk1GnDqkT7xNMDXnD2toarcbGg6NPom30MrgG93gO45MyckvoXHkEDT6uqml9wOd%2Ft%2Fmwa6AA%2FmpPYPXtEEnrePk0mCTkrAopPr%2BtkVuTKTzwJjwdT4M1GijBnmwvs9a%2Fg1j7volNBYU%2Fwt6fMIe2w26p2sEfBgL4Ay97mGup5EBYfsWt3kXhNtr4qFSyx%2Fn6eAv%2FCesWg8FVqby76XPNVlTCI%2FI8ejLOqgWqGj7IR6xfXSaMGCZpY0UvOm7B9hiIKh5ltyGGnOMkbgJF8IW8llKQvCatuZeuNvnDJURDuewA0vQBjzqJoITeP8ZZku0S8aSDSZKTBdOejvwfRlgsaIqpaTCsJNijfAR9XNhTFAolN2ag%2FHBbOKGBf41FdBRTBHKKhV7)
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113085000/562593510/2021534627?source=SBD_DPG_EM_EN_081025_VRAA_D1_S1_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmVlZmQyMy0xYTc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3jACUBwCN31KOHU5UvjZU5xdULz-R2VdpyrdOXV8Vto=)
---
Peter, We won’t lie: We’re terrified by what’s going on in Georgia and across the country under the Republican regime. In just the first six months of this administration, we’ve witnessed unprecedented attacks on our democracy. That’s why Rev. Raphael Warnock is championing the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act (VRAA) to protect voters’ rights and safeguard our democracy. But we need to show Rev. Raphael Warnock our **_overwhelming support_** as he fights to advance this critical bill. [Will you help us reach 5,000 signatures by midnight to show Rev. Warnock that Georgia is behind him all the way? →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113085001/562593511/1987127436?source=SBD_DPG_EM_EN_081025_VRAA_D1_S1_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmVlZmQyMy0xYTc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3jACUBwCN31KOHU5UvjZU5xdULz-R2VdpyrdOXV8Vto=&emci=210f54bf-1076-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=5feefd23-1a76-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=43566853) | | **[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113085002/562593512/1987127436?source=SBD_DPG_EM_EN_081025_VRAA_D1_S1_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmVlZmQyMy0xYTc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3jACUBwCN31KOHU5UvjZU5xdULz-R2VdpyrdOXV8Vto=&emci=210f54bf-1076-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=5feefd23-1a76-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=43566853)**
---
Here’s the scary truth: Right now, in Georgia, the Secretary of State’s office is purging nearly **_half a million_** registered voters from the voter rolls — **one of the largest voter purges in our state’s history.**
This is exactly why we need leaders like Rev. Warnock to step in and take action.
The VRAA will restore and strengthen voter protections against anti-democratic practices like the voter purges we’re seeing right now in Georgia.
Democratic leaders are united behind Rev. Warnock in support of this bill, but we’re missing the most important voice: **_yours._**

name: David Hogg
subject: It’s not always going to be a big moment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Moments like these demand action. But our work never stops.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250807-1&t=1&akid=2501%2E587540%2E9HWjaT)
Hey Peter, it's David.
The last few weeks have been... _a lot._
* We announced our plan to primary asleep-at-the-wheel Democrats.
* I got removed from my Vice Chair role at the DNC.
* Trump threatened to start a war with Iran.
* CBS canceled The Late Show with Stephen Colbert.
* Texas Dems broke quorum to stop a corrupt GOP redistricting scheme.

Moments like these are loud. They _demand_ action.
And thank God we have a movement that does act.
We saw a wave of grassroots support flood in during these moments. **That’s powerful.**
But there’s a catch, Peter:
**Every day isn’t a big news day. Not every week makes headlines.**
And still — we have to keep going. Every damn day.
Because if we only show up when it’s trending, _we’re going to lose_.
Our endorsed candidates are fighting this fight every single day. They’re out there knocking doors, building coalitions, organizing communities, and holding the line.
And that means we need your support — not just during the chaos. All the time.
[**If you believe in electing bold young leaders to fight for our future, I’m asking you to start a monthly donation today. Donating $5 — or anything you can commit to — each month gives us the stability to keep doing this work.** ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250810_1_bigmoments?refcode=em20250810-2501&amount=5&recurring=true&refcode2=2501_587540_9HWjaT&akid=2501%2E587540%2E9HWjaT)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250810_1_bigmoments?amount=5&refcode=em20250810-2501&recurring=true&refcode2=2501_587540_9HWjaT&akid=2501%2E587540%2E9HWjaT)**
_Use the links in this email to start a recurring contribution to Leaders We Deserve._
Your support, especially on a monthly basis, helps us forecast our resources, build campaigns, train candidates, and win races that no one else believes we can win.
The people we’re up against?
They’re counting on us to get tired. To burn out. To move on.
But we’re not going anywhere.
In solidarity,
David Hogg
Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve
P.S. If a monthly gift isn’t doable right now, that’s totally okay. A one-time donation makes a real difference, too. The status quo isn’t going to shake itself — let’s go disrupt it together. [**Contribute $5 or anything that makes sense today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250810_1_bigmoments?refcode=em20250810-2501&amount=5&refcode2=2501_587540_9HWjaT&akid=2501%2E587540%2E9HWjaT)
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250807-1&t=2&refcode2=2501_587540_9HWjaT&akid=2501%2E587540%2E9HWjaT)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2501%2E587540%2E9HWjaT)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2501%2E587540%2E9HWjaT)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE

Washington, DC 20003

name: Truth HURTS
subject: Republicans fled to protect a pedophile. Democrats fled to protect democracy.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ISAIAH MARTIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/IRM_wrapper-email.jpg]
friend, hey — it’s Isaiah Martin.
Let’s get one thing straight:
Governor Abbott could release flood relief today with the stroke of a pen. He could have done it three weeks ago.
But that’s not what this special session is about. It’s about stealing congressional seats for a convicted pedophile and his MAGA cronies .
Republicans want you to believe they’re “showing up in the storm.” In reality? They’re showing up to redraw maps, rig elections, and protect a man who assaulted a 13-year-old all while Texans are still cleaning mud out of their living rooms.
Democrats left the state for one reason: to protect democracy from a gerrymandering power grab that would lock Republicans into power for a generation.
If their party cared about Texans, they'd pass flood relief now instead of holding it hostage for Donald Trump .
If we want leaders who put people over party, we have to send them to Congress. That means building the movement now, because MAGA isn’t slowing down.
Chip in today to fight back against the lies [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin]

clean_body: [] friend, hey — it’s Isaiah Martin. Let’s get one thing straight: Governor Abbott could release flood relief today with the stroke of a pen. He could have done it three weeks ago. But that’s not what this special session is about. It’s about stealing congressional seats for a convicted pedophile and his MAGA cronies . Republicans want you to believe they’re “showing up in the storm.” In reality? They’re showing up to redraw maps, rig elections, and protect a man who assaulted a 13-year-old all while Texans are still cleaning mud out of their living rooms. Democrats left the state for one reason: to protect democracy from a gerrymandering power grab that would lock Republicans into power for a generation. If their party cared about Texans, they'd pass flood relief now instead of holding it hostage for Donald Trump . If we want leaders who put people over party, we have to send them to Congress. That means building the movement now, because MAGA isn’t slowing down. name: Team Crow
subject: Co-sign if you agree: No more stock trading in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Members of Congress shouldn’t be able to trade individual stocks. Period.

That’s why Jason Crow has introduced the TRUST in Congress Act , a bipartisan bill to ban Members of Congress, their spouses, and dependent children from profiting off the nonpublic information they access in office.

Americans deserve leaders who serve the public , not their personal stock portfolios.

Add your name now as a citizen co-sponsor of the TRUST in Congress Act. [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/ban-stock-training-1]

BECOME A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/ban-stock-training-1]

This legislation would:

✅ Require lawmakers to divest or move their investments into blind trusts
✅ Ban stock trading by spouses and dependent children of Members
✅ Make compliance public and enforceable
✅ Restore trust in government through real accountability

This shouldn’t be controversial, but Donald Trump and his allies are fighting hard to protect the corrupt status quo.

We need to build a massive grassroots coalition to show just how much public support exists for this simple, commonsense reform. Will you sign on today as a grassroots co-sponsor? [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/ban-stock-training-1]

Thank you.

— Team Crow
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States

# [Nuclear Moon?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=170567619&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwNTY3NjE5LCJpYXQiOjE3NTQ4NTI3MDEsImV4cCI6MTc1NzQ0NDcwMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.OIq3lPT6cqMOpkizrZBXgvC9LnALu4UF1nXVuuxhG6M)
### Plans for a lunar reactor point to an accelerating space race
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)

| [](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=170567619&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwNTY3NjE5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NDg1MjcwMSwiZXhwIjoxNzU3NDQ0NzAxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTY2MTk5OSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.lRhWi8H6hcqR6qxKA3yErOEEdVuUaf1txxH8YZ0gSvg&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mansharamani/p/nuclear-moon?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/67a9c91d-a915-49f2-827f-b87234ba066d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Transportation Secretary and interim NASA Administrator Sean Duffy recently revealed the Administration's [plans to build a nuclear reactor on the Moon](https://substack.com/redirect/2f678a2c-2b79-452b-8856-c5d8533061f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). For anyone who may doubt that we're currently in the middle of a new space race, it's time to acknowledge reality: geopolitical competition has already moved beyond Earth.
While the idea of nuclear power on the moon isn't new (NASA has kicked around this [idea](https://substack.com/redirect/ac411876-838f-4aea-9b36-6a7c2b47264e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) before), the upcoming announcement will likely contain a specific timeline. The US is aiming to build a 100-kilowatt nuclear reactor on the Moon by 2030. The reactor being developed will produce [enough electricity to power about 80 homes](https://substack.com/redirect/dfba0d08-cd87-437f-9fb6-1cc748bc88bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c01b1b89-017e-425a-abb8-4de5e1100b91?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: [BBC](https://substack.com/redirect/b56a4c42-85bd-4052-b046-097a22f523f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Further, the expedited timeline is driven by a clear reason: China and Russia announced a joint [project](https://substack.com/redirect/b0689d0d-34fe-441d-a7ec-f710a91d8007?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to build a reactor on the Moon by the mid-2030's, and the U.S. wants to beat them to it. Nuclear power on the moon would power the operations of a lunar base and help make the exploration of Mars possible.
More importantly, many in Washington (and Beijing?) believe that the country that develops and deploys the first lunar reactor will effectively be able to [declare](https://substack.com/redirect/72a6c662-6b0f-4c00-b0c6-a84b8cf34908?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) a substantial portion of the moon "off limits" to geopolitical rivals. Others wouldn't be able to explore or build bases. Last May's Chinese-Russian MOU announcing the joint project set off alarm bells in NASA, with [some](https://substack.com/redirect/68072269-c399-4086-99a2-93e1a4ee3204?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) calling it a second "Sputnik Moment."
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Xfjqz-8Dbb2KdCXCkS_iBqnSROCyQUDzmSgCNLXFo9k?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=170567619)
Nearly ten years ago I wrote an [article](https://substack.com/redirect/6df4ea82-2ed2-4739-90d6-6b0438bac5fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about China ramping-up its space exploration efforts, sending a probe around the moon in 2014 and successfully soft-landing a spacecraft on the lunar surface in 2016, only the third nation to do so. India has explored the Moon's surface and successfully launched satellites that have orbited Mars. Earlier this year it became only the fourth nation to successfully [dock](https://substack.com/redirect/635eed55-fee5-4a00-b473-41b967316dc7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) satellites, and the nation is now working on sending the first crewed missions into low space orbit. And don't forget about the Russians, our original, current, and future competitors in this domain. It is indisputable at this point that space is an active domain of geopolitical competition.
* * *
## [The New Space War](https://substack.com/redirect/011377df-d42b-49b4-af54-6af433b42058?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| May 28, 2024
[](https://substack.com/redirect/011377df-d42b-49b4-af54-6af433b42058?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[There was a time, long before the Europeans, when the China was a seafaring nation. The Chinese had the knowledge and skill to build seaworthy vessels and the courage and seamanship to navigate them ...](https://substack.com/redirect/011377df-d42b-49b4-af54-6af433b42058?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/011377df-d42b-49b4-af54-6af433b42058?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Perhaps the most fascinating dynamic of recent space developments, however, is the rapidly increasing role played by the private sector. I've previously written about this dynamic, but it's worth reiterating that America's space efforts were stagnant until the launch (pardon the pun) of space ventures such as SpaceX and Blue Origin. And the growth of commercial space has been nothing short of staggering. In 2022, SpaceX alone [accounted](https://substack.com/redirect/6d49eb52-4d6e-4086-a23f-c1851452b8ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for 78 percent of all U.S. launches and 33 percent of all global launches.
* * *
## [The Space Business is Taking Off ](https://substack.com/redirect/15bb6f7e-6fe2-420b-a949-10947c3ff465?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| February 19, 2024
[](https://substack.com/redirect/15bb6f7e-6fe2-420b-a949-10947c3ff465?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[On Thursday February 15, 2024, a SpaceX Falcon 9 rocket successfully launched a private lunar lander in what may prove to be a milestone in the private space industry. If successful, it will be Ameri...](https://substack.com/redirect/15bb6f7e-6fe2-420b-a949-10947c3ff465?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/15bb6f7e-6fe2-420b-a949-10947c3ff465?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
As a generalist connecting trends across geopolitics, national security, business, and space, it seems clear that deploying a nuclear-powered lunar base will be a landmark development. It will likely accelerate the already brewing moongrab and increase the military significance of specific geographies on the moon. Lunar bases could also touch off an economic boom akin to the discovery of the New World, and nascent industries such as space manufacturing and outer space mining would likely take off.
> **Lunar living is one step closer to humans becoming an interplanetary species**
Given that 2030 is a mere five years away, it's worth asking how many people may live on the moon ten years from now? Could it be thousands? And of course, lunar living is one step closer to humans becoming an interplanetary species. The moon may emerge to be a mere transit point for those that are headed to Mars (or beyond).
As the chance of such a future grows, I can't help but contemplate the emergence of a space economy in which actors will need to transact. With colonies teeming with peoples from around our world (and eventually humans that may be "space natives"), it's unlikely that any single earthbound (or Earthly-sovereign) currency will emerge as the sole medium of exchange. Spacefarers may seek a means to transact free and clear of Earthly governments. [Might Bitcoin serve as the first interplanetary currency](https://substack.com/redirect/844f2259-b1d7-48a4-9e80-3e41de440fb7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)?
While it's impossible to know how a space-only economy will develop or what financial, governance, or other systems will emerge, it's clear enterprising and risk-taking entrepreneurs will find enormous opportunities.

**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. **He 's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza**. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/1cf54e62-4a93-4d9d-91e6-1eb654ba1513?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/4a474075-0527-43c3-b0e2-f46cceabae3c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/0d7a7151-9106-4396-bd3e-aefc5072653e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.

The talking heads of legacy media mocked me.
The Democrat Machine dumped $55 million into Ohio to crush my campaign.
They outspent us 3-to-1. Every liberal group in America piled on.
They didn't just want to beat me. They wanted to humiliate me. To send a message: outsiders like me aren't welcome.
But I had one thing they didn't: YOU.
We clawed our way through, dollar by dollar, grassroots supporter by grassroots supporter - and we won. Not by a little. By over six points!
Now, I'm watching that same story unfold again - this time with my friend Vivek Ramaswamy in his race for Governor of Ohio.
And just like in my race, the Democrat Machine is already unloading millions, launching smears, and pulling out every dirty trick in the book to end his campaign.
[That’s why I’m asking – respectfully – for you to help Vivek like you helped me:](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b91d7502590549b4bc7de37b90795bda&_e=1CJW3f6KNHpHxBHSladAUhy83wT6-bXdNAbmfpmRylZ-z4eRRqN_Z7vcHsuNM55egI9m4C2Ajbhx3170FVO0a-TJRKhem51Uv6sY4tsKOH0fNr_ld-oGBykAEbD7ZnFZfkvzCbrPftXmNUW7powj8ltOqOyJCkxTb1lCzkkYY6q6IaJ9Xxgh8up5op8pARohWCcdRBANdrUg3lUdIB_cHkWUA19FEK1I8b0V6o1cAErRhkAwidGuTPAnD1TSTkhM6fmKLiisZSY3GD6yu-_9lOqzXjDlOFbA4UqWFB3ayr82CdGzD2RVTE_ErpCYBGPYLNPhO1FY5NAUhFYpJpL780jMFaPlMChphXnpybLNCQpVPBJBLAWIh3aumeK8Ayf4XSNKDOjv_sVF1vlpNdC-iIR-g65dLZZLPXy9q5p-rz-_XGTup0yI1rlEh1r5YgffQgYit9NfY2wYMf5V_enjzp7LAkE-b3h0YcQEKT3J5-dWe61Wqxdv3DOzEEf4qKHSovvL-TYqRt0k33MIxgGJqFPvX_HGZvg4kPi_9OaCM72ZsqsKlleCxSGdFDrK3bdtv49dsca4ctIi7gBNqiM1snGcXyQp6O7CJ5zq72Vxwq8Stxou1rv8FxIlPLRJvBVU58sc6L4UZFooVTf_jbjjNU_knc64mJzhsw7SpFiE3m69Ohme7kCIc0hMVVZONAaVsdq6AkUa5KYV51_lEWJZpGkRWHl3QKsZNpcNCke3EqvPdG6Kt1owGXxSLr96uO7h)[CHIP IN A FEW BUCKS
](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b91d7502590549b4bc7de37b90795bda&_e=1CJW3f6KNHpHxBHSladAUhy83wT6-bXdNAbmfpmRylZ-z4eRRqN_Z7vcHsuNM55egI9m4C2Ajbhx3170FVO0a-TJRKhem51Uv6sY4tsKOH0fNr_ld-oGBykAEbD7ZnFZfkvzCbrPftXmNUW7powj8ltOqOyJCkxTb1lCzkkYY6q6IaJ9Xxgh8up5op8pARohWCcdRBANdrUg3lUdIB_cHkWUA19FEK1I8b0V6o1cAErRhkAwidGuTPAnD1TSTkhM6fmKLiisZSY3GD6yu-_9lNFfW_mGkoIdhpOKpMjwcva7hsvJhVvCqCrZtWqRmHvSp4tGb2s0afY7fEfbku-J3BSH59nVXK4llfH2Bo7XTpLeV2_8aVRHyV7r-0OiiRpASLF8dgzinIv5NbjTCjwX5ZZd9_v28M01C1-ZcT3-4nx-x5hLP2XhEz1lQLoLJtlE3CsxByObZYnQ4WKwapdEk3sOtBRXUHFSk5py8Pso5HR8KrefUigqCJfJrg234G_FHtpCl-EYiyNayBz9RpHIrL4_AFhIaEwIfygmGGyiWiqYUYLlX1exK3FjTQNi3HAFGS-YTfpNT9Imu3YTNz11_AQZIfhUeTthXpI1kEAZqQLNae4Wh7NS_y9DscDR_g205o5xrVLvwZEE8NyQ7JJw4QrDBLtvxMfh1NoHxV_rC25KAxuIMOm8v11EgLDt6IqUkREaoug9QUkydTCVgWDd-2xlRI3KDRoYjWD2XMCKyWwGut9PswddeNs-12wjyG4E)Vivek's not a politician. He's a problem for The Establishment and bureaucratic class.**
**He 'll gut the Deep State -- from Columbus to Washington.He'll deport every illegal alien - enforce law and order.He'll roll back transgenderism - ban men in women's sports, no sex changes for minors. He'll terminate all DEI programs - root out woke propaganda. He'll overhaul failing schools - expand school choice and reward excellent teachers.He'll obliterate the managerial bureaucracy - take a hacksaw to government bloat. clean_body: | | Peter, Rob Bresnahan ran on banning Congressional stock trades. And now that he’s in Congress? He’s doing the exact opposite. = Peter, Bresnahan is a multi-millionaire — he’s worth $69 million. And he won’t stop his Congressional stock trades because he thinks he’ll go broke. Let that sink in. Meanwhile, Bresnahan voted for the Big Bullsht Bill that single-handedly destroys Pennsylvanian families’ finances — stripping us of our healthcare, limiting our access to education, and putting our manufacturing and energy jobs at risk. Bresnahan is out of touch, and it’s time we get him out of Congress. = | | = PA-08 deserves someone who will look out for our communities and our best interests, not selfish Bresnahan — who’s only interested in fattening his wallet. — PA Dems = | Follow us on , , and ! But now it has. And it’s already sending shockwaves through political circles. See the memo before it’s taken offline What’s inside? Redistricting moves that no one voted for Targeted seat flips engineered behind closed doors A silent operation that could wipe out key conservative districts If what this memo says is true... we’re looking at a seismic shift in 2026. But only a few people will ever get to see it. Read it now** – before it disappears Thank you, -Team Hilton | | | ---|---|---

Here’s the good news: momentum is on our side. Trump's machine is TERRIFIED .
The bad news? Jason Miyares and his billionaire MAGA backers are POURING money into this race to try to buy Virginia’s legal system.
If you already believe Virginia's legal system shouldn't be for sale to the highest MAGA bidder, can you donate $5 right now to help us fight back? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025?amount=5]
Otherwise, here are 5 good reasons to donate $5 right now:
1. $5 because Miyares won by just 0.81%. That’s razor-thin, team.

2. $5 because they're outspending us 8-to-1. Miyares has $8.2 million. We're building a grassroots army to fight back — $5 at a time.

3. $5 because Trump called Miyares "great” and is backing him all the way.

5. $5 because this is our ONLY shot in 2025. Miyares is the only statewide MAGA incumbent on the ballot this year. If we don't beat him now, Trump's grip on Virginia will tighten for years.
You may not think your $5 is much, but it’s not just your $5.

name: Phil Izon
subject: I’ve been getting frequent questions about whether I’ll run for office
body:
Please share with friends and family | | | [](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6898f5821fc9211d3afc9e34&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tropictundra.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D6898f0e9f76d960de05fe005%26ss_email_id%3D6898f5821fc9211d3afc9e34%26ss_campaign_name%3DI%25E2%2580%2599ve%2Bbeen%2Bgetting%2Bfrequent%2Bquestions%2Babout%2Bwhether%2BI%25E2%2580%2599ll%2Brun%2Bfor%2Boffice%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-08-10T19%253A40%253A10Z&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_6898f0e9f76d960de05fe005&l=en-US&s=5cA9L8IkzEL1o25NM7nc1p0d7g4%3D)
---
| **I’ve been getting frequent questions about whether I’ll run for office, be it Governor, State Representative, or another role. I’m deeply grateful for the overwhelming support and confidence so many of you have in me. It’s truly humbling.****That said, I want to be clear: I’m a business owner, and a young one at that. My focus is on building my business, not pursuing a political career. While it would be an honor to represent Alaskans, I’m not a politician, and I have no desire to become one.****My work with Tropic Tundra reflects my unique blend of expertise: nearly a decade in business banking with Wells Fargo and Key Bank, where I facilitated over $36 million in lending across every industry in Alaska, combined with my passion for technology. Right now, I’m building some of the most advanced computers in the U.S. here in Alaska, typing this on a machine used by just 0.01% of the world population.****Thank you again for your support. I’m committed to serving Alaska through innovation, business, and politics, but at this time I have no personal political ambitions.**
---
#### **America First Policy Institute Update**
---
**My first videos with AFPI are now sitting with their executives for approval. We are now taking my Anti-RCV Education to three additional States (Michigan, Minnesota, and Georgia). All of the videos we created to STOP RCV last year in Idaho, Oregon, Arizona, South Dakota, Nevada, and Colorado in 2024, we have now made available free of charge to AFPI, they will now be spending their own money pushing my content across the country. Targeting places where RCV is still being pushed.****My work with AFPI will produce RCV education to millions of people, I have RCV simulators that show in real time the election changes and the redistribution of votes. I explain each step so everyone can understand it. I have made these simulators available in 15 languages that are most used in each State. I am also going to be showing my movie about RCV “Frozen Odds” in multiple states next year at multiple events in each state.****My goal is simple, the complete and utter elimination of RCV in American Elections (Considering 17 States have banned it in 3 years and 7 states rejected it at the ballot in 2024, I would like to think we are on the right track).****I would like to thank all of my 6,000 newsletter subscribers, my nearly 10,000 followers on X, and my 6,400 followers on Linkedin for sharing my messages and helping me generate over 12 million views just on my X account in the last two years. I have also sent out over 650,000 emails from 2023-2025.**
---
**My partnership with America First Policy Institute has already grown beyond the initial scope. My original idea was to help in Michigan, now my work is going to be used in Michigan, Minnesota, and Georgia. Talk about Amazing, the multi-state collaboration and ability to bring my movie “Frozen Odds” to show all over the country all to stop the spread of RCV Ranked Choice Voting. Big thank you to all the supporters and followers, volunteers, and donors. I have taken upon myself to educate America about the dangers of RCV.****On top of this, one of my amazing newsletter subscribers donated a large sum of money to AFPI to support our efforts, I never asked for any money for this project, but AFPI is a 501(c)3 organization and our efforts will be under the education umbrella. If you would like to donate to them, here is their information. I am not affilated to them and I am not being paid in anyway by AFPI.**[**https://www.americafirstpolicy.com/**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6898f5821fc9211d3afc9e34&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.americafirstpolicy.com&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_6898f0e9f76d960de05fe005&l=en-US&s=6NS8qRLuBAFA8Q9fqmgp5ywlA1Q%3D)**They have done amazing work in many states, I originally started working with them in Arizona fighting against RCV in 2023 and 2024. They specifically asked me to work with them on creating content and help distribute content across multiple states. Pretty amazing experience.****I want to extend a huge thank you to all the movie supporters, golden ticket holders, angel ticket holders, my petition volunteers, my volunteer leads that are spread across the whole state, and all the amazing people who voted on my repeal of RCV in 2024. I am just getting started and your funding of my movies, your time helping collect signatures, and your continued support have led us to this point. The point where we eliminate RCV from every state before they have a chance to even do a petition to get it. So far 17 states have banned RCV in 3 years, it took them 20+ years to get 2 states to use it. We are winning, keep up the pressure.**

Including animated videos, RCV Election Simulators in 30+ languages, RCV guidebooks also in 30+ languages, both of my books ( free of charge and copyright free ) and so much more. Plan to show my movie “Frozen Odds” all over Michigan next year with the help of America First Policy Institute.**

**A short explanation of the court win above, this case was decided last September 2024, but the Supreme Court ruling in our favor at the time, said the final order would come at a later time. That happened at the end of June. More to Come this week.**
---
### The Fight for Fair Elections: A Personal Mission
When I began the effort to repeal Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska, I knew it would be a challenge. But I was determined not to let our electoral process be twisted into a confusing system that leaves voters disempowered.My commitment went beyond Alaska. I wrote **three books** and created a **30-part animated video series** to expose the truth about RCV, distributing thousands of copies and making the videos free nationwide. I've also spent countless hours collaborating with grassroots leaders across the country, helping establish organizations now fighting RCV. My websites, **RCValert.org** and **RemoveRCV.com** , offer years of research, resources, and tools like RCV Election Simulators.This fight is personal. My own grandfather, a wise and hardworking man, couldn't understand the ranked choice ballot. If someone with his common sense was confused, I knew there was a fundamental flaw. That moment spurred me to draft Alaska's repeal initiative.We didn't have billionaire funding or political party backing. What we had was unwavering determination and the support of over **700 dedicated Alaskan volunteers**. We knocked on doors, braved the cold, and gathered over **42,000 signatures** —far exceeding the requirement—all without help from political insiders.I've also traveled nationwide, warning states like Idaho, Oregon, Arizona, and Florida about RCV's manipulative nature, funded by out-of-state billionaires.As expected, the political establishment fought us. The attorney who brought RCV to Alaska even sued to prevent our repeal initiative from appearing on the ballot. But we prevailed in both the Alaska Superior Court and the Alaska Supreme Court. They outspent us by a staggering **one hundred to one** , with millions flowing in from out-of-state organizations like Unite America and the Sixteen Thirty Fund, supported by figures like George Soros and Hansjorg Wyss.On Election Day, I was immensely proud. Not only had I fought RCV in Alaska for years, but seven other states where I'd been active decisively rejected it. Those rejections alone cost the pro-RCV lobby nearly **$150 million** between 2020 and 2024. Here in Alaska, despite our small population, it took nearly three weeks to get election results—a clear example of RCV's confusion and delay.Our repeal effort in Alaska came agonizingly close, falling short by just 743 votes after nearly three weeks of counting. But my resolve is unbroken. This fight is a warning to the entire country. We must maintain simple, clear, and honest elections, demanding voter ID and keeping out-of-state special interests out.I am incredibly proud of what we achieved in Alaska. We showed the nation what ordinary, hardworking people can accomplish when they stand firm. The fight isn't over—not in Alaska, and not anywhere freedom-loving Americans call home.**Stand with us! Let's protect our elections for Alaska and for America.**
---

clean_body: Please share with friends and family | | | | I’ve been getting frequent questions about whether I’ll run for office, be it Governor, State Representative, or another role. I’m deeply grateful for the overwhelming support and confidence so many of you have in me. It’s truly humbling.That said, I want to be clear: I’m a business owner, and a young one at that. My focus is on building my business, not pursuing a political career. While it would be an honor to represent Alaskans, I’m not a politician, and I have no desire to become one.My work with Tropic Tundra reflects my unique blend of expertise: nearly a decade in business banking with Wells Fargo and Key Bank, where I facilitated over $36 million in lending across every industry in Alaska, combined with my passion for technology. Right now, I’m building some of the most advanced computers in the U.S. here in Alaska, typing this on a machine used by just 0.01% of the world population.Thank you again for your support. I’m committed to serving Alaska through innovation, business, and politics, but at this time I have no personal political ambitions. America First Policy Institute Update My first videos with AFPI are now sitting with their executives for approval. We are now taking my Anti-RCV Education to three additional States (Michigan, Minnesota, and Georgia). All of the videos we created to STOP RCV last year in Idaho, Oregon, Arizona, South Dakota, Nevada, and Colorado in 2024, we have now made available free of charge to AFPI, they will now be spending their own money pushing my content across the country. She chased a school shooting survivor down the street. She heckled President Biden during the State of the Union like it was a WWE match. She called for a "national divorce" and spread nonsense about Jewish space lasers. Marjorie Taylor Greene has turned Congress into a sideshow--and our democracy into her personal stunt reel. I'm Retired Brigadier General Shawn Harris. I served 30 years in the Military. I've commanded troops in combat zones around the world. And now I'm called to serve again--this time to stop her. She's backed by dark money and MAGA millions. But I've got something stronger: a mission--and a grassroots team like you. **We 're up against our biggest fundraising deadline yet. If we hit our goal, we show the world Greene's clown show can be cancelled. If we fall short, she keeps embarrassing us on live TV.** [**I need your help. body:
Here are three reasons why you should make a contribution to elect Abigail Spanberger as Governor of Virginia.
Peter, if you've been waiting to make a contribution to elect Abigail Spanberger as Governor of Virginia, now's the moment. Here are three reasons why:
✅ Our race is the biggest election since Trump returned to power.
✅ Republicans have spent over $1 million on TV and digital ads so far.
✅ And if we win big here, it will give a big boost to Democrats heading into 2026.
Here in Virginia, there is no limit to how much individuals can donate to candidates for office. For that reason, our opponent has been raking in money from far-right megadonors.
_Our average online donation is around $30, but what's more important is the number of people who pitch in._
**[If you're with us, don't wait another day! Split a contribution of $10 or even more between Abigail Spanberger's campaign and Heartland Patriots to help us build a winning campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92985?refcode=em20250810-9242&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9242%2E614464%2EO2pCd8)**

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: A backdoor tax on working people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
This isn’t protection, it’s punishment.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250810-5320-footer&t=1&akid=5320%2E420207%2EUArACS)
Peter,
Trump promised to stand up for working families, but **right now his reckless tariffs are driving up prices** on everything from groceries to farming equipment — _while billionaires walk away with tax breaks._
We’ve seen the impact already:
* Prices on **groceries, appliances, and basic materials** have soared.

* Farmers across the country are hurting more than ever.

* And working families, especially those already stretched thin, are footing the bill.

That’s not protection. That’s punishment. **It’s a backdoor tax on working people so the ultra-wealthy can keep lining their pockets.**
I support tariffs that actually work — for workers, not billionaires. Smart, targeted policies that defend jobs without crushing everyday Americans.
[**If you’re tired of the lies and the broken promises, chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help me fight back with truth, accountability, and real economic justice.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250810-2?refcode=em20250810-5320&refcode2=5320_420207_UArACS&akid=5320%2E420207%2EUArACS)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250810-2?amount=3&refcode=em20250810-5320&refcode2=5320_420207_UArACS&akid=5320%2E420207%2EUArACS)**
I don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money — just grassroots support from people who believe in a fair economy and real justice.
Thank you for your support,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250810-5320-footer&t=2&refcode2=5320_420207_UArACS&akid=5320%2E420207%2EUArACS)**

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Two MAGA Hats for the price of one?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc
body:
I’d even sign one of them... Check it out!
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
## **_DO YOU WANT TWO MAGA HATS FOR THE PRICE OF ONE?_**

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[CLAIM MAGA HAT](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
The Green MAGA Hat = extremely rare. Only the most loyal Patriots have the chance to own one.
But the Red MAGA Hat - everyone knows it. It’s legendary. And guess what? I signed one, and it could be yours.
**_[Just chip in $25 before my MIDNIGHT DEADLINE TONIGHT to claim your Green MAGA Hat and get entered for a chance to win the only SIGNED RED MAGA HAT IN EXISTENCE!>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**

[CLAIM MAGA HAT & ENTER TO WIN](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Everybody wants a signed MAGA Hat, especially now that I’m the President of the United States again. But, I only made this offer available for my closest friends.
**THAT INCLUDES Friend!!**
**[So please claim your hat and special entry offer TODAY!>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)**
Thank you,

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
President Trump

[GO MAGA HAT](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

Your early support helps us establish that foundation by shoring up our resources. We know there will be tough fights ahead — MAGA Republicans spent _millions_ of dollars last time around to try and flip this seat and elect another right-wing yes man, **and with a historically slim majority in the House, we can bet they will come for this seat even harder next cycle. ** **[I am running in the only Frontline race here in Connecticut, and every contribution puts us one step closer to retaining this seat. Will you step up and make a monthly contribution to help strengthen this team?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113087548/562602404/-1540404253?recurring=true&refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250810_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWNhZTZiOC0yYzc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bVj4PdrNayJ5WAWtmHnB7TScZv3IA_MROapiI8ONTn0=)** | [PITCH IN MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113087549/562602405/-1540404253?recurring=true&refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250810_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWNhZTZiOC0yYzc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bVj4PdrNayJ5WAWtmHnB7TScZv3IA_MROapiI8ONTn0=)

One-time contributions are key, especially in big moments or as we get closer to our FEC reporting deadlines. But monthly recurring contributions help us do the work day-to-day, reach out to communities across the 5th District, and ensure that voters know exactly how we are delivering for hardworking families.
**[So please, if you can fit it into your monthly budget, will you consider joining our base of recurring supporters?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113087550/562602406/-1540404253?recurring=true&refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250810_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWNhZTZiOC0yYzc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bVj4PdrNayJ5WAWtmHnB7TScZv3IA_MROapiI8ONTn0=)**

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor.
