| | Dear Fellow American,

Many people say America's best days are behind us.

In some ways, this is understandable. For decades, Americans were sold a lie from the radical Left that:
* Unlimited immigration was good.
* Liberty could survive without virtue.
* Freedom merely meant self-expression, not self-governance.

But as president of The Heritage Foundation, I know we have a special opportunity to create **a new American golden age.**

With President Trump in office, there is a renewed push to revive America and restore our nation to its former glory.

And my colleagues and I at The Heritage Foundation, backed by our 500,000 members, are working to create and promote policy solutions that will bring about this new American golden age.

However, leftists are doing everything they can to sabotage this golden age. If we don't seize this moment now, we might never save our country from leftist decay.

**Will you join this effort today by activating your Heritage Foundation membership?**

[**Become a member >>**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/C4iq6bsPGjMNkWDPYsU0WyNkBvW38xqIxo_c4KUwGtyIly-RByzKKwvCc87-xq4kHi8eYM87MPUH2vY6EuiRpyfD1Z13zOHM1xZgcdlPg2sSsOfB7RpTcBA2Ll_MD1QC0tgYV9P_uGFMB_lkcCYwrWhyU2dhmWyJcn4f2nxAAmoW67_jVMo-Dt-NiKit8mlO0qdVpzybwh6-4OfD6CQbEgWtF3e4d-I23QRNGfEijsGBOrkGCjKDdLAIt7nZmdUv7CnYiWzWrtrc5UQW8YMxfO3_LIzUXkqZ3FOQF_wo2FO895JQD1swBiWPfc9S3eoojUU7yxu11AHMGi69VRUjg-w7-DH6EZPhCpaeBu2kGWHUiEjaqIUGjlR7Xrx7ryRnoy2UJoB2Gpa-Jq6rvuQWzF3vsedV2ivYs8T_JSzhhYY94RrfEKa4ocsI0haGGyJdjo8r94JPNIUlJ6l3wNm0QG300UPCA-9Q0ycQIhL03dIcRkXvTcJtZlnwZmvK6tDxgMXy2dOHV6a3ajNLrlkNd1wuynomgfcLiPfUTgPlnCC9BWBJkbt1iWoDUACu_EXN9XmWBOih_QZgQJvznoCHkZmb5mQjfgxMrQrcy6MnsI22rYDvADz2wAl6BEdllAp6s6LhdbvBoRaZbg-8q6lO9qabrQ/H-_Bn2ONhHQF0xPxYCpbIr3t8HJ6tAOt/11)

Your generous tax-deductible donation will help promote conservative policies that are pro-worker, pro-family, pro-God, and pro-nation. Policies rooted in the American tradition--not ashamed of our history, but proud of our inheritance.

**Please activate your Heritage Foundation membership using the secure link below.**

[**https://secured.heritage.org/new-golden-age-for-america/**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/sKgW3gF-RavQEc52LBtrptdrv9W68ZefRJvMjHPdqZsMEft6YX4mIIzotuqYPSPhpMgYQ7QYjP2ddl4Kl2Zu1UI7grX5ppoCaRAz8VPDoKRenFT-OcRLgdtKA8sKhYhuY-tJPcAFsuHil1DElMY15Szpg3qoa_kA1SzWBxGdVppNkXO0qDjX4poz8p6lMJ6fzNn7ghrfFyvhxYOmO3y_KJpd1zoveui9sVAFqOufr5yDaxm2R6hexHJt0LBZKKurhwAEZGiAMJJpf-FXLI0BY0wxnnN6eyLHXQwebTsVsnwpA3tomKIYwbhL8yK9Uh2mzat04v8atJXwVIugbDAgES6P82xhtG-kbjDGny9eybONQq8WPTqbv862TgLbJ01q4OFI8cqMACjDthPAYtumNLlNcBh_v89FhGGmALRmLAL_yu4_wS7WvgWiyXkChyEyytvSsuZXj0YWZS4OMfgU1sR95PTiVhNGQNcZKHIhBcdM9QzyPk6YCPzilk3ZibO4WDE5vB5CytifvbZ7ER4vw60xe_wQtxfd2vkjpW-REtAWM1-iQoB-P_eLUgl1yRsKGoqnvm5FQsXncH3DPO8IV_fl2Xn_gFeH3z4j6ASlsmOhTZowOWpSlSfuHO73YlAhS_7_qTtiqPvzCSDWbdNawWXFtg/PmBTctDhnKyPBK3HPVNCaL_eUxanAeym/11)

Your courageous action today will rebuild a republic where men are strong, women are cherished, children are protected, and God is honored.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

**P.S. Don 't miss this opportunity to bring about a new American golden age by activating your Heritage Foundation membership: [https://secured.heritage.org/new-golden-age-for-america/](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/-BwWvbr5hcEEm4KeaD8fUiNJTJd0k2I7uwdZb7i7USUKDURer9uTKVdxSiS4phG_gtJPn9qAiP0CyiBH1AY7TiAib-ed69ufSn3r5xVaX5kaB3Dl0BfyWv1KoBxqjCZXjdHv-Tto6wi-j-zdQR_sRshAldJOJDwNgEJ16usEGdO9zpYVx7Ae1WocObQ5FSlsS-y-J3TBIa9OuOhepl4chnBLrLL6eq8PBePBZ6hAyuFyrDf9yy8eePKDY2wgoIasuEJEQAFzMNQnQdHW-NwgJeRBDwRHQXZiNMJHvSkyMMmjyHbLtdNK9zGwh6jYuzqFtbSJj7ShAr9TEKLdqwqGzd32Zqq_ochlUAFi48TOWXVXdJI0QLLdWaMJa3hAOHg8HwQEq2LekB9jPmgTKN-ErqKQB1hSTABCGB3eqMzDcTxgoC0QERoQ5_Xxz8vBfxSB3tYsOFJcvjEqA773Rq8Sx3UKvaYX1dnSYYy7LDgcQQ2Es_G70r7U6EFz19Kr3kbHjuo7qZL8TEy166L0Z2rD0rZBzOj0v2Iu07UjBpkk1rd7dKy0TELSNR1SY86NPoT1fEZIioLt308ygeRp9VgRXQ4gIzTdoaLJAq2IKhZCj5l2tdYS9Ru-qPEPXN-TBJlo2Omm41pCdE_NN-ZJ15lcOzK54w/-sGWkhOxU_6-yIDYbxgK3zuc1Cbw4V-j/11)**

| | **Michigan Senate Polling Update:
Democrat Haley Stevens ONE POINT AHEAD of MAGA Republican Mike Rogers**
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4445?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=555%2E49239%2E9-V6E8)
---
null, experts are predicting that Michigan could very likely decide Senate control, and _The Cook Political Report_ ranked this seat as a pure "Toss Up."
---
That means this race is going to be decided on the margins, which is why we urgently need to confirm where grassroots Democrats stand.

**We're looking for 10,000 responses to our live straw poll before midnight tonight. Tell us now:**
---
**Who would you vote for in Michigan's Senate race?**
---
| | | [Haley Stevens](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4445?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=555%2E49239%2E9-V6E8)
---
| [Mike Rogers](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4445?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=555%2E49239%2E9-V6E8)
---
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4446?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=555%2E49239%2E9-V6E8) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4444?t=7&akid=555%2E49239%2E9-V6E8)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. name: CADEM Activism
subject: Dave Min & Gabby Giffords in Orange County
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
Dear friends,
Republicans are running away from their voters — especially at town hall meetings. In fact, some GOP Congressional leaders have instructed their U.S. House Members to stop having in-person town halls at all.
But CADEM and our Democratic Members across the state are California Strong. We aren’t afraid to show up .
This week, Congressman Dave Min took questions from Californians during a town hall meeting in Orange County . And he didn’t show up alone! Former Arizona Congresswoman Gabby Giffords also attended the town hall as our special guest.
Will you stand with Rep. Dave Min, Gabby Giffords, and all Democrats who are willing to SHOW UP for everyday Americans? We want to continue holding town hall meetings up and down our state, but need your support. Please, pitch in $ or more now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-august25?&refcode=&amount=]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-august25?refcode=&amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-august25?refcode=&amount=] CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-august25?&refcode=&amount=]As you know, Republicans recently rammed through their Big Ugly Bill that will have a devastating impact on working Americans.
— 17 million could lose their healthcare;
— 5 million face cuts to food support;
— 1.75 million construction jobs are at risk;
— $3 trillion added to the national debt
So, it’s no surprise that Republicans are cowering and hiding away from voters. They expect to lose seats in the upcoming midterms, which is also why Donald Trump and GOP leaders in Texas are trying to force through a last-minute gerrymander to save their House Majority .
But even swing-seat Democrats facing tough reelections, like Dave Min, aren’t afraid to face their voters and have candid discussions about crucial issues. That’s why we held this town hall, to hear from people like you .
We want to keep having these conversations and building momentum for a blue wave, but pulling these together isn’t cheap. Will you consider making a donation of $ to fund another town hall? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-august25?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-august25?&refcode=&amount=]

CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-august25?&refcode=&amount=]Thank you so much,
- The entire mobilization team at the California Democratic Party

DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=&amount=20.24]
Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action.
If this email was forwarded to you, please sign up for our email list here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/zWMh-KAhmUiJYxMzOxKADQ2]
We rely on email to communicate with supporters like you and conduct the business of the California Democratic Party, but if you wish to receive only our most important emails, let us know here to sign up for fewer emails. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/60txJAHUg0OznGGaWVwO_A2]
And if you no longer wish to receive emails from the California Democratic Party, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.cadem.org/p/BZcF64X0Zkie6fv4FEU9PQ2?unsubscribedata=e02RniM5UJzLTnQudXR9oVJj1nU%2Br1zKiTxuRIl%2BL7qt8WdoA6DsiwurmoY7E07XtlSAKI9ujbBL11byHNXAlGA7haD%2FpRUaPtvVjHgxGGnaB8HAi9FOVqflUcIGopWzC5NzmH70XFYIuOM6k8Is%2FOfNxvoHu16ZWdbslGvfI%2FmjD8UcauiNem7pCJQJrBS5ctvATHwaB57UuJwjQFxNfvmKLFEwqMHOBG2LPC1%2BKI2yFfJ4eUYCoIK5A16CdrFhMHXuNi4r94QWfq4TzhQQmyWHQ5FkyeJ4z5y6XpDJFEdMGHUS3TOVMwjKXp%2BBhYxN7ONwJHDxhqeztYYWOrwpuBv0ESCJWPBa1gTMJO9BDaQL0tnm6x8fiq%2F0e9X3gZiAclH3ADbmMSY5j9c4W0iifYOUyRIdEuRcyaXO6iOZAo4%3D .

body:

I had to reach out as soon as I heard the news.
[FIRST:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113087915/562603868/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250810_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTc5NzczMy0yYTc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bX0Sa8JsrCfiN7iHn_XCZcT5_3tPK-0K1hmMF5ENpDY=) Democrats held Republicans to one of the [SMALLEST](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113087916/562603869/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250810_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTc5NzczMy0yYTc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bX0Sa8JsrCfiN7iHn_XCZcT5_3tPK-0K1hmMF5ENpDY=) House Majorities in history.
[THEN:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113087917/562603870/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250810_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTc5NzczMy0yYTc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bX0Sa8JsrCfiN7iHn_XCZcT5_3tPK-0K1hmMF5ENpDY=) Mike Johnson and House Republicans announced that they raised a terrifying [$44 MILLION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113087918/562603871/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250810_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTc5NzczMy0yYTc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bX0Sa8JsrCfiN7iHn_XCZcT5_3tPK-0K1hmMF5ENpDY=) to try to save their narrow MAGA Majority.
[NOW:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113087919/562603872/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250810_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTc5NzczMy0yYTc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bX0Sa8JsrCfiN7iHn_XCZcT5_3tPK-0K1hmMF5ENpDY=) In a brand new poll, Democrats are favored to take back the House by just [ONE POINT!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113087920/562603873/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250810_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTc5NzczMy0yYTc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bX0Sa8JsrCfiN7iHn_XCZcT5_3tPK-0K1hmMF5ENpDY=)
_[In a race this close, every dollar could be the difference between a historic victory... or a devastating defeat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113087921/562603874/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250810_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTc5NzczMy0yYTc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bX0Sa8JsrCfiN7iHn_XCZcT5_3tPK-0K1hmMF5ENpDY=)_
So I’ll be blunt: If we’re going to have any hope of holding onto this lead to retake our Democratic House Majority, elect Leader Hakeem Jeffries as Speaker, and halt Donald Trump’s cruel and extremist agenda in its tracks, I need EVERYONE reading this message to step up.
[_That’s why I’m reaching out to you personally. Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com [https://ericswalwell.com]
Friend,

It’s no secret that the Department of Homeland Security and ICE are out in the streets, terrorizing families, and making mistakes that range from embarrassing to horrifying (like deporting U.S. Marshals and detaining Senators).

But NOW, they’re going to start expanding this reach into surveilling elections and questioning all Americans’ citizenship when it comes to voting. Leaving this in the hands of DHS could mean everything from citizens getting denied from voting to spreading more conspiracy theories. So we’re asking, should DHS be able to expand its surveillance?

body:
This isn’t just about Texas. It’s about all of us. |
---
Peter, Donald Trump and his far-right MAGA allies know they can’t win elections on their unpopular platform. **But authoritarians don’t win by winning votes—they win by changing the rules.** We’re watching this right-wing power grab play out in real-time in Texas. Texas Governor Greg Abbott and the Republican-led majority in the state legislature are trying to change the rules and push through new maps that would allow Republicans to pick up five House seats in next year’s midterm elections. Texas Democrats have literally had to flee the state to avoid voting for these new gerrymandered maps. Donald Trump is now calling for the arrest of these elected officials. _This is how authoritarians act, Peter._ **This isn’t just about Texas. It’s about all of us. Voters should choose their elected officials—not the other way around.** Republicans won’t stop at trying to suppress the vote in Texas. They’ll do whatever it takes to rig the system and cheat their way into winning next year so they can continue enabling the Trump regime. **[It will take all of us to fight back against these authoritarian tactics and win the House back in 2026. **Team, the alarm bells have _never rung louder:_**

**FIRST:** Donald Trump called the free press the "enemy of the people."

**THEN:** He declared that networks with opposing viewpoints should be _shut down_ \-- even saying MSNBC "shouldn't even have a right to broadcast."

** AND NOW: Trump's _never_ been closer to getting his wish. With the stroke of a pen, he cut over a BILLION DOLLARS in funding that supports NPR and PBS!**

_Your local station_ could be on the chopping block without this crucial support -- so it's up to ALL of us to fight back against the Republican senators who did this. We need YOU to sign on before our petition closes at midnight, so **please, this is _absolutely essential:_ **

body:
Not a penny more.

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113088270/562605231/1668162259?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_RepeatAskResend_250810_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDQ1ZDY1ZC0zNTc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xJdlSycMI3Q_pwHHDb0f3LsTeyDCuKcog6jEbV1pvGc=) We have a simple request for you today, Derek:

[_**Can you donate just $5 to reelect Mark Warner?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113088271/562605232/1668162259?amount=5&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_RepeatAskResend_250810_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDQ1ZDY1ZC0zNTc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xJdlSycMI3Q_pwHHDb0f3LsTeyDCuKcog6jEbV1pvGc=)

You see, Senator Warner has been _the_ leading voice in Washington speaking out against the Trump administration’s corruption. Plus, he’s not afraid to call out his Republican colleagues who continue to stay silent while Trump’s actions hurt our freedoms, our safety, and our pocket books.

**But that means his seat could be a top Republican target in next year’s election – and we need to be prepared.**

name: Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund
subject: NEW CASE: New Mexico Officer Charged with Murder
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e21647758/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvampuSFo4Nno0dQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTA/LbmNseDFCdFlLRw/qP2hpZHM9bmMxRG9oYUVuc3laS0Vscw/gaJkcqQ/sclc2c2c7cc)
|
---
| | That’s not the momentum we want heading into a busy spring in the courtroom.
---
| |
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Dear Friend, Violence is on the rise against law enforcement in America – the men and women who selflessly put their lives on the line for you and me. 11 police officers have been shot in just the last two weeks of July alone. And even if our officers survive the deadly encounters on the streets, there’s nothing stopping radical district attorneys from going after them for political gains... Which is exactly what happened to Deputy Jacob Diaz. [**Which is why I need to ask for your renewed support today.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Let me introduce you to Deputy Jacob Diaz, his fiancée, and their 3-year-old son in the picture I’ve sent you. Jacob is a three-year veteran of the Otero County Sheriff’s Office, and he grew up in a law enforcement family proudly serving their community. Now, he faces life in prison for doing his duty and following his training. In June 2024, Deputy Jacob Diaz responded to a late-night report of a young man who appeared to be intoxicated walking along the median of a busy highway After repeatedly ignoring the officer’s instructions, the individual drew what appeared to be a firearm from his waistband. In response, Deputy Diaz followed his training and fired his weapon.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
_(The replica firearm that was pulled on Deputy Diaz when he was responding to a call)_
---
Still the young man continued to reach for the replica firearm – forcing Diaz to continue to use deadly force to defend himself. Deputy Diaz did what he was trained to do and his actions were lawful. His own department investigated his actions and determined that the shooting was legally justified – he was returned to full duty. **_But out of the blue, an anti-police special prosecutor charged Deputy Diaz with first-degree murder._** You can imagine the absolute shock Jacob and his fiancée had when receiving the news. If convicted, he faces life in prison. Tearing a 3-year-old little boy away from his father for the rest of his life. Friend, that’s something no child should have to endure. These politically motivated attacks against our men and women in blue must stop. That’s why LELDF has committed to supporting Deputy Diaz in his fight for justice. [**Friend, can I count on you to stand with Deputy Jacob Diaz against these politically motivated accusations?**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Your donation of $35 or more will help provide:
---
* Expert witnesses on use of force
* The best attorneys available
* And cover any other court expenses Deputy Diaz will be faced with

---
| | Because without your support, even if Jacob wins his trial, he and his loved ones will be left with astronomical court fees and crippling debt. Everyday our officers put their lives on the line when they go out to protect our streets, just like Deputy Diaz did that night in June. If we don’t support them, what will happen to our communities? Our country is once again being faced with a decision – will we be a nation of law and order or a nation of lawlessness and disorder. I pray that you choose to stand by our nation’s values and those who defend them.
---
Sincerely,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Jason C. Johnson President, Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund
---
[ **DONATE** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | _More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_ [**Join our sustaining members by making a monthly gift to LELDF today!**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e21647758/VaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL2xlbGRmLw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTA/LbmNseDFCdFlLRw/gaJkcqQ/s6q9a8634a1) | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e21647758/VaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9MRUxERg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTA/LbmNseDFCdFlLRw/gaJkcqQ/sbl66e32ec8) | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e21647758/VaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vY2hhbm5lbC9VQ2NMcHc4M0dnakdCLUlaTFZTQnJRMGc/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTA/LbmNseDFCdFlLRw/gaJkcqQ/sdr03333a41)
---|---|---

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: I took a big leap of faith

body:
It’s still hard to believe, but twenty years ago, I was elected Mayor of Denver.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113088868/562607265/1435897075?refcode=email_081025_mayor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDkzZjBmZC0zOTc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VxUeHLfdklbp1h3k88s3uKwnhyq6oUY2ynP0bRSVUz0=&emci=b4480d30-f372-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=2493f0fd-3976-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7280715) Hey there folks, it’s John. It’s still hard to believe, but twenty years ago, I was elected Mayor of Denver. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113088869/562607270/1506335976?refcode=email_081025_mayor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDkzZjBmZC0zOTc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VxUeHLfdklbp1h3k88s3uKwnhyq6oUY2ynP0bRSVUz0=)
Helen H. Richardson, The Denver Post I was a longshot candidate — I entered the race with just a few months left until the election, and I was brand new to politics. **I was just a geologist-turned-brewer, but I felt like the concerns of everyday folks like you simply weren’t being heard. So I decided enough was enough, and took a big leap of faith.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113088870/562607271/1506335976?refcode=email_081025_mayor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDkzZjBmZC0zOTc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VxUeHLfdklbp1h3k88s3uKwnhyq6oUY2ynP0bRSVUz0=)
Craig F. Walker, The Denver Post I campaigned on bringing people together to get things done — and that’s exactly what we did. We worked with mayors from across the Denver metro area to create an ambitious light rail project; made Denver the first city to provide high-quality early childhood education for four-year-olds; and opened one of the first offices of sustainability in the country. I’ve always carried this common-sense, collaborative spirit throughout my career in public service. And ever since this team helped elect me to the Senate, we’ve invested billions in the fight against climate change, expanded access to affordable health care, made historic investments in our aging infrastructure, and worked to bring manufacturing jobs back to America. But make no mistake, we’ve still got plenty of challenges ahead of us. From defending working families to upholding the fundamental rule of law, breaking through the dysfunction in Washington won’t be easy. **But that won’t stop us — _we can’t quit now, when the stakes are this high for Coloradans._****[So please, if you’re with me, can you chip in a couple bucks to help us keep up the work we’re doing in Washington? Anything you can spare will help us hold this seat while we work to flip the Senate blue in 2026. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113088871/562607272/1506335976?refcode=email_081025_mayor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDkzZjBmZC0zOTc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VxUeHLfdklbp1h3k88s3uKwnhyq6oUY2ynP0bRSVUz0=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113088872/562607273/1506335976?express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&refcode=email_081025_mayor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDkzZjBmZC0zOTc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VxUeHLfdklbp1h3k88s3uKwnhyq6oUY2ynP0bRSVUz0=)

name: Team Off the Sidelines
subject: The GOP’s plan: Protect billionaires. Cut your benefits.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC
body:
Off the Sidelines is building the power to fight back — but we need you with us. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113089113/562608004/-530215862?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.10_OTS-GOP-Budget_B2_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDdmMTVhYi0zYjc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9l7PWSOV00HP_Vw7nblEK4e8121OkQhCfTvbLLJBeFs=)
Let’s call this what it is. The GOP’s latest budget isn’t about “fiscal responsibility” — and it’s not about helping working people. This GOP budget has **one goal** : protect the rich _and make the rest of us pay for it._ The Republican budget slashes Medicaid. Cuts funding for public education. Puts Social Security and crucial public benefits like SNAP on the chopping block — all while expanding tax breaks for billionaires and giant corporations. This isn’t a budget. It’s a blueprint for turning our country into a playground for the wealthy — while working families are told to fend for themselves. And if we let them get away with it, the GOP will just keep going. We’re working to elect Democrats who will protect the programs families count on — and we’re building the grassroots momentum to flip key seats and stop the GOP’s billionaire-first agenda in its tracks. **[_Will you chip in today to help us elect Democrats who will stand up for working families — and protect our future from billionaire-first GOP leaders?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113089115/562608005/-204835043?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.10_OTS-GOP-Budget_B2_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDdmMTVhYi0zYjc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9l7PWSOV00HP_Vw7nblEK4e8121OkQhCfTvbLLJBeFs=)** | | [DONATE >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113089117/562608008/-204835043?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.10_OTS-GOP-Budget_B2_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDdmMTVhYi0zYjc2LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9l7PWSOV00HP_Vw7nblEK4e8121OkQhCfTvbLLJBeFs=)

clean_body: Off the Sidelines is building the power to fight back — but we need you with us. | = Let’s call this what it is. The GOP’s latest budget isn’t about “fiscal responsibility” — and it’s not about helping working people. This GOP budget has one goal : protect the rich and make the rest of us pay for it. The Republican budget slashes Medicaid. Cuts funding for public education. Puts Social Security and crucial public benefits like SNAP on the chopping block — all while expanding tax breaks for billionaires and giant corporations. This isn’t a budget. It’s a blueprint for turning our country into a playground for the wealthy — while working families are told to fend for themselves. And if we let them get away with it, the GOP will just keep going. We’re working to elect Democrats who will protect the programs families count on — and we’re building the grassroots momentum to flip key seats and stop the GOP’s billionaire-first agenda in its tracks. = | | = Every dollar fuels our fight — and shows Republicans that we’re not going to let them balance their budget on our backs. Not now. Not ever. Thanks for being in this work with us, — Team Off the Sidelines © 2025 | Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Sunday News Digest: 8/10/2025
body:
Polis’ war on one Colorado company—RMV uncovers the proof
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**August 10, 2025** **SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST**
| | Dear Readers,
What happens when the state uses its power not to protect the public, but to crush a single business it doesn’t like? That’s the question at the center of our latest investigation into the Polis administration—**and it’s one of the most alarming examples of political targeting we’ve reported.**
In a multi-part series, Rocky Mountain Voice has revealed how the Colorado Energy & Carbon Management Commission (ECMC) worked with two Front Range towns—Dacono and Frederick—[to wield an obscure regulation, Rule 211, in a way it’s never been used before:](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to shut down _active, producing wells._ Even commissioners called it “the first of its kind.” Officially, the move was sold as environmental protection. But the towns’ own filings talk about “barriers to development” and “difficulties encouraging growth.” This wasn’t about cleanup—it was about clearing land.
The target was K.P. Kauffman Company (KPK), a family-run operator employing 300 Coloradans at its peak. According to a federal complaint, **Polis once told its founder,_“I want you and your industry out of business...[starting with you.”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_**
The regulatory campaign against KPK has been a [war of attrition.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Before Dacono and Frederick ever filed their Rule 211 complaint, the ECMC had already set its sights on KPK. In November 2021, the commission approved a five-year compliance plan that included cleanup work across 74 sites and a $795,000 fine. KPK poured about $7 million into meeting its terms. By February 2023, regulators scrapped the plan for what they called a lack of “substantial progress” and replaced it with an unprecedented $133 million bond requirement—effectively moving the goalposts. **Since then, the agency has hit KPK with more than 50 Notices of Alleged Violation a month** —sometimes for nothing more than paperwork timing—while giving Chevron a pass after a blowout that injured a worker and displaced residents.
The message is clear: Colorado isn’t sparring with the largest operators— _it’s milking them._ The ones it’s _trying_ to take out are the smaller, independent companies—**in line with the governor’s directive to _“continue the state’s transition away from oil and gas dependence.”_**

This is why Rocky Mountain Voice exists—to cut through the spin and get to the truth. Special thanks to editor Jen Schumann, whose work on this investigation exposes what could be one of the most dangerous regulatory precedents in Colorado history. If one company can be crushed this way, no one is safe.
**🚨 Read the full series here:** PART 1 - **[The Rule 211 gamble: How two towns used Colorado law to effectively shut down an oil company’s core assets]()**

PART 2 - **[Bled dry by the state: One oil company’s fight to survive ECMC’s war of attrition](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**

PART 3 - **[The man Polis vowed to destroy: Kevin Kauffman’s final fight for truth and legacy](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
We’re not done reporting on this story. And we’re not done fighting for a Colorado where truth matters more than politics.
In liberty and truth,
Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
| | **TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK**
---
**[“We absolutely back the badge”: Mesa County defends deputy in federal suit](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Mesa County is taking Colorado’s top political figures to court. On Tuesday, commissioners unanimously voted to authorize a federal lawsuit against Governor Jared Polis and Attorney General Phil Weiser over what they called “politically motivated litigation” targeting local law enforcement under a controversial new state law.

**[TABOR Undermined as Almost Half of Colorado Budget Now Exempt](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) State spending that is exempt from Colorado’s Taxpayer’s Bill of Rights has increased by nearly 30% over the past 30 years, according to a report by the public policy think tank Common Sense Institute.

**[The man Polis vowed to destroy: Kevin Kauffman’s final fight for truth and legacy](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) They tried to bury him. He’s still standing—with the paperwork to prove it. On his 50th birthday, Kevin Kauffman stood waist-deep in the waters off Eilat, Israel. His son handed him a sealed envelope his accountant asked him to deliver on this day. He opened it, read what was inside and stood in silence.
|
---
**STATE**
**[The Rule 211 gamble: How two towns used Colorado law to effectively shut down an oil company’s core assets](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Buried wells, sworn affidavits and a state determined to make an example. This is the opening chapter of a three-part series on one oil and gas company’s final stand—and what the documents and data actually reveal. Start with the towns. Stay for the verdict.
**[Governor Polis Gets an Earful from Rural Towns Tired of Being Ignored](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) State biologists shared a minimum count of pups for one of the newly-named packs in Colorado, marking the third pack to have confirmed pups after reintroduction.
**[Going nuclear: Local support grows for Colorado’s next energy chapter](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) As Colorado pursues its climate goals, communities in the northwestern energy corridor are beginning to take a different approach. Instead of relying only on wind, solar, or state mandates, local leaders are turning their attention to nuclear energy as a viable solution.

_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[Russia hoax was the strategy: Clinton greenlit Trump smear to deflect from her email scandal during 2016 run](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Newly declassified documents and insider testimony has started to change how people view the whole Trump–Russia narrative. At the heart of it all is a 2017 intelligence report that claimed Vladimir Putin meddled in the 2016 election to help Donald Trump win.

**[USPS Acknowledges Massive Ballot Shipments Into Pennsylvania in 2020](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[THE GATEWAY PUNDIT](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) As The Gateway Pundit reported back in 2020, election fraud whistleblowers came forward in December following the controversial election, including one who witnessed the shipping of an estimated 144,000-288,000 completed ballots across three state lines on October 21 2020. __
**[800% spike in ICE attacks blamed on ‘radical left’ by agency director](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[THE DAILY SIGNAL](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Two months ago, violent riots broke out in America’s second-largest city after immigration enforcement officers served legal warrants, signed by a judge, to individuals in this country illegally.

**[READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**LOCAL**
**[Divide Family Battles Teller County to Keep Greenhouse and Grow Food](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Virginia and her husband, Zac, had a dream of growing their own food, sharing with the neighbors and selling their extra zucchinis, potatoes and mangoes to fellow Teller County residents. They researched state and local laws, decided they did not need a permit, took out a home equity loan and built a $60,000 greenhouse on their 4-acre lot not far from Woodland Park. Now they are facing the possibility of losing their home after Teller County officials told the Loops to tear down the greenhouse.
**[Meeker self-evacuates as Elk and Lee fires surge past 75,000 acres](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The town of Meeker has been self-evacuated as the nearby Elk and Lee fires surpassed 75,000 combined acres Thursday. Both started by lightning earlier this week, the twin fires have drastically grown in size over the past several days. On Tuesday, the Lee Fire was estimated to be 7,750 acres and the Elk Fire at 13,025, according to a Facebook post from the Rio Blanco County Sheriff’s Office.
**[ICE Asks for Tips in Ongoing Search for Second Suspect Accused of Ramming Vehicle](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[FOX 31 NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement is still searching for a second man connected with an attempted ramming that spurred a large operation last week. However, the agency isn’t sharing many details. __

**_[READ MORE LOCAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_**
|
---
**COMMENTARY**
**[Garbo: Colorado Democrats set the house on fire, then send you the insurance bill](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _If you’re a Colorado homeowner staring down another massive insurance premium hike – welcome to the consequences of single-party rule. For over a decade, Democrats have run this state. For the last four years, they’ve enjoyed unchecked supermajorities. And yet, while your coverage hasn’t improved, your bill has exploded._
__
**[Daniel: Colorado’s political ruling class has turned common sense upside down](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _There was a time when Colorado ran on common sense. We valued hard work, local control, and the idea that if you played by the rules, you’d get a fair shake. But somewhere along the way, the folks running this state traded those values for political theater and personal ambition._
__

**[DiGirolamo: The predator playbook every parent needs to know about](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _The Internet is a 24\7 how-to manual. Unfortunately, it’s also available for predators to gather advice to target and manipulate your child. All in a matter of seconds, simply by asking. Staca Shehan, Vice President at the National Center for Missing & Exploited Children recently said, “We’re also seeing offenders enter questions asking for guides or tutorials on how to groom or recruit children and do it more efficiently.” _
__

**[Devotional: Belief plus action equals unshakable faith](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Let’s be honest, everyone believes in something. Even the person who proudly claims to “believe in nothing” is holding on to a belief about that nothing. (Which is something... Try not to get a headache.) I still remember the first time I was taught the Big Bang Theory at Valley Junior High in Carlsbad, California. The basic idea? “In the beginning, there was nothing... and then it exploded.” Wait, what? Nothing with a bang. It exploded?! What! I’m so confused._
__
**[READ MORE COMMENTARY](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|

|

**🇺🇸 DID YOU KNOW?** **A high schooler designed today’s American flag.** In 1958, 17-year-old Bob Heft created the 50-star flag as a history class project—earning just a B-. He predicted Alaska and Hawaii would soon become states, and he was right. When President Eisenhower approved the design, Heft’s teacher bumped his grade to an A.

The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | QUOTE OF THE DAY "A decline in courage may be the most striking feature that an outside observer notices in the West today." – Alexander Solzhenitsyn | | | | ---|---|--- Did a friend forward you this email? | A product of Rocky Mountain Voice, Inc. 8200 S Quebec St, STE A3601 Centennial, CO 80112 This message was originally sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Be sure to put “RockyMountainVoice.com” on your safe-senders whitelist. # [District Round-up](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fbethfarnhamforcongress.com%2F2025%2F08%2F10%2Fdistrict-round-up%2F%3Fjetpack_skip_subscription_popup&sr=0&signature=dd3318483d402aad4d3ea1bb1e570644&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z)
| | By **Elizabeth Farnham** on August 10, 2025
---|---
On August 1st, I had the pleasure of addressing the Bedford County Democratic Committee at their annual summer picnic. With even more in attendance than last year, more connections were made with voters concerned about the Trump administration and the unwillingness of Republicans in Congress, like our own US Representative, multimillionaire John Joyce, to check his overreaches of power. Bedford citizens also posted their questions to multimillionaire Joyce since he never makes himself available to them in person.
Some of the questions they asked are:
Why did you vote to cut Medicaid and Medicare?
Why are you against the middle class?
How did you become so extreme?
Why did you vote to cut food stamps?
Cancer drugs for children or a $200million ballroom?
All excellent questions which I'm sure multimillionaire Joyce will never deign to answer.
The next day, I headed to Greencastle in Franklin County for Old Home Week where I learned the rich history of the Allison-Antrim Mansion and I met the owner of [Eden Vintage,](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=ed31696d6a62bfef76f96be8689279934c59757f7814ede4299239c13986c795&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5020&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=358d0191351d01e66fd8b09769ffcc13&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0VkZW5Cb3V0aXF1ZURlc2lnbnMv&email_id=223b230f434818b9ab0579a6a10f43b0) Ashley Keller Little.
over to Huntingdon for the Cornboil of the Huntingdon County Democratic Committee where I met with more concerned voters who received warmly my message of Democracy and wondered if multimillionaire Joyce would ever acknowledge the harm that the Huntingdon economy is suffering due to the federal failure to staff the Raystown Lake campgrounds adequately. The depressed tourism has been leading to less spending in town. Their pie auction is the stuff of legends. Many thanks to Commissioner Jeff Thomas for auctioning them.
After that, I enjoyed a fresh brew, good conversation, and live music at the Juniata Brewing Company. You can check out their cool events here: [https://www.juniatabrewing.com/](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=4b4c9343e3df47f70c63327c9f4b549e183a6484021ab19e298f241bace28014&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5020&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=6b7abd98e3d06c6962bf4064157826e5&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVuaWF0YWJyZXdpbmcuY29tLw=&email_id=223b230f434818b9ab0579a6a10f43b0)
On Monday, I attended an event in Harrisburg titled, "Families First, Not Billionaires." I appreciated the opportunity to speak as a candidate who is fighting for Everyday Americans and not the ultra-wealthy.
On Wednesday, I was back in Huntingdon, meeting with voters at the Huntingdon County Fair. They shared what was on their hearts and minds and enjoyed some Democratic popcorn. I appreciated that they took my literature.
Later, I traveled to Franklin County, where I attended the Democratic Women of Franklin County Club 19th Amendment Tea at the Franklin County Visitors Bureau. Local historian Ann Hull presented brilliantly about the the rich history of Franklin County suffragettes. I appreciate all of the work those women did so I can run for Congress today.
Yesterday, I was back in Franklin County at Norlo Park for the annual Franklin County Democratic Committee picnic. There I addressed voters concerned for our Democracy. Thank you Ike Loften for the video.
[ ](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=9d767653811f824e8c05eb125f332e3cfebf478716493b71bd59c348ce171f00&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5020&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=97dcfa0852809afb04c3cfae6fa9c542&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cDovL2JldGhmYXJuaGFtZm9yY29uZ3Jlc3MuY29tLzIwMjUvMDgvMTAvZGlzdHJpY3Qtcm91bmQtdXAvP2pldHBhY2tfc2tpcF9zdWJzY3JpcHRpb25fcG9wdXA&email_id=223b230f434818b9ab0579a6a10f43b0) [ ](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=9d767653811f824e8c05eb125f332e3cfebf478716493b71bd59c348ce171f00&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5020&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=97dcfa0852809afb04c3cfae6fa9c542&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cDovL2JldGhmYXJuaGFtZm9yY29uZ3Jlc3MuY29tLzIwMjUvMDgvMTAvZGlzdHJpY3Qtcm91bmQtdXAvP2pldHBhY2tfc2tpcF9zdWJzY3JpcHRpb25fcG9wdXA&email_id=223b230f434818b9ab0579a6a10f43b0)
---
All week long of course, I've been celebrating the incredible wins of the West Suburban Little League from Johnstown who have been participating in the Little League World Series for softball.
They are officially THE WORLD CHAMPIONS OF LITTLE LEAGUE SOFTBALL!
CONGRATULATIONS!
[https://www.facebook.com/share/p/19eqwNTSmj/](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=6d3b8818125027bf25ffd03a060f64f6b49f45865422351631b7a630dec61375&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5020&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=cfadded00f812f1ac8c67507eef9e6f8&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL3NoYXJlL3AvMTllcXdOVFNtai8&email_id=223b230f434818b9ab0579a6a10f43b0)
Thank you for taking the time to read through my recap. If you have any questions or concerns, please don't hesitate to reach out to me at bethfarnhamforcongress@gmail.com
And as always, #ChooseDemocracy!

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Health care is a right.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR]
body:
[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1001&akid=595%2E181023%2EUb4sRm ]Jocelyn Benson for Governor

Team —

This campaign has taken me to just about every corner of Michigan, from
big cities to small towns. And while life for Michiganders is different
depending on whether you’re living in an apartment on a busy street in
Detroit or on a farm out in Mount Pleasant or Carson City, I keep hearing
one constant in every conversation:

The rising cost of health care is making it impossible to make ends meet.

The Democratic Party is the party of affordable health care, and 60 years
ago, this party made a promise with the passage of Medicare and Medicaid
that every American deserves access to care.

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250810_PM1_V1_S1&t=1002&akid=595%2E181023%2EUb4sRm ]Today, that promise is under attack. I’ll never stop defending
affordable health care. Will you pitch in right
now to help us keep up the fight and keep Michiganders insured?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/604?c0=jmb-em-q32025.bgb7Yo&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250810_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1003&akid=595%2E181023%2EUb4sRm ]CHIP IN
$10
NOW

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/604?c0=jmb-em-q32025.bgb7Yo&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250810_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=1004&akid=595%2E181023%2EUb4sRm ]CHIP IN
$25
NOW

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/604?c0=jmb-em-q32025.bgb7Yo&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250810_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1005&akid=595%2E181023%2EUb4sRm ]CHIP IN
$50
NOW

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/604?c0=jmb-em-q32025.bgb7Yo&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250810_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=1006&akid=595%2E181023%2EUb4sRm ]CHIP IN
$100
NOW

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/604?c0=jmb-em-q32025.bgb7Yo&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250810_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=250&t=1007&akid=595%2E181023%2EUb4sRm ]CHIP IN
$250
NOW

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q32025.A5XsW4&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250810_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=595%2E181023%2EUb4sRm ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Republicans are pushing plans that will gut coverage and shut down
hospitals in the rural areas that need them most. Health care for hundreds
of thousands of Michganders is at risk, all so that Republicans can hand
billionaires another massive tax break.

Rest assured, I am fighting for you and your family.

Already, hospitals in communities like Mount Pleasant and Carson City are
facing possible closure because of Republican-backed policies that would
leave entire regions without access to basic care and cut thousands of
jobs.

These are not just policy choices. These are decisions that will affect
whether a child can see a doctor, whether a senior can afford their
medicine, or whether a family can afford to get through a medical
emergency.

I believe that health care is a basic right, not a privilege, not
something reserved for the wealthy or well-connected, but for all. No one
should have to choose between paying their bills and taking care of their
health.

These Republican-backed policies would leave entire regions without care
and cut thousands of jobs from health care providers who put food on the
table by caring for their neighbors. This isn’t going after “fraud, waste,
and abuse,” these are policy
decisions that will affect whether a child can see a doctor, whether a
senior can afford their prescriptions, or whether a family can afford to
get through a medical emergency.

Health care is a right. Not a privilege reserved for the wealthy and
well-connected, but something that we all deserve.

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250810_PM1_V1_S1&t=1009&akid=595%2E181023%2EUb4sRm ]I’m putting people over profit and fighting to protect affordable
health care for Michiganders. If you’re standing with me, can I count on
your support today?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/604?c0=jmb-em-q32025.bgb7Yo&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250810_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1010&akid=595%2E181023%2EUb4sRm ]CHIP IN
$10

$25
NOW

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/604?c0=jmb-em-q32025.bgb7Yo&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250810_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1012&akid=595%2E181023%2EUb4sRm ]CHIP IN
$50
NOW

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/604?c0=jmb-em-q32025.bgb7Yo&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250810_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=1013&akid=595%2E181023%2EUb4sRm ]CHIP IN
$100
NOW

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/604?c0=jmb-em-q32025.bgb7Yo&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250810_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=250&t=1014&akid=595%2E181023%2EUb4sRm ]CHIP IN
$250
NOW

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q32025.A5XsW4&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250810_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1015&akid=595%2E181023%2EUb4sRm ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thanks, I won’t stop standing
up for our values and fighting for affordable health care.

— Jocelyn Benson

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you.

name: John James
subject: What I owe my sons
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312
body:
| | | Friend, I’ve worn the uniform. I’ve led in combat. But the most important title I’ll ever carry is _Dad_. I look at my sons and think about the Michigan they’ll grow up in — and whether it will be a place that honors hard work, truth, and personal responsibility. Because right now, the Left is working overtime to erase those values and replace them with grievance politics and socialism.
---
[ **STAND UP FOR MICHIGAN'S FUTURE** ](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=8b652941a9f348b1a2acd6d36c59cbe6&_e=6F7xbCfu2EEmPolPmMGcMoapIm9rrReaj9PQc1jzZah0lWJP46Btb82fqPmXyKNy5dhuHegHcWl6zcuQaEdSEipnWPFS_ztuiizOA3VgPEwjL6xnNC09Qh_4J1maLdjpU2r5slGvUAoS801g4pJmT1prpSsqFfNayxXtkgtFYshXUzKI8GlpajpUZsLQknhbTOKL_jvoBIeBe0ErqVo9SBpcyRwD23dMOg9sL1885bUCWdjZhKjv-QYXL8MkCaNujs5lalcVvO6v2i_zLjQzue_maCuMOXPUMZJt66DR7U8ddbncdSzv9nyrbm2M_qfigI9WLbKEBA1EvA7llUV_4Wez2nhRcfRF48IdRVbqwV5RCIMsgv2-9wOlAi-3zOkR5kAFoR_HNWhns6Ti07-rbj-mCLJKFXRrxZhl424iDo0%3D)
---
They’re pushing government control over self-reliance. Identity politics over integrity. **Lawlessness over accountability.** This isn’t a simple disagreement on policy. They want to redefine what it _means_ to be an American. **[That’s why I’m in this fight. ### His views/behavior were well known before nearly every Republican Senator voted for him...The Party owns *all* his corruption, cruelty & incompetence
| | [DavidShuster](https://substack.com/@davidshuster) and [Cliff Schecter](https://substack.com/@cliffsedge)

### _**Thank You For Your Support, My Friends!** A[ Paid Subscription](https://substack.com/redirect/e1a3b241-eef3-472b-a360-bfaaf106a7c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for $1.50/Week Provides our Soundcheck Fund With Resources to Amplify Independent Creators. **We Need You. Help Us Save Our Democracy**_
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.dZNwJ3zM58w-njOwDzlGgZ5JfyYT28WvPSLv1DD3WQM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=170636020)
**By David Shuster**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5f344836-2eda-41cf-8997-5653d52eebce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
By all rights, [the modern world should have consigned the medieval mind to the trash heap of history](https://substack.com/redirect/c40734a0-d017-4576-89e6-783b072423f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) - along with phrenology, witch dunking, and bloodletting by leech.
And yet, out of calcified garbage emerged our U.S. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth. Holding a flaming-incense burner of theocratic lunacy like Torquemada in a tactical vest.
Earlier this week, Hegseth, who this year swore to support and defend the Constitution of the United States of America, took to the sewer of social media to share a video. It was of two-wild-eyed pastors in mid-ecclesiastical spasm, calling for the repeal of women's suffrage.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/75b4ccd1-e0bf-465c-9bf0-84bdfececd9b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Their message? That women should not vote.** They should instead submit themselves [to the lordship](https://substack.com/redirect/d79e6b31-1642-4298-b562-e63a8cc50406?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of their husbands--like chattel blessed by Christ.
Hegseth, never one to miss a chance to pander to the howling fundamentalist fringe, affixed to it [the Orwellian-like slogan](https://substack.com/redirect/0c0dbf53-8f3c-485d-96bf-78a5c45e1898?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): _" All of Christ for All of Life." _
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/07f3736f-6cb9-4c53-9a39-7ba8c7dacddb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
What's next? "All of Paul for All of Congress"?
The fact this screed came from a clique of Christian nationalists is not surprising. These are people who see the Enlightenment as a historical blunder, and [who eye democracy with the suspicion](https://substack.com/redirect/0c0dbf53-8f3c-485d-96bf-78a5c45e1898?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of a person forced to use indoor plumbing for the first time.
**But this screed was amplified by the man who oversees the most powerful military on Earth.** Who holds in his hands the lives--at the very least--of hundreds of millions of human beings.
_[And it is a symptom of a deeper rot](https://substack.com/redirect/d79e6b31-1642-4298-b562-e63a8cc50406?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) , a cancer in the brain of our republic._
Hegseth, an eternal frat boy, proven drunk, alleged rapist, and serial adulterer turned holy crusader, now views himself as a warrior for Western Civilization. But his definition seems to rest not on the principles of Athens or Philadelphia, [but the musty hierarchies of 14th-century feudalism](https://substack.com/redirect/0c0dbf53-8f3c-485d-96bf-78a5c45e1898?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and Baptist basement Bible studies.
Hegseth's boozy vision is not one of liberty, equality, or even tolerable governance. It is a demonic conception of a divine sausage-fest where men lead, women perpetually kneel (including those who are not your wife) and voting is a masculine rite.
This is not "traditional values." It is not "faith in the public square."
It is brute, unreconstructed, low-IQ misogyny dressed up in its Sunday worst. It is a sledgehammer swung at the Nineteenth Amendment by [a man too drunk with power](https://substack.com/redirect/d79e6b31-1642-4298-b562-e63a8cc50406?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (and, one suspects, more than his fair share of whiskey) and too ill-read in history to understand its implications.
The same man who has dropped bombs and missiles abroad while simultaneously posting the attack plans on an unsecured Signal chat, now wants to wage holy war at home against the Constitution. And our wives, daughters, sisters, grandmothers, friends, neighbors and, yes, citizens--in case he's forgotten--of his own country.
One wonders what the women of our armed forces--those who have lost blood and limbs for this country while proudly donning its uniform--must think of a Defense Secretary who sees them as electoral accidents with disposable rights.
[One shudders to imagine Hegseth's ideal America](https://substack.com/redirect/c40734a0-d017-4576-89e6-783b072423f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Likely a Christo-fascist, plantation-state run by beer bellied, boozed-up patriarchs and their dutifully silent Stepford wives.
One can picture Pete--cocktail in hand, third wife, a Fox News producer he was dating while still married to his second wife, on the sofa sitting next to him--cheering like it was a college football game for the Sons of Jacob as he watched each new episode of The Handmaid's Tale.
Men like Hegseth who think women should "obey" their husbands are nothing [if not habitual hypocrites](https://substack.com/redirect/c40734a0-d017-4576-89e6-783b072423f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
And yet this Hegseth horror show is not drinking moonshine in a dirt-floored shack in the Deep South. He is not writing manifestos in a heavily fortified survivalist bunker in Montana.
Defense Secretary Pete Hegeth, with his "Deus Vult" (God wills it) tattoo and Christian nationalist war cry, is publicly promoting his neanderthal fantasies as a member of one of the most important positions in the Trump administration's cabinet.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/179f4e46-e13f-450c-ae5b-a72c4bba0d5d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[There was a time when any man who suggested stripping voting rights from women would have been removed from the public square](https://substack.com/redirect/b3e4040e-dcd5-44cf-9f55-c55b39575d79?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), pelted with eggs, and shamed into a rightfully-earned oblivion.
In the Trump era, such a douchebag--one removed from his National Guard duty to protect President Biden's inauguration, because his superiors were so concerned about his extreme views--[is invited to anchor weekend shows](https://substack.com/redirect/7b1b482a-880d-4adb-b099-d0c65fea227a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on _Fox News_.
**And then handed the keys to the Pentagon. Perhaps it 's time that [Democrats and all decent people stand up and aggressively say ](https://substack.com/redirect/82685856-596d-4c38-a0e6-ff0ece2bab9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_**[enough](https://substack.com/redirect/82685856-596d-4c38-a0e6-ff0ece2bab9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**_
Pete Hegseth has applauded a sermon whose theme is the political extinction of more than half our nation. He has resurrected the darkest impulses of our country's past, instead of speaking out for the democracy for which he's sworn a solemn oath to protect and defend.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/399757b2-de13-452a-a01d-c057ea64831a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This is no innocuous theological debate. It is a direct salute to regression, a delinquent middle finger to every woman in America, and a dagger in the back of modern humanity.
Pete Hegseth is beyond despicable and disgusting.
* * *
_David Shuster is an Emmy award winning broadcast journalist who is best known for his work at NBC News and as an anchor MSNBC. He is a contributor to Blue Amp Substack and co-host of[our weekly show (Thursdays, 2pm et, on Substack), "Amped Up w/ Cliff Schecter."](https://substack.com/redirect/82685856-596d-4c38-a0e6-ff0ece2bab9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_

And yet, out of calcified garbage emerged our U.S. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth. Holding a flaming-incense burner of theocratic lunacy like Torquemada in a tactical vest. Earlier this week, Hegseth, who this year swore to support and defend the Constitution of the United States of America, took to the sewer of social media to share a video. It was of two-wild-eyed pastors in mid-ecclesiastical spasm, calling for the repeal of women's suffrage. | | ---|---|--- Their message? That women should not vote. They should instead submit themselves of their husbands--like chattel blessed by Christ. Hegseth, never one to miss a chance to pander to the howling fundamentalist fringe, affixed to it : " All of Christ for All of Life." | | ---|---|--- What's next? "All of Paul for All of Congress"? The fact this screed came from a clique of Christian nationalists is not surprising. These are people who see the Enlightenment as a historical blunder, and of a person forced to use indoor plumbing for the first time. But this screed was amplified by the man who oversees the most powerful military on Earth. Who holds in his hands the lives--at the very least--of hundreds of millions of human beings. , a cancer in the brain of our republic. Hegseth, an eternal frat boy, proven drunk, alleged rapist, and serial adulterer turned holy crusader, now views himself as a warrior for Western Civilization. But his definition seems to rest not on the principles of Athens or Philadelphia, and Baptist basement Bible studies. Hegseth's boozy vision is not one of liberty, equality, or even tolerable governance. It is a demonic conception of a divine sausage-fest where men lead, women perpetually kneel (including those who are not your wife) and voting is a masculine rite. This is not "traditional values." It is not "faith in the public square." It is brute, unreconstructed, low-IQ misogyny dressed up in its Sunday worst. It is a sledgehammer swung at the Nineteenth Amendment by (and, one suspects, more than his fair share of whiskey) and too ill-read in history to understand its implications. The same man who has dropped bombs and missiles abroad while simultaneously posting the attack plans on an unsecured Signal chat, now wants to wage holy war at home against the Constitution. And our wives, daughters, sisters, grandmothers, friends, neighbors and, yes, citizens--in case he's forgotten--of his own country. One wonders what the women of our armed forces--those who have lost blood and limbs for this country while proudly donning its uniform--must think of a Defense Secretary who sees them as electoral accidents with disposable rights. . Likely a Christo-fascist, plantation-state run by beer bellied, boozed-up patriarchs and their dutifully silent Stepford wives. One can picture Pete--cocktail in hand, third wife, a Fox News producer he was dating while still married to his second wife, on the sofa sitting next to him--cheering like it was a college football game for the Sons of Jacob as he watched each new episode of The Handmaid's Tale. Men like Hegseth who think women should "obey" their husbands are nothing . And yet this Hegseth horror show is not drinking moonshine in a dirt-floored shack in the Deep South. He is not writing manifestos in a heavily fortified survivalist bunker in Montana. Defense Secretary Pete Hegeth, with his "Deus Vult" (God wills it) tattoo and Christian nationalist war cry, is publicly promoting his neanderthal fantasies as a member of one of the most important positions in the Trump administration's cabinet. | | ---|---|--- , pelted with eggs, and shamed into a rightfully-earned oblivion. In the Trump era, such a douchebag--one removed from his National Guard duty to protect President Biden's inauguration, because his superiors were so concerned about his extreme views-- on Fox News. And then handed the keys to the Pentagon. Perhaps it 's time that . Pete Hegseth has applauded a sermon whose theme is the political extinction of more than half our nation. He has resurrected the darkest impulses of our country's past, instead of speaking out for the democracy for which he's sworn a solemn oath to protect and defend. | | ---|---|--- This is no innocuous theological debate. It is a direct salute to regression, a delinquent middle finger to every woman in America, and a dagger in the back of modern humanity. Pete Hegseth is beyond despicable and disgusting. David Shuster is an Emmy award winning broadcast journalist who is best known for his work at NBC News and as an anchor MSNBC. He is a contributor to Blue Amp Substack and co-host of Thank You For Your Support, My Friends! A for $1.50/Week Provides our Soundcheck Fund With Resources to Amplify Independent Creators. We Need You. Help Us Save Our Democracy And thank you for all that you already do!!** You're currently a free subscriber to . About this time last week, I shared my heart in an email, laying out what has been happening behind the scenes ... and the response was overwhelming.
I can’t thank you enough.
We were absolutely blown away by your support, your kindness, and your commitment to the cause. In fact, there’s no other way to explain the outpouring of support other than by God’s divine intervention. We heard from people who said they hadn’t received an email from us in years!
We have no idea how that happened, but it was wild ... and it was wonderful. Wonderful to be reminded yet again of the amazing spirit of our fellow countrymen.
The struggles we face are still very present — each day brings with it unexpected challenges — but last week our team was reminded just how strong this community is.
You know, True the Vote was never meant to be about politics. It was about principle. Fairness. Liberty. But we are in a spiritual and cultural battle, and the forces working to undermine all of our voices are relentless. They want us silent, sidelined, and resigned.
No. That’s not who America is.
And we don’t have time to keep pretending that outdated systems, rigged rules, legal theatrics, or “just trust us” answers are anything more than deliberate tactics to wear down our liberty — one election at a time.
And time ... is short. That’s why we are focused on building out tools you can use locally and a community where we can continue to collaborate ... as iron sharpens iron.
| | As iron sharpens iron, so one person sharpens another.
---

\- Proverbs 27:17
Together, we will secure the future of our elections — and with them, the future of this nation. We can do this.
Keep the faith. Never quit. And again, thank you.
Ephesians 6 FTW!
Ever onward —
|
---

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Republicans in Congress have no idea why we won the Election
body:
| | | | |
---
Peter,
If you’re sick and tired of** _do-nothing Republicans who talk a big game before every election and then lose all their courage when it’s time to pass laws_** ...
If you’re sick and tired of **_RINO’s begging for your money everyday only to disappear the instant a tough fight begins_** ...
If you’re sick and tired of spending your time and money to help **_politicians who turn their backs on you the moment their plane lands in DC_** ...
**Then you feel exactly the way I do.**
[STAND WITH MTG](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/2z4en7iVoi8gxcCXZxyowd9aMcFLtmd5_OcEjM4EK5vk1V7g4_xbJzAecQYNDYrXz1MZPezPHLr5se17tSozLefDtaebhMMoKL6ZPnHKk1xPje3e4cFDOHTzfvB9wUcGKuQQEAnKdqWdNdDUgZHVTSO_YeHJDCPsNZvkLmvYjV21xu0__EXhXW_w7-OcpgMUgdQ9lQFQByav1C8boOru0d0eBU7UtXnw5dVTDmwCBBbvtEgl0OMSyDNo8eyCCxIG09jeRE2LE5uVVEahLvTER3n5qcTErxYQcbjh9JGUCamywbfadrArMeLUb-rwl6iEA3FPFHK8FauZPAoSBIVR0mt4PKlVaIid7oHIwk2MTjujfYLpvR4Dv7KE1t2xttluM8FR6BruNQQnH6XU8bRKHYBTxnSb5WM_CXof-ZpeLi0cJAr_KOUnScWt6dq-owC6E8FOk4Y1nS1gIfCRVtSk-mt1G1rNO-Y8vjU6d3BTFFWEsPmWgis7HsyeytrQayj_ggAnVF3erFIOckk-KE97o-xrErRiJtN6lL2VfVwrPM8Zbairg1NHJt1fGchKLn8jmpvC9E6XsfM1h1WGYShXvuU4z06sqMRgXkaEJtE0cZqukVE3vYnJBZ9KBu6Q4X__t1UZmubWY2hGk97KlrO_8xHvwUDlEQ4zWjsAlNiNPGl1x_hjDIu3yJrLrv_v6rTlyZs0T8NshBLPjKbQczA5mqRF0ru1SCOuY4kOoISEtYUkKJZigcKrlbZGh-M5LL2JQi9D4p_d8BgLomY60TWWdxHZUDlbnXo/75z12YmfavomuTg2UTYIQZct-B_CUJVN/11)
It’s time for Republicans in Congress to get it through their heads that we won an historic landslide election in November on the coattails of President Trump and his America First agenda, and that the Republican base, and the American people, expect swift action.
**Republicans need to get serious about:**
* Making the DOGE cuts permanent.
* Making it a felony to do sex change operations on children.
* Investigating and prosecuting those responsible for the Republic-ending lawfare waged against President Trump and his allies.
* Stopping the blank checks to Ukraine.
* Holding the COVID tyrants at the CDC accountable.
* Passing NO tax on tips, overtime, and social security.
* Reigning in the rogue federal judiciary.

If we don’t take bold action on these priorities, voters will justifiably lose faith in Congressional Republicans and they will punish us at the ballot box in the midterm elections.
**I’m sending a wake up call to Republicans in DC: **
**When MTG is upset, the base is upset.**
We have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to save our country and if we blow it we deserve to lose the next election.
That’s why I’m holding the establishment’s feet to the fire in the fight to codify President Trump’s agenda.
The powers in Washington are going to punish me for saying this but let me be clear: I don’t care. I don’t work for the Establishment, Special Interests, or the Corrupt Swamp. **I work for YOU.**
**_[That’s why I’m so proud to fund my political operation $10, $25, and $50 at a time from patriots across this country like you who are sick and tired of the status quo](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/CZVIuRiVWaKydh7UZkk5Fok2WDWORLl72248H2h8Hu0ysD32hZCemZ2vN8jzS9T8B8c8MJr0bgxlA-9BhsUMMoqa0I1WUHOYVI9BIhXcm2DQTBOl43HTpwnwiJhSfPe-VCrSn-QoHPd1iwWOSMvpEkBkBzoLqY3zA4xRzHGOMH2Nq7QvU89obwYeqdavLP0iaLOAogu1RgdDqWFlkYHfeBUg1xIWhlkfx_GXpNhLj7nEYaN5IqvG0YQYFyxq5oAt9DmUru9sPBJhHf0HxTtsxeJ5Qne4xkmgVZmywQ7MuC9tQqnqh-3y-u3agywD65CILpknF1blUj7rK5YsXqANv0v0J_VlVEDbbAnrex5LkUUwR4133lt2Mv9mFfeCvtXpCctOt1FfSCocZNAFtEtdtFcAtSWHCfQp7lDRFKGDQ6FjcjTXqhinDPm0J_l7W5MgZyvHAGeKdzvfcCz5L0A0jIbypBc3pD_ucW9CTBtJIjpCCxyoXrbHm37Vz6mqh-tm3cCi6mPUAdTymlQQPVb_k4hbg0g4b7FSCT9kMFDZVIex3Tyrvl2QKjcUCS3nTa0pMWJp2oJiu1LmOQ2yLPMN4fnvZc-W-iIv515Ic3uQy1KrsO3wZGZyZWCUUAK-b_JlJrI9Ub5oe5jV7C6ZINUKWlP99aiD0maynvuUuRJj_4h_pwOXuE8CLFYvvoPFzCtpsB-3ttwuwuSBmaBjTU7SsrsbbTToj8JdwLcgbKtM0SLFz_1QTuqP4LwWNTrAms4Kw5vUgLKLz1h1lmWJ_2x8jHd348TRZt8/GEIyzDfUZWmuEndJaJbqnF9de3JsUOfg/11)_.**
I didn’t come to Congress to make friends, I had enough before I got here.
I came to Congress to deliver for the American people, to truly REPRESENT the interests of **_We The People_**.

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, If you’re sick and tired of do-nothing Republicans who talk a big game before every election and then lose all their courage when it’s time to pass laws ... If you’re sick and tired of RINO’s begging for your money everyday only to disappear the instant a tough fight begins ... If you’re sick and tired of spending your time and money to help politicians who turn their backs on you the moment their plane lands in DC ... Then you feel exactly the way I do. It’s time for Republicans in Congress to get it through their heads that we won an historic landslide election in November on the coattails of President Trump and his America First agenda, and that the Republican base, and the American people, expect swift action. Republicans need to get serious about: Making the DOGE cuts permanent. Making it a felony to do sex change operations on children. Investigating and prosecuting those responsible for the Republic-ending lawfare waged against President Trump and his allies. Stopping the blank checks to Ukraine. Holding the COVID tyrants at the CDC accountable. Passing NO tax on tips, overtime, and social security. Reigning in the rogue federal judiciary. If we don’t take bold action on these priorities, voters will justifiably lose faith in Congressional Republicans and they will punish us at the ballot box in the midterm elections. I’m sending a wake up call to Republicans in DC: When MTG is upset, the base is upset. We have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to save our country and if we blow it we deserve to lose the next election. That’s why I’m holding the establishment’s feet to the fire in the fight to codify President Trump’s agenda. The powers in Washington are going to punish me for saying this but let me be clear: I don’t care. I don’t work for the Establishment, Special Interests, or the Corrupt Swamp. I work for YOU. . I didn’t come to Congress to make friends, I had enough before I got here. I came to Congress to deliver for the American people, to truly REPRESENT the interests of We The People. . With urgency, Marjorie Taylor Greene ** %unsubscribeurl% |
