name: GOTV PAC
subject: Republicans are flooding Texas voters with lies
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06302025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06302025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Right now, Republicans in Texas are running a shady, underhanded campaign to smear the Democratic lawmakers who left the state to stop Donald Trump’s gerrymander.
They’re sending misleading text messages to voters with no disclaimer, no transparency, just lies designed to poison the well. They want to trick Texans into thinking these lawmakers abandoned their constituents when, in reality, they’re defending our democracy.
We can’t let their lies go unanswered.
GOTV PAC is gearing up to fight back with fact-checking ads, rapid-response messaging, and our own text banking program to reach voters directly with the truth. But to keep pace with their flood of misinformation, we need resources in the door immediately.
Republicans know they can’t win this fight on the facts, so they’re trying to win it with deception. If we let them define the narrative unchallenged, they’ll succeed. Can you chip in right now to help us counter their lies and protect our lawmakers? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08102025&amount=20]
Chip in $20 now >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08102025&amount=20]
Chip in more >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08102025&amount=25]
Every minute we wait is another minute their false attacks go unchecked. Let’s make sure Texas voters hear the truth from us.
– Team GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08072025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08072025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

name: Team DNC
subject: Why we need your support tonight...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
---
Derek, we’re reaching out to ask if you’d make an $3 contribution to the DNC by midnight tonight. Not tomorrow, not next week, but _tonight._ Here’s the deal:

In less than a year in office, Trump has:
* Enacted a disastrous economic agenda that has increased costs for working people and families.
* Pushed his catastrophic budget bill through Congress (with the help of his GOP allies), which will kick 17 million Americans off their health care and strip families nationwide of access to food assistance.
* Fired government workers from critical agencies, including from NOAA, NWS, and FEMA, which folks across the country rely on for lifesaving weather advisories ahead of major weather events — and aid in the aftermath.
* Sowed chaos in California by deploying the National Guard — an unprecedented step that bypassed the authority of Governor Gavin Newsom.
* Deported folks to a Salvadorian prison without due process, and constructed an inhumane holding center in Florida — ripping apart families and threatening entire communities.

**Democrats are fighting back. But we have to do more than just resist Trump’s agenda.** Here at the DNC, we’re working hard to build the long-term infrastructure we need to get Democrats elected up and down the ballot, all across the country, this year and beyond. If we want to successfully fight back against Trump and his Republican allies, we need to elect leaders who will push back against the administration and work hard to defend their cities, districts, and states. **But in order to do that,_we need your help tonight._** In order to win big across the country and fight back against the GOP agenda, we need to cultivate resources early — the more contributions we receive now, the more effective we can be in the long term, investing in state parties nationwide and organizing millions of voters so that we have the strongest base possible when we need it most. **We’re already doing the work to elect Democrats in this year’s New Jersey and Virginia races, and we’ll continue to do the work to flip Congress in 2026 and take back the White House in 2028.** [**So please, use this link to make a $3 donation to the DNC tonight so we can continue to fight for Democrats who will fight for you >>**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?refcode=em_20250810_4245_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4245_22930333_6r9q8w&akid=4245%2E22930333%2E6r9q8w) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250810_4245_fr&refcode2=4245_22930333_6r9q8w&akid=4245%2E22930333%2E6r9q8w)**

It is a privilege to run for Governor with my family by my side — and each of you. I wouldn't trade it for anything in the world.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113090009/562611196/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-08-10_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzk1YjJlM2YtNDQ3Ni1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=41IJLHzIZPOjQRPN48FbzD5RLoi6_gEKsEtO-NXKGys=)
Peter, as you may have seen, I celebrated my birthday last week. For a couple of hours, Adam, the girls, and I huddled around a table playing a board game.
_Ticket to Ride._ I was the red train. I completed all my routes, but still came in third!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113090010/562611197/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-08-10_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzk1YjJlM2YtNDQ3Ni1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=41IJLHzIZPOjQRPN48FbzD5RLoi6_gEKsEtO-NXKGys=)
I loved the gift from my daughters — though I know they were teasing me a bit as I have been known to sometimes pick the marshmallows out of Lucky Charms.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113090011/562611198/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-08-10_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzk1YjJlM2YtNDQ3Ni1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=41IJLHzIZPOjQRPN48FbzD5RLoi6_gEKsEtO-NXKGys=)
It is a privilege to run for Governor with my family by my side — and each of you. _I wouldn't trade it for anything in the world._
**Virginia has given me so much.** It's where I grew up. It's where I went to school. It's where I'm raising my family. It's where my strongest values took root, including my deep devotion to our country.
I'm ready to get to work moving our Commonwealth forward, but first, we have to win.
And with the President of the United States planning to endorse my opponent, your support just became even more critical.
[_**So, I'm asking directly: will you make a contribution of $25 or another amount to help us air ads, hire organizers, and turn out the voters who will shape the outcome of this election?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113090012/562611199/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-08-10_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzk1YjJlM2YtNDQ3Ni1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=41IJLHzIZPOjQRPN48FbzD5RLoi6_gEKsEtO-NXKGys=)

clean_body: It is a privilege to run for Governor with my family by my side — and each of you. I wouldn't trade it for anything in the world. = Peter, as you may have seen, I celebrated my birthday last week. For a couple of hours, Adam, the girls, and I huddled around a table playing a board game. Ticket to Ride. I was the red train. I completed all my routes, but still came in third! = I loved the gift from my daughters — though I know they were teasing me a bit as I have been known to sometimes pick the marshmallows out of Lucky Charms. = It is a privilege to run for Governor with my family by my side — and each of you. I wouldn't trade it for anything in the world. Virginia has given me so much. It's where I grew up. It's where I went to school. It's where I'm raising my family. It's where my strongest values took root, including my deep devotion to our country. I'm ready to get to work moving our Commonwealth forward, but first, we have to win. And with the President of the United States planning to endorse my opponent, your support just became even more critical. = = = = = = = Thank you from the bottom of my heart, Abigail By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign.
